          getChannel().newCall(getSayMethod(), getCallOptions()), request);
    }
  }

  private static final int METHODID_SAY = 0;
  private static final int METHODID_STREAM = 1;

  private static final class MethodHandlers<Req, Resp> implements
      io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.UnaryMethod<Req, Resp>,
      io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.ServerStreamingMethod<Req, Resp>,
      io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.ClientStreamingMethod<Req, Resp>,
      io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.BidiStreamingMethod<Req, Resp> {
    private final AsyncService serviceImpl;
    private final int methodId;

    MethodHandlers(AsyncService serviceImpl, int methodId) {
      this.serviceImpl = serviceImpl;
      this.methodId = methodId;
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    @java.lang.SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    public void invoke(Req request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<Resp> responseObserver) {
      switch (methodId) {
        case METHODID_SAY:
          serviceImpl.say((demo.echo.EchoRequest) request,
              (io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<demo.echo.EchoReply>) responseObserver);
          break;
        case METHODID_STREAM:
          serviceImpl.stream((demo.echo.EchoData) request,
              (io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<demo.echo.EchoData>) responseObserver);
          break;
        default:
          throw new AssertionError();
      }
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    @java.lang.SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    public io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<Req> invoke(
        io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<Resp> responseObserver) {
      switch (methodId) {
        default:
          throw new AssertionError();
      }
    }
  }

  public static final io.grpc.ServerServiceDefinition bindService(AsyncService service) {
    return io.grpc.ServerServiceDefinition.builder(getServiceDescriptor())
        .addMethod(
          getSayMethod(),
          io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.asyncUnaryCall(
            new MethodHandlers<
              demo.echo.EchoRequest,
              demo.echo.EchoReply>(
                service, METHODID_SAY)))
        .addMethod(
          getStreamMethod(),
          io.grpc.stub.ServerCalls.asyncServerStreamingCall(
            new MethodHandlers<
              demo.echo.EchoData,
              demo.echo.EchoData>(
                service, METHODID_STREAM)))
        .build();
  }

  private static abstract class EchoBaseDescriptorSupplier
      implements io.grpc.protobuf.ProtoFileDescriptorSupplier, io.grpc.protobuf.ProtoServiceDescriptorSupplier {
    EchoBaseDescriptorSupplier() {}

    @java.lang.Override
    public com.google.protobuf.Descriptors.FileDescriptor getFileDescriptor() {
      return demo.echo.EchoProto.getDescriptor();
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    public com.google.protobuf.Descriptors.ServiceDescriptor getServiceDescriptor() {
      return getFileDescriptor().findServiceByName("Echo");
    }
  }

  private static final class EchoFileDescriptorSupplier
      extends EchoBaseDescriptorSupplier {
    EchoFileDescriptorSupplier() {}
  }

  private static final class EchoMethodDescriptorSupplier
      extends EchoBaseDescriptorSupplier
      implements io.grpc.protobuf.ProtoMethodDescriptorSupplier {
    private final java.lang.String methodName;

    EchoMethodDescriptorSupplier(java.lang.String methodName) {
      this.methodName = methodName;
    }

    @java.lang.Override
    public com.google.protobuf.Descriptors.MethodDescriptor getMethodDescriptor() {
      return getServiceDescriptor().findMethodByName(methodName);
    }
  }

  private static volatile io.grpc.ServiceDescriptor serviceDescriptor;

  public static io.grpc.ServiceDescriptor getServiceDescriptor() {
    io.grpc.ServiceDescriptor result = serviceDescriptor;
    if (result == null) {
      synchronized (EchoGrpc.class) {
        result = serviceDescriptor;
        if (result == null) {
          serviceDescriptor = result = io.grpc.ServiceDescriptor.newBuilder(SERVICE_NAME)
              .setSchemaDescriptor(new EchoFileDescriptorSupplier())
              .addMethod(getSayMethod())
              .addMethod(getStreamMethod())
              .build();
        }
      }
    }
    return result;
  }
}

      if (!(ref instanceof java.lang.String)) {
        com.google.protobuf.ByteString bs =
            (com.google.protobuf.ByteString) ref;
        java.lang.String s = bs.toStringUtf8();
        username_ = s;
        return s;
      } else {
        return (java.lang.String) ref;
      }
    }
    /**
     * <code>string username = 2;</code>
     * @return The bytes for username.
     */
    public com.google.protobuf.ByteString
        getUsernameBytes() {
      java.lang.Object ref = username_;
      if (ref instanceof String) {
        com.google.protobuf.ByteString b = 
            com.google.protobuf.ByteString.copyFromUtf8(
                (java.lang.String) ref);
        username_ = b;
        return b;
      } else {
        return (com.google.protobuf.ByteString) ref;
      }
    }
    /**
     * <code>string username = 2;</code>
     * @param value The username to set.
     * @return This builder for chaining.
     */
    public Builder setUsername(
        java.lang.String value) {
      if (value == null) { throw new NullPointerException(); }
      username_ = value;
      bitField0_ |= 0x00000002;
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }
    /**
     * <code>string username = 2;</code>
     * @return This builder for chaining.
     */
    public Builder clearUsername() {
      username_ = getDefaultInstance().getUsername();
      bitField0_ = (bitField0_ & ~0x00000002);
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }
    /**
     * <code>string username = 2;</code>
     * @param value The bytes for username to set.
     * @return This builder for chaining.
     */
    public Builder setUsernameBytes(
        com.google.protobuf.ByteString value) {
      if (value == null) { throw new NullPointerException(); }
      checkByteStringIsUtf8(value);
      username_ = value;
      bitField0_ |= 0x00000002;
      onChanged();
      return this;
    }

    // @@protoc_insertion_point(builder_scope:demo.echo.EchoRequest)
  }

  // @@protoc_insertion_point(class_scope:demo.echo.EchoRequest)
  private static final demo.echo.EchoRequest DEFAULT_INSTANCE;
  static {
    DEFAULT_INSTANCE = new demo.echo.EchoRequest();
  }

  public static demo.echo.EchoRequest getDefaultInstance() {
    return DEFAULT_INSTANCE;
  }

  private static final com.google.protobuf.Parser<EchoRequest>
      PARSER = new com.google.protobuf.AbstractParser<EchoRequest>() {
    @java.lang.Override
    public EchoRequest parsePartialFrom(
        com.google.protobuf.CodedInputStream input,
        com.google.protobuf.ExtensionRegistryLite extensionRegistry)
        throws com.google.protobuf.InvalidProtocolBufferException {
      Builder builder = newBuilder();
      try {
        builder.mergeFrom(input, extensionRegistry);
      } catch (com.google.protobuf.InvalidProtocolBufferException e) {
        throw e.setUnfinishedMessage(builder.buildPartial());
      } catch (com.google.protobuf.UninitializedMessageException e) {
        throw e.asInvalidProtocolBufferException().setUnfinishedMessage(builder.buildPartial());
      } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
        throw new com.google.protobuf.InvalidProtocolBufferException(e)
            .setUnfinishedMessage(builder.buildPartial());
      }
      return builder.buildPartial();
    }
  };

  public static com.google.protobuf.Parser<EchoRequest> parser() {
    return PARSER;
  }

  @java.lang.Override
  public com.google.protobuf.Parser<EchoRequest> getParserForType() {
    return PARSER;
  }

  @java.lang.Override
  public demo.echo.EchoRequest getDefaultInstanceForType() {
    return DEFAULT_INSTANCE;
  }

}

package demo.echo;

// Generated by the protocol buffer compiler.  DO NOT EDIT!
// NO CHECKED-IN PROTOBUF GENCODE
// source: echo.proto
// Protobuf Java Version: 4.30.2


public interface EchoRequestOrBuilder extends
    // @@protoc_insertion_point(interface_extends:demo.echo.EchoRequest)
    com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder {

  /**
   * <code>string msg = 1;</code>
   * @return The msg.
   */
  java.lang.String getMsg();
  /**
   * <code>string msg = 1;</code>
   * @return The bytes for msg.

      getMsgBytes();

org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/LabSql.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab;

import java.util.Objects;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.dataset.DatasetId;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class LabSql {
  public static final String DEFAULT_GROUP = "lab";
  public static final String DEFAULT_NAMESPACE = "default";

  private LabSql() {}

  public static String canonicalDatasetId(String tableName) {
    return DatasetId.of(DEFAULT_GROUP, DEFAULT_NAMESPACE, Strings.requireNonBlank(tableName, "tableName"))
        .toString();
  }

  public static String canonicalDatasetId(String group, String namespace, String tableName) {
    return DatasetId.of(
            Strings.requireNonBlank(group, "group"),
            Strings.requireNonBlank(namespace, "namespace"),
            Strings.requireNonBlank(tableName, "tableName"))
        .toString();
  }

  public static String table(String tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId) {
    DatasetId datasetId = resolveDatasetId(tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId);
    return quoteIdentifier(datasetId.namespace()) + "." + quoteIdentifier(datasetId.name());
  }

  public static String tableFromCanonicalDatasetId(String canonicalDatasetId) {
    DatasetId datasetId =
        DatasetId.parse(Strings.requireNonBlank(canonicalDatasetId, "canonicalDatasetId"));
    return quoteIdentifier(datasetId.namespace()) + "." + quoteIdentifier(datasetId.name());
  }

  public static String selectAll(String tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId) {
    return "select * from " + table(tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId);
  }

  public static String selectAllFromCanonicalDatasetId(String canonicalDatasetId) {
    return "select * from " + tableFromCanonicalDatasetId(canonicalDatasetId);
  }

  public static Schema getSchema(TabularManager tabularManager, String tableName) {
    Objects.requireNonNull(tabularManager, "tabularManager");
    return tabularManager.getSchema(resolveDatasetId(tableName));
  }

  public static Schema getSchemaFromCanonicalDatasetId(
      TabularManager tabularManager, String canonicalDatasetId) {
    Objects.requireNonNull(tabularManager, "tabularManager");
    return tabularManager.getSchema(
        DatasetId.parse(Strings.requireNonBlank(canonicalDatasetId, "canonicalDatasetId")));
  }

  public static TabularStreamSubscription subscribeDataset(
      TabularManager tabularManager, String tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId, TabularStreamOptions options) {
    Objects.requireNonNull(tabularManager, "tabularManager");
    return tabularManager.subscribeDataset(resolveDatasetId(tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId), options);
  }

  public static TabularStreamSubscription subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(
      TabularManager tabularManager, String canonicalDatasetId, TabularStreamOptions options) {
    Objects.requireNonNull(tabularManager, "tabularManager");
    return tabularManager.subscribeDataset(
        DatasetId.parse(Strings.requireNonBlank(canonicalDatasetId, "canonicalDatasetId")), options);
  }

  private static DatasetId resolveDatasetId(String tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId) {
    String value =
        Strings.requireNonBlank(tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId, "tableNameOrCanonicalDatasetId");
    if (value.indexOf('.') >= 0) {
      return DatasetId.parse(value);
    }
    return DatasetId.of(DEFAULT_GROUP, DEFAULT_NAMESPACE, value);
  }

  private static String quoteIdentifier(String identifier) {
    return "\"" + identifier.replace("\"", "\"\"") + "\"";
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/LabUtil.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab;

import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;

public class LabUtil {

  public static void sleepRespectingInterrupt(long millis) throws InterruptedException {
    try {
      Thread.sleep(millis);
    } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      throw ex;
    }
  }

  public static void closeSessionGracefully(Fabric.Session session) {
    if (session == null) {
      return;
    }
    try {
      session.close();
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      ex.printStackTrace();
    }
  }

  public static void waitForever() throws InterruptedException {
    new CountDownLatch(1).await();
  }

  public static void waitForseconds(int seconds) throws InterruptedException {
    waitForSeconds(seconds);
  }

  public static void waitForSeconds(int seconds) throws InterruptedException {
    if (seconds < 0) {
      throw new IllegalArgumentException("seconds must be >= 0");
    }
    sleepRespectingInterrupt(seconds * 1000L);
  }

}

org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/ClientAlgoConfig.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

public record ClientAlgoConfig(App app, Execution execution, Risk risk) {
  public record App(String appName, String region, String group, String configName, String layerId) {}

  public record Execution(String algoName, Integer maxChildOrdersPerMin, String participationMode) {}

  public record Risk(Boolean killSwitchEnabled, Long maxNotionalUsd) {}
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/ConfigDecoderTransformerDemo.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigDecoder;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager;

public final class ConfigDecoderTransformerDemo {
  private ConfigDecoderTransformerDemo() {}

  public static Map<String, Object> resolveGroupedMap(
      ConfigManager configs, String configId, String layerId) {
    return configs.resolve(configId, layerId, ConfigDecoder.asMap());
  }

  public static ClientAlgoConfig resolveClientSchema(
      ConfigManager configs, String configId, String layerId) {
    return configs.resolve(
        configId,
        layerId,
        ConfigDecoder.asTransformed(
            ClientAlgoConfig.class, new FabricToClientAlgoConfigTransformer()));
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/FabricToClientAlgoConfigTransformer.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigDecoder;

public final class FabricToClientAlgoConfigTransformer
    implements ConfigDecoder.Transformer<ClientAlgoConfig> {

  @Override
  public ClientAlgoConfig transform(JsonNode groupedPayload) {
    JsonNode fabric = groupedPayload == null ? null : groupedPayload.path("fabric");
    JsonNode groupedConfig = groupedPayload == null ? null : groupedPayload.path("config");

    JsonNode execution = groupedConfig == null ? null : groupedConfig.path("execution");
    JsonNode risk = groupedConfig == null ? null : groupedConfig.path("risk");

    ClientAlgoConfig.App app =
        new ClientAlgoConfig.App(
            readText(fabric, "appName"),
            readText(fabric, "region"),
            readText(fabric, "group"),
            readText(fabric, "configName"),
            readText(fabric, "layerId"));
    ClientAlgoConfig.Execution executionConfig =
        new ClientAlgoConfig.Execution(
            readText(execution, "algoName"),
            readInt(execution, "maxChildOrdersPerMin"),
            readText(execution, "participationMode"));
    ClientAlgoConfig.Risk riskConfig =
        new ClientAlgoConfig.Risk(
            readBoolean(risk, "killSwitchEnabled"), readLong(risk, "maxNotionalUsd"));
    return new ClientAlgoConfig(app, executionConfig, riskConfig);
  }

  private static String readText(JsonNode node, String key) {
    if (node == null) {
      return null;
    }
    JsonNode value = node.get(key);
    return value == null || value.isNull() ? null : value.asText();
  }

  private static Integer readInt(JsonNode node, String key) {
    if (node == null) {
      return null;
    }
    JsonNode value = node.get(key);
    return value == null || value.isNull() ? null : value.asInt();
  }

  private static Long readLong(JsonNode node, String key) {
    if (node == null) {
      return null;
    }
    JsonNode value = node.get(key);
    return value == null || value.isNull() ? null : value.asLong();
  }

  private static Boolean readBoolean(JsonNode node, String key) {
    if (node == null) {
      return null;
    }
    JsonNode value = node.get(key);
    return value == null || value.isNull() ? null : value.asBoolean();
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfig.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigDecoder;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfig {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfig.class);

  private LabConfig() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withInstance("bob")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();

      Map<String, Object> vwap =
          session
              .configs()
              .resolve("vwap", "algo017", ConfigDecoder.asMap());
      LOGGER.info("vwap = {}", vwap);

      LabUtil.waitForSeconds(10);

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigAdmin.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigDecoder;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigAdmin;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigAdmin.UpdateResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigLineage;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigAdmin {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigAdmin.class);
  private static final ObjectMapper MAPPER = new ObjectMapper();
  private static final String CONFIG_ID = "vwap";
  private static final String LAYER_ID = "algo017";

  private LabConfigAdmin() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
                              .build();
    try {
      session.start();

      Map<String, Object> current =
          session
              .configs()
              .resolve(CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID, ConfigDecoder.asMap());
      LOGGER.info("Current {} snapshot: {}", CONFIG_ID, current);
      ConfigLineage lineage = session.configs().lineage(CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID);
      LOGGER.info(
          "Current {} lineage: chainValid={} chainDepth={} baseConfigId={} payloadHash={} effectiveTreeHash={} resolvedNodeIds={}",
          CONFIG_ID,
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.chainValid(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.chainDepth(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.baseConfigId(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.payloadHash(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.effectiveTreeHash(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.resolvedNodeIds());

      AtomicInteger  callbackCount                  = new AtomicInteger(0);
      AtomicBoolean  waitingForPostPublishCallback  = new AtomicBoolean(false);
      CountDownLatch postPublishCallback            = new CountDownLatch(1);

      try (ConfigSubscription subscription =
          session.configs().subscribe(
              CONFIG_ID,
              LAYER_ID,
              update -> {
                int seen = callbackCount.incrementAndGet();
                LOGGER.info("vwap(subscribe): callback#{} layerId={} updatedTimeUtc={} configUuid={}", seen, update.layerId(), update.updatedTimeUtc(), update.configUuid());
                if (waitingForPostPublishCallback.get()) {
                  postPublishCallback.countDown();
                }
              })) {
        LOGGER.info("Subscribed to {}/{}. Waiting 3s before proposing an update...", CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID);
        LabUtil.sleepRespectingInterrupt(3_000L);

        ConfigAdmin admin = session.configs().admin();

        ObjectNode  payload             = MAPPER.createObjectNode();
        ObjectNode  execution           = payload.putObject("execution");
        int         newMinChildSliceQty = (int) (Instant.now().getEpochSecond() % 10_000L);
        execution.put("minChildSliceQty", newMinChildSliceQty);

        Instant                   effectiveTimeUtc  = null;
        Instant                   expiresAtUtc      = null;
        boolean                   approvalRequired  = true;
        ConfigAdmin.UpdateRequest updateRequest     = new ConfigAdmin.UpdateRequest(
                                                        CONFIG_ID,
                                                        LAYER_ID,
                                                        payload,
                                                        approvalRequired,
                                                        ConfigAdmin.ChangeMode.IMMEDIATE,
                                                        effectiveTimeUtc,
                                                        expiresAtUtc,
                                                        "Lab propose update",
                                                        "lab-config-admin");

        ConfigAdmin.UpdateResult proposed = admin.update(updateRequest);

        LOGGER.info("Proposed update for {}/{}: status={} state={} minChildSliceQty={}", CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID, proposed.status(), proposed.workflow() == null ? null : proposed.workflow().state(), newMinChildSliceQty);
        LOGGER.info("Waiting 3s before approveAndPublish...");
        LabUtil.sleepRespectingInterrupt(3_000L);

        waitingForPostPublishCallback.set(true);
        ConfigAdmin.WorkflowStatus approved = admin.approveAndPublish(
                CONFIG_ID,
                LAYER_ID,
                "Lab approve and publish update",
                "lab-config-admin");

        LOGGER.info("Approve+publish result for {}/{}: state={} updatedTimeUtc={}", CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID, approved == null ? null : approved.state(), approved == null ? null : approved.updatedTimeUtc());

        LOGGER.info("Waiting up to 15s for post-publish callback...");
        boolean callbackObserved = postPublishCallback.await(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        LOGGER.info("Post-publish callback observed={}", callbackObserved);

      }

    } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      LOGGER.info("Interrupted; shutting down.");
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
      throw ex;
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
    System.out.print("done");
  }

}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigCode.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigCodegen;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigCode {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigCode.class);

  private LabConfigCode() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withInstance("bob")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();

      ConfigCodegen code =
          session
              .configs()
              .generate("vwap", ConfigManager.Language.JAVA, "com.foo.configs");
      for (String klass : code.autogenCode()) {
        LOGGER.info(klass);
      }

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigMetadata.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigManager.ConfigLineage;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigMetadata {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigMetadata.class);

  private LabConfigMetadata() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();

      ConfigLineage lineage = session.configs().lineage("vwap", "algo017");
      LOGGER.info(
          "vwap(lineage) chainValid={} chainDepth={} baseConfigId={} payloadHash={} effectiveTreeHash={} resolvedNodeIds={}",
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.chainValid(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.chainDepth(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.baseConfigId(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.payloadHash(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.effectiveTreeHash(),
          lineage == null ? null : lineage.resolvedNodeIds());
      
    } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      LOGGER.info("Interrupted; shutting down.");
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
      throw ex;
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
    System.out.print("done");
  }

}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigSubscribe.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigSubscribe {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigSubscribe.class);

  private LabConfigSubscribe() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();

      session.configs().subscribe(
            "vwap",
            "algo017",
            update -> LOGGER.info("vwap: {}}", update));
            
      LabUtil.waitForever();
    
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
    
  }

}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigTemplate.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.configs.ConfigDecoder;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigTemplate {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigTemplate.class);
  private static final String CONFIG_ID = "vwap";
  private static final String LAYER_ID = "algo017";

  private LabConfigTemplate() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .build();
    try {
      session.start();

      Map<String, Object> snapshot =
          session
              .configs()
              .resolve(CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID, ConfigDecoder.asMap());
      LOGGER.info("{} snapshot = {}", CONFIG_ID, snapshot);

      String template =
          """
          VWAP Template Demo
          config={{fabric.configName | default('xxvwap')}}
          layer={{fabric.layerId}}
          minChildSliceQty={{minChildSliceQty | default('unset')}}
          """;
      String rendered =
          session.configs().resolve(CONFIG_ID, LAYER_ID, ConfigDecoder.asTemplate(template));
      LOGGER.info("Rendered template:\n{}", rendered);
      
    } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      LOGGER.info("Interrupted; shutting down.");
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during template demo", ex);
      throw ex;
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
    System.out.print("done");
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/configs/LabConfigTransform.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.configs;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConfigTransform {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConfigTransform.class);

  private LabConfigTransform() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .build();
    try {
      session.start();

      Map<String, Object> grouped =
          ConfigDecoderTransformerDemo.resolveGroupedMap(session.configs(), "vwap", "algo017");
      LOGGER.info("grouped vwap = {}", grouped);

      ClientAlgoConfig transformed =
          ConfigDecoderTransformerDemo.resolveClientSchema(session.configs(), "vwap", "algo017");
      LOGGER.info("transformed vwap = {}", transformed);

      LabUtil.waitForSeconds(10);
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during transformer demo run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
  }
}

org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.connectors.s3

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/connectors/s3/LabS3.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.connectors.s3;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3Connection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3ListRequest;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3ListResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3ObjectSummary;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.definitions.DefinitionConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.session.SessionImpl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabS3 {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabS3.class);

  private LabS3() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {

    /*
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKekFile(Path.of("vault/keks/lab/lab.kek"))
                              .build();
    */

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("platform")
                              .withName("studio")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosUsername("dfabric")
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dfabric.keytab"))
                              .withKekFile(Path.of("vault/keks/platform/dfabric.kek"))
                              .build();

    try {
      session.start();
      S3Connection s3 = session.connections().s3("s3-fabric");
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabS3] connected name={} bucket={} basePrefix={} bucketUri={}",
          s3.name(),
          s3.bucket(),
          s3.basePrefix(),
          s3.bucketUri());

      List<String> folders = s3.listFolders(null);
      LOGGER.info("[LabS3] listFolders path=/ count={}", folders.size());
      folders.forEach(folder -> LOGGER.info("[LabS3] folder={}", folder));

      List<S3ObjectSummary> objects = s3.listObjects("fabric", true);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabS3] listObjects path=fabric recursive=true objectCount={}",
          objects.size());
      objects.stream()
          .limit(10)
          .forEach(
              object ->
                  LOGGER.info(
                      "[LabS3] object key={} sizeBytes={} lastModified={}",
                      object.key(),
                      object.sizeBytes(),
                      object.lastModified()));

      S3ListResult adminListed =
          s3.admin().listObjects(
              S3ListRequest.builder().withPrefix("fabric/").withDelimiter("/").withMaxKeys(1000).build());
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabS3][admin] listObjects path=fabric/ objectCount={} commonPrefixCount={}",
          adminListed.objects().size(),
          adminListed.commonPrefixes().size());

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("[LabS3] failed message={}", ex.getMessage(), ex);
      throw ex;
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
    LOGGER.info("[LabS3] done");
  }

}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.amps

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/amps/LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory {

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-nvfix";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/marketdata/nvfix";
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "marketdata_amps_memory";
  private static final String TABLE_NAME = "marketdata_amps_memory";

  private static final int SAMPLE_TARGET = 50;
  private static final long SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS = 30_000L;
  private static final long HEARTBEAT_MILLIS = 2_000L;

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory.class);

  private LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                  .withGroup("lab")
                                  .withName("client")
                                  .withInstance("ingest-md-amps")
                                  .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                  .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                                  .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                                  .build()) {
      session.start();
      IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();

      int sampledMessages = 0;
      if (!ingest.exists(INGEST_NAME)) {
        SchemaSampleOptions sampleOptions =
            SchemaSampleOptions.forAmps(CONNECTION_NAME, TOPIC, IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                .withAmpsSow(true)
                .withAmpsWaitMillis(SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS)
                .withMaxSamples(SAMPLE_TARGET)
                .withMaxBytes(SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES);
        SchemaModel sampledSchema = ingest.admin().sampleSchemaFromAmps(sampleOptions);

        ingest.admin().register(
            IngestModel.builder()
                .withName(INGEST_NAME)
                .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
                .withSchema(sampledSchema)
                .withSourceAmps(
                    source ->
                        source
                            .withFormat(IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                            .withConnectionName(CONNECTION_NAME)
                            .withTopic(TOPIC)
                            .withSowSubscribe(true)
                            .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                            .withOofHandling(IngestSourceAmpsModel.OofHandling.DELETE_EVENT))
                .withTargetDuckDbActive(
                    target ->
                        target
                            .withTableName(TABLE_NAME)
                            .addPrimaryKey("symbol")
                            .addPrimaryKey("side")
                            .withMemory(true)
                            .withPersistOnStop(false)
                            .withCreateIfMissing(true))
                .build());
        sampledMessages = sampleOptions.maxSamples();
      }

      IngestRuntime runtime = ingest.start(INGEST_NAME);
      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(TABLE_NAME);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory] ingest={} sampledMessages={} status={}",
          INGEST_NAME,
          sampledMessages,
          runtime.status());

      while (true) {
        Thread.sleep(HEARTBEAT_MILLIS);
        RowResult rows = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 20));
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestMemory] status={} queryCount={} currentRows={} firstRow={}",
            runtime.status(),
            runtime.queryCount(),
            rows.rows().size(),
            rows.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : rows.rows().get(0));
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/amps/LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet {

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-nvfix";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/marketdata/nvfix";
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "marketdata_amps_parquet";
  private static final Path PARQUET_PATH = Path.of("data", "marketdata");

  private static final int SAMPLE_TARGET = 50;
  private static final long SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS = 30_000L;
  private static final long HEARTBEAT_MILLIS = 5_000L;

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet.class);

  private LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                    .withGroup("lab")
                                    .withName("client")
                                    .withInstance("ingest-md-parq")
                                    .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                    .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                                    .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                                  .build()) {
      session.start();
      IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();

      int sampledMessages = 0;
      if (!ingest.exists(INGEST_NAME)) {
        SchemaSampleOptions sampleOptions = SchemaSampleOptions.forAmps(CONNECTION_NAME, TOPIC, IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                                                .withAmpsSow(true)
                                                .withAmpsWaitMillis(SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS)
                                                .withMaxSamples(SAMPLE_TARGET)
                                                .withMaxBytes(SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES);
        SchemaModel schema = ingest.admin().sampleSchemaFromAmps(sampleOptions);

        ingest.admin().register(
            IngestModel.builder()
                .withName(INGEST_NAME)
                .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
                .withSchema(schema)
                .withSourceAmps(
                    source ->
                        source
                            .withFormat(IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                            .withConnectionName(CONNECTION_NAME)
                            .withTopic(TOPIC)
                            .withSowSubscribe(true)
                            .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                            .withOptions("oof"))
                .withTargetParquet(
                    target ->
                        target
                            .withParquetPath(PARQUET_PATH.toString())
                            .withHivePartitioning(true)
                            .withPartitionKey("date")
                            .withPartitionValueField("event_date"))
                .build());
        sampledMessages = sampleOptions.maxSamples();
      }

      IngestRuntime runtime =
          ingest.start(
              INGEST_NAME,
              IngestManager.IngestRuntimeOptions.builder()
                  .withParquetRollPolicy(10, 1500L)
                  .build());
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet] ingest={} parquetPath={} sampledMessages={} status={}",
          INGEST_NAME,
          PARQUET_PATH,
          sampledMessages,
          runtime.status());

      while (true) {
        Thread.sleep(HEARTBEAT_MILLIS);
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquet] ingest={} status={} queryCount={}",
            INGEST_NAME, runtime.status(), runtime.queryCount());
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/amps/LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.agent.IngestAgent;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent {

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-nvfix";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/marketdata/nvfix";
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "marketdata_amps_parquet";
  private static final Path PARQUET_PATH = Path.of("data", "marketdata");

  private static final int SAMPLE_TARGET = 50;
  private static final long SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS = 30_000L;
  private static final long HEARTBEAT_MILLIS = 5_000L;

  private static final Logger LOGGER =
      LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent.class);

  private LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("client")
                .withInstance("ingest-md-parq-agent")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                .build()) {
      session.start();
      
      IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();

      int sampledMessages = 0;
      if (!ingest.exists(INGEST_NAME)) {
        SchemaSampleOptions sampleOptions =
            SchemaSampleOptions.forAmps(CONNECTION_NAME, TOPIC, IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                .withAmpsSow(true)
                .withAmpsWaitMillis(SAMPLE_WAIT_MILLIS)
                .withMaxSamples(SAMPLE_TARGET)
                .withMaxBytes(SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES);
        SchemaModel schema = ingest.admin().sampleSchemaFromAmps(sampleOptions);

        ingest.admin()
            .register(
                IngestModel.builder()
                    .withName(INGEST_NAME)
                    .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
                    .withSchema(schema)
                    .withSourceAmps(
                        source ->
                            source
                                .withFormat(IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                                .withConnectionName(CONNECTION_NAME)
                                .withTopic(TOPIC)
                                .withSowSubscribe(true)
                                .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                                .withOptions("oof"))
                    .withTargetParquet(
                        target ->
                            target
                                .withParquetPath(PARQUET_PATH.toString())
                                .withHivePartitioning(true)
                                .withPartitionKey("date")
                                .withPartitionValueField("event_date"))
                    .build());
        sampledMessages = sampleOptions.maxSamples();
      }

      try (IngestAgent agent =
          ingest.agent(
              IngestAgent.builder()
                  .withIngestAllowlist(List.of(INGEST_NAME))
                  .withIngestRuntimeOptions(
                      IngestManager.IngestRuntimeOptions.builder()
                          .withParquetRollPolicy(10, 1500L)
                          .build()))) {
        agent.start();

        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent] ingest={} parquetPath={} sampledMessages={} agentStarted={}",
            INGEST_NAME,
            PARQUET_PATH,
            sampledMessages,
            agent.started());

        while (true) {
          Thread.sleep(HEARTBEAT_MILLIS);
          LOGGER.info(
              "[LabMarketDataAmpsIngestParquetAgent] ingest={} agentStarted={}",
              INGEST_NAME,
              agent.started());
        }
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/amps/LabMarketDataAmpsPublisher.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabMarketDataAmpsPublisher {

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-nvfix";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/marketdata/nvfix";
  private static final List<String> SYMBOLS = List.of("AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA");
  private static final List<String> SIDES = List.of("BUY", "SELL");
  private static final long PUBLISH_INTERVAL_MILLIS = 1_000L;

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabMarketDataAmpsPublisher.class);

  private LabMarketDataAmpsPublisher() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                  .withGroup("lab")
                                  .withName("client")
                                  .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                  .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                                  .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                                  .build()) {
      session.start();
      try (AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION_NAME)) {
        Map<String, Double> midPrices = new LinkedHashMap<>();
        midPrices.put("AAPL", 212.15d);
        midPrices.put("MSFT", 468.40d);
        midPrices.put("NVDA", 1197.85d);
        midPrices.put("TSLA", 289.55d);
        long sequence = 0L;

        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabMarketDataAmpsPublisher] started connection={} topic={} sohCode={}",
            CONNECTION_NAME,
            TOPIC,
            (int) AmpsConnection.SOH);

        while (true) {
          for (String symbol : SYMBOLS) {
            double previousMid = midPrices.getOrDefault(symbol, 100.0d);
            double drift = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(-0.40d, 0.40d);
            double mid = Math.max(0.01d, previousMid + drift);
            double spread = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(0.01d, 0.06d);
            double bid = round4(mid - (spread / 2.0d));
            double ask = round4(mid + (spread / 2.0d));
            double last = round4(mid + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextDouble(-0.03d, 0.03d));
            long size = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextLong(100L, 5_000L);

            midPrices.put(symbol, mid);
            for (String side : SIDES) {
              Map<String, Object> event = new LinkedHashMap<>();
              event.put("symbol", symbol);
              event.put("bid", bid);
              event.put("ask", ask);
              event.put("last", last);
              event.put("size", size);
              event.put("side", side);
              event.put("venue", "XNAS");
              event.put("sequence", sequence++);
              event.put("event_time", Instant.now().toString());
              event.put("event_date", LocalDate.now().toString());
              amps.publish(TOPIC, event);
              LOGGER.info(">>> " + TOPIC + " -> " + event);
            }
          }
          Thread.sleep(PUBLISH_INTERVAL_MILLIS);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  private static double round4(double value) {
    return Math.round(value * 10_000d) / 10_000d;
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiDashboardStreams.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.streams.Stream;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.Map;

public final class LabIngestApiDashboardStreams {
  private static final String ORDERS_STREAM_ID = "stream:lab/default/orders_stream";
  private static final String POSITIONS_STREAM_ID = "stream:lab/default/positions_stream";
  private static final String[] DESKS = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "DESK3"};
  private static final String[] SYMBOLS = {"AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA"};
  private static final String[] SIDES = {"BUY", "SELL"};
  private static final String[] STATUSES = {"OPEN", "PARTIAL", "FILLED", "CANCELLED", "REJECTED"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    int messageCount = 200;
    if (args != null && args.length > 0) {
      try {
        messageCount = Math.max(1, Integer.parseInt(args[0]));
      } catch (NumberFormatException ignore) {
        messageCount = 200;
      }
    }

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      try (Stream orders = session.streams().start(ORDERS_STREAM_ID);
          Stream positions = session.streams().start(POSITIONS_STREAM_ID)) {
        for (int i = 0; i < messageCount; i++) {
          String desk = DESKS[i % DESKS.length];
          String symbol = SYMBOLS[i % SYMBOLS.length];
          String side = SIDES[i % SIDES.length];
          String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
          Instant now = Instant.now();
          orders.publish(
              Map.ofEntries(
                  Map.entry("order_id", "ORD-LIVE-" + i),
                  Map.entry("account_id", "ACCT-" + (2000 + i)),
                  Map.entry("counterparty_id", "CP-" + String.format("%04d", (i % 12) + 1)),
                  Map.entry("instrument_id", "ISIN" + String.format("%010d", (i % 24) + 1)),
                  Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                  Map.entry("desk", desk),
                  Map.entry("trading_region", i % 2 == 0 ? "AMER" : "EMEA"),
                  Map.entry("order_type", i % 2 == 0 ? "LIMIT" : "MARKET"),
                  Map.entry("side", side),
                  Map.entry("quantity", 10 + i),
                  Map.entry("price", 100.0 + i),
                  Map.entry("status", status),
                  Map.entry("created_at", now.toString()),
                  Map.entry("updated_at", now.toString())));

          positions.publish(
              Map.ofEntries(
                  Map.entry("position_id", "POS-LIVE-" + i),
                  Map.entry("account_id", "ACCT-" + (3000 + i)),
                  Map.entry("counterparty_id", "CP-" + String.format("%04d", (i % 12) + 1)),
                  Map.entry("desk", desk),
                  Map.entry("strategy", i % 2 == 0 ? "FLOW" : "MACRO"),
                  Map.entry("region", i % 2 == 0 ? "AMER" : "APAC"),
                  Map.entry("book", desk + "-BOOK"),
                  Map.entry("instrument_id", "ISIN" + String.format("%010d", (i % 24) + 1)),
                  Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                  Map.entry("side", side),
                  Map.entry("quantity", 1000.0 + i),
                  Map.entry("average_price", 20.0 + (i * 0.1)),
                  Map.entry("market_value", 20000.0 + (i * 50.0)),
                  Map.entry("pnl", (i % 20 - 10) * 25.0),
                  Map.entry("as_of_date", "2026-03-20")));
          Thread.sleep(250L);
        }
      }
      System.out.println("PASS");
    } catch (Throwable error) {
      String message = error.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = error.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      System.out.println("FAIL: " + message);
      throw new IllegalStateException(message, error);
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiParquetCounterparties.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiParquetCounterparties {
  private static final int COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE = 12;
  private static final String[] REGIONS = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC", "LATAM"};
  private static final String[] CLASSIFICATIONS = {
    "HEDGE_FUND", "BANK", "BROKER", "ASSET_MANAGER", "INSURANCE", "GOVERNMENT"
  };
  private static final String[] DESKS = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "DESK3"};
  private static final String[] NOTES = {
    "Periodic review complete",
    "Awaiting documents",
    "Auto-approved",
    "Pending credit review",
    "Enhanced monitoring"
  };
  private static final String[] LIMIT_GROUPS = {"LG-NA-01", "LG-NA-02", "LG-EU-01", "LG-AP-01", "LG-GLOBAL-99"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "counterparties";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("counterparty_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("region", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("risk_rating", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("active", SchemaModel.FieldType.BOOL, false)
                      .withField("classification", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("last_reviewed", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("updated_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("updated_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("contact_name", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("contact_email", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("notes", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
                      .withField("primary_limit_group", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("updated_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(ingestName, 100, 1500L);

      int appendedMessages = COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE;
      for (int i = 0; i < appendedMessages; i++) {
        String region = REGIONS[i % REGIONS.length];
        String classification = CLASSIFICATIONS[i % CLASSIFICATIONS.length];
        String desk = DESKS[i % DESKS.length];
        String note = NOTES[i % NOTES.length];
        String limitGroup = LIMIT_GROUPS[i % LIMIT_GROUPS.length];
        boolean active = i % 2 == 0;
        int riskRating = (i % 10) + 1;
        String name = "Contact " + i;
        String email = "contact." + i + "@example.com";
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i);
        if (i % 2 == 0) {
          session.data().direct().ingest().append(
              ingestName,
              new IngestPayloadJson(
                  "{"
                      + "\"counterparty_id\":\""
                      + counterpartyId
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"region\":\""
                      + region
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"risk_rating\":"
                      + riskRating
                      + ",\"active\":"
                      + active
                      + ",\"classification\":\""
                      + classification
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"desk\":\""
                      + desk
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"last_reviewed\":\"2026-02-20\""
                      + ",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-01T12:15:00Z\""
                      + ",\"updated_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                      + ",\"contact_name\":\""
                      + name
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"contact_email\":\""
                      + email
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"notes\":\""
                      + note
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"primary_limit_group\":\""
                      + limitGroup
                      + "\""
                      + "}\n"));
          continue;
        }
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("counterparty_id", counterpartyId),
                Map.entry("region", region),
                Map.entry("risk_rating", riskRating),
                Map.entry("active", active),
                Map.entry("classification", classification),
                Map.entry("desk", desk),
                Map.entry("last_reviewed", "2026-02-20"),
                Map.entry("updated_at", "2026-03-01T12:15:00Z"),
                Map.entry("updated_date", "2026-03-01"),
                Map.entry("contact_name", name),
                Map.entry("contact_email", email),
                Map.entry("notes", note),
                Map.entry("primary_limit_group", limitGroup)));
      }
      System.out.println("waitingForIdleRollMs=2500");
      Thread.sleep(2500L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      int rowCount = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=" + appendedMessages);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount == appendedMessages;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount == " + appendedMessages;
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static String counterpartyId(int index) {
    int value = (index % COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("CP-%04d", value);
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiParquetDesks.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiParquetDesks {
  private static final List<Map<String, String>> DESKS =
      List.of(
          Map.of("desk", "DESK1", "desk_name", "Equities Flow", "region", "AMER"),
          Map.of("desk", "DESK2", "desk_name", "Macro Trading", "region", "EMEA"),
          Map.of("desk", "DESK3", "desk_name", "Derivatives", "region", "APAC"));

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "desks";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("desk_name", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("region", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("active", SchemaModel.FieldType.BOOL, false)
                      .withField("updated_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("updated_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("updated_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(ingestName, 20, 1000L);

      for (int index = 0; index < DESKS.size(); index++) {
        Map<String, String> desk = DESKS.get(index);
        if (index % 2 == 0) {
          session.data().direct().ingest().append(
              ingestName,
              new IngestPayloadJson(
                  "{"
                      + "\"desk\":\""
                      + desk.get("desk")
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"desk_name\":\""
                      + desk.get("desk_name")
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"region\":\""
                      + desk.get("region")
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"active\":true"
                      + ",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-20T00:00:00Z\""
                      + ",\"updated_date\":\"2026-03-20\""
                      + "}\n"));
          continue;
        }
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("desk", desk.get("desk")),
                Map.entry("desk_name", desk.get("desk_name")),
                Map.entry("region", desk.get("region")),
                Map.entry("active", true),
                Map.entry("updated_at", "2026-03-20T00:00:00Z"),
                Map.entry("updated_date", "2026-03-20")));
      }
      Thread.sleep(2000L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      int rowCount = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount == DESKS.size();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount == " + DESKS.size();
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiParquetInstruments.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiParquetInstruments {
  private static final int INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE = 24;
  private static final String[] ASSET_CLASSES = {"EQUITY", "BOND", "FX", "COMMODITY", "DERIVATIVE", "ETF"};
  private static final String[] CURRENCIES = {"USD", "EUR", "GBP", "JPY", "CHF", "CAD"};
  private static final String[] ISSUERS = {
    "Apex Capital", "Summit Bank", "Nimbus Holdings", "Helios Energy", "Vertex Industries", "Atlas Finance"
  };
  private static final String[] STATUSES = {"ACTIVE", "SUSPENDED", "MATURING", "INACTIVE"};
  private static final String[] COUNTRIES = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC", "LATAM"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "instruments";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("instrument_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("symbol", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("asset_class", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("currency", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("issue_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("maturity_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("issuer", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("status", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("country", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("issue_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(ingestName, 100, 1500L);

      int appendedMessages = INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE;
      for (int i = 0; i < appendedMessages; i++) {
        String assetClass = ASSET_CLASSES[i % ASSET_CLASSES.length];
        String currency = CURRENCIES[i % CURRENCIES.length];
        String issuer = ISSUERS[i % ISSUERS.length];
        String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
        String country = COUNTRIES[i % COUNTRIES.length];
        double price = round(10.0 + (i * 0.75));
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i);
        String symbol = "SYM" + (i + 1);
        if (i % 2 == 0) {
          session.data().direct().ingest().append(
              ingestName,
              new IngestPayloadJson(
                  "{"
                      + "\"instrument_id\":\""
                      + instrumentId
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"symbol\":\""
                      + symbol
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"asset_class\":\""
                      + assetClass
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"currency\":\""
                      + currency
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"price\":"
                      + price
                      + ",\"issue_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                      + ",\"maturity_date\":\"2030-03-01\""
                      + ",\"issuer\":\""
                      + issuer
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"status\":\""
                      + status
                      + "\""
                      + ",\"country\":\""
