                      + country
                      + "\""
                      + "}\n"));
          continue;
        }
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("instrument_id", instrumentId),
                Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                Map.entry("asset_class", assetClass),
                Map.entry("currency", currency),
                Map.entry("price", price),
                Map.entry("issue_date", "2026-03-01"),
                Map.entry("maturity_date", "2030-03-01"),
                Map.entry("issuer", issuer),
                Map.entry("status", status),
                Map.entry("country", country)));
      }
      System.out.println("waitingForIdleRollMs=2500");
      Thread.sleep(2500L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      int rowCount = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=" + appendedMessages);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount == appendedMessages;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount == " + appendedMessages;
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static double round(double value) {
    return Math.round(value * 100.0) / 100.0;
  }

  private static String instrumentId(int index) {
    int value = (index % INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("ISIN%010d", value);
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiParquetOrders.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiParquetOrders {
  private static final int COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE = 12;
  private static final int INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE = 24;
  private static final String[] SYMBOLS = {"AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA"};
  private static final String[] ORDER_TYPES = {"MARKET", "LIMIT", "STOP", "IOC"};
  private static final String[] SIDES = {"BUY", "SELL"};
  private static final String[] STATUSES = {"OPEN", "PARTIAL", "FILLED", "CANCELLED", "REJECTED"};
  private static final String[] DESKS = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "DESK3"};
  private static final String[] TRADING_REGIONS = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "orders";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("counterparty_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("instrument_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("symbol", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("trading_region", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("order_type", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("side", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("quantity", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("status", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("created_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("created_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("updated_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("created_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(ingestName, 100, 1500L);

      int jsonMessages = 500;
      int mapMessages  = 500;
      int appendedMessages = jsonMessages + mapMessages;
      for (int i = 0; i < jsonMessages; i++) {
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i);
        String symbol = symbol(i);
        String desk = DESKS[i % DESKS.length];
        String tradingRegion = TRADING_REGIONS[i % TRADING_REGIONS.length];
        String orderType = ORDER_TYPES[i % ORDER_TYPES.length];
        String side = side(i);
        String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"order_id\":\"ORD-20260301-"
                    + i
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"account_id\":\"ACCT-"
                    + (2000 + i)
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"counterparty_id\":\""
                    + counterpartyId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"instrument_id\":\""
                    + instrumentId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"symbol\":\""
                    + symbol
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"desk\":\""
                    + desk
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"trading_region\":\""
                    + tradingRegion
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"order_type\":\""
                    + orderType
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"side\":\""
                    + side
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"quantity\":"
                    + (10 + i)
                    + ",\"price\":"
                    + (100.25 + i)
                    + ",\"status\":\""
                    + status
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"created_at\":\"2026-03-01T10:00:00Z\""
                    + ",\"created_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + ",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-01T10:30:00Z\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < mapMessages; i++) {
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i + jsonMessages);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i + jsonMessages);
        String symbol = symbol(i + jsonMessages);
        String desk = DESKS[(i + jsonMessages) % DESKS.length];
        String tradingRegion = TRADING_REGIONS[(i + jsonMessages) % TRADING_REGIONS.length];
        String orderType = ORDER_TYPES[i % ORDER_TYPES.length];
        String side = side(i + jsonMessages);
        String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("order_id", "ORD-20260301-MAP-" + i),
                Map.entry("account_id", "ACCT-" + (6000 + i)),
                Map.entry("counterparty_id", counterpartyId),
                Map.entry("instrument_id", instrumentId),
                Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                Map.entry("desk", desk),
                Map.entry("trading_region", tradingRegion),
                Map.entry("order_type", orderType),
                Map.entry("side", side),
                Map.entry("quantity", 50 + i),
                Map.entry("price", 250.75 + i),
                Map.entry("status", status),
                Map.entry("created_at", "2026-03-01T11:00:00Z"),
                Map.entry("created_date", "2026-03-01"),
                Map.entry("updated_at", "2026-03-01T11:30:00Z")));
      }
      System.out.println("waitingForIdleRollMs=2500");
      Thread.sleep(2500L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      int rowCount = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=" + appendedMessages);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount == appendedMessages;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount == " + appendedMessages;
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static String counterpartyId(int index) {
    int value = (index % COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("CP-%04d", value);
  }

  private static String instrumentId(int index) {
    int value = (index % INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("ISIN%010d", value);
  }

  private static String symbol(int index) {
    return SYMBOLS[index % SYMBOLS.length];
  }

  private static String side(int index) {
    return SIDES[(index / SYMBOLS.length) % SIDES.length];
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/api/LabIngestApiParquetPositions.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiParquetPositions {
  private static final int COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE = 12;
  private static final int INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE = 24;
  private static final String[] SYMBOLS = {"AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA"};
  private static final String[] SIDES = {"BUY", "SELL"};
  private static final String[] ACCOUNTS = {"ACCT-1001", "ACCT-2002", "ACCT-3003", "ACCT-4004", "ACCT-5005"};
  private static final String[] DESKS = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "DESK3"};
  private static final String[] BOOK_SUFFIXES = {"LDN", "NY", "SGP", "AMS", "TKO"};
  private static final String[] STRATEGIES = {"FLOW", "MACRO", "ARBITRAGE"};
  private static final String[] REGIONS = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "positions";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("position_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("counterparty_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("strategy", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("region", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("instrument_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("symbol", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("side", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("quantity", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("average_price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("market_value", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("pnl", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("sensitivity", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, true)
                      .withField("as_of_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("as_of_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(ingestName, 100, 1500L);

      int jsonMessages = 500;
      int mapMessages = 500;
      int appendedMessages = jsonMessages + mapMessages;
      for (int i = 0; i < jsonMessages; i++) {
        String account = ACCOUNTS[i % ACCOUNTS.length];
        String desk = DESKS[i % DESKS.length];
        String strategy = STRATEGIES[i % STRATEGIES.length];
        String region = REGIONS[i % REGIONS.length];
        String book = desk + "-" + BOOK_SUFFIXES[i % BOOK_SUFFIXES.length];
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i);
        String symbol = symbol(i);
        String side = side(i);
        double quantity = round(1000.0 + (i * 1.75));
        double averagePrice = round(10.0 + (i * 0.35));
        double marketValue = round(quantity * averagePrice);
        double pnl = round((i % 20 - 10) * 750.25);
        double sensitivity = round(quantity * 0.12);
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"position_id\":\"POS-20260301-"
                    + i
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"account_id\":\""
                    + account
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"counterparty_id\":\""
                    + counterpartyId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"desk\":\""
                    + desk
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"strategy\":\""
                    + strategy
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"region\":\""
                    + region
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"book\":\""
                    + book
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"instrument_id\":\""
                    + instrumentId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"symbol\":\""
                    + symbol
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"side\":\""
                    + side
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"quantity\":"
                    + quantity
                    + ",\"average_price\":"
                    + averagePrice
                    + ",\"market_value\":"
                    + marketValue
                    + ",\"pnl\":"
                    + pnl
                    + ",\"sensitivity\":"
                    + sensitivity
                    + ",\"as_of_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < mapMessages; i++) {
        String account = ACCOUNTS[i % ACCOUNTS.length];
        String desk = DESKS[(i + jsonMessages) % DESKS.length];
        String strategy = STRATEGIES[(i + jsonMessages) % STRATEGIES.length];
        String region = REGIONS[(i + jsonMessages) % REGIONS.length];
        String book = desk + "-" + BOOK_SUFFIXES[(i + jsonMessages) % BOOK_SUFFIXES.length];
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i + jsonMessages);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i + jsonMessages);
        String symbol = symbol(i + jsonMessages);
        String side = side(i + jsonMessages);
        double quantity = round(2000.0 + (i * 1.25));
        double averagePrice = round(20.0 + (i * 0.20));
        double marketValue = round(quantity * averagePrice);
        double pnl = round((i % 16 - 8) * 640.5);
        double sensitivity = round(quantity * 0.10);
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("position_id", "POS-20260301-MAP-" + i),
                Map.entry("account_id", account),
                Map.entry("counterparty_id", counterpartyId),
                Map.entry("desk", desk),
                Map.entry("strategy", strategy),
                Map.entry("region", region),
                Map.entry("book", book),
                Map.entry("instrument_id", instrumentId),
                Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                Map.entry("side", side),
                Map.entry("quantity", quantity),
                Map.entry("average_price", averagePrice),
                Map.entry("market_value", marketValue),
                Map.entry("pnl", pnl),
                Map.entry("sensitivity", sensitivity),
                Map.entry("as_of_date", "2026-03-01")));
      }
      System.out.println("waitingForIdleRollMs=2500");
      Thread.sleep(2500L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      int rowCount = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=" + appendedMessages);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount == appendedMessages;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount == " + appendedMessages;
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static double round(double value) {
    return Math.round(value * 100.0) / 100.0;
  }

  private static String counterpartyId(int index) {
    int value = (index % COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("CP-%04d", value);
  }

  private static String instrumentId(int index) {
    int value = (index % INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("ISIN%010d", value);
  }

  private static String symbol(int index) {
    return SYMBOLS[index % SYMBOLS.length];
  }

  private static String side(int index) {
    return SIDES[(index / SYMBOLS.length) % SIDES.length];
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.s3

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/ingest/s3/LabIngestApiS3Orders.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.ingest.s3;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3Connection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.s3.S3ObjectSummary;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabIngestApiS3Orders {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "s3_orders";
  private static final String S3_CONNECTION_NAME = "s3-fabric";
  private static final String S3_PARQUET_PATH = "s3_orders";
  private static final int COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE = 12;
  private static final int INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE = 24;
  private static final String[] SYMBOLS = {"AAPL", "MSFT", "NVDA", "TSLA"};
  private static final String[] ORDER_TYPES = {"MARKET", "LIMIT", "STOP", "IOC"};
  private static final String[] SIDES = {"BUY", "SELL"};
  private static final String[] STATUSES = {"OPEN", "PARTIAL", "FILLED", "CANCELLED", "REJECTED"};
  private static final String[] DESKS = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "DESK3"};
  private static final String[] TRADING_REGIONS = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC"};

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withKekFile(Path.of("vault/keks/lab/lab.kek"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST_NAME)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("counterparty_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("instrument_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("symbol", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("trading_region", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("order_type", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("side", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("quantity", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("status", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("created_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("created_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .withField("updated_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          //.withParquetPath(S3_PARQUET_PATH)
                          .withConnectionName(S3_CONNECTION_NAME)
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("created_date"))
              .build());
      session.data().direct().ingest().setParquetRollPolicy(INGEST_NAME, 100, 1500L);

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(INGEST_NAME);
      List<String> prefixesToCheck = List.of("fabric/data/lab/" + S3_PARQUET_PATH);
      int rowCountBefore = safeRowCount(session, datasetId);

      int jsonMessages = 500;
      int mapMessages  = 500;
      int appendedMessages = jsonMessages + mapMessages;
      for (int i = 0; i < jsonMessages; i++) {
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i);
        String symbol = symbol(i);
        String desk = DESKS[i % DESKS.length];
        String tradingRegion = TRADING_REGIONS[i % TRADING_REGIONS.length];
        String orderType = ORDER_TYPES[i % ORDER_TYPES.length];
        String side = side(i);
        String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            INGEST_NAME,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"order_id\":\"ORD-20260301-"
                    + i
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"account_id\":\"ACCT-"
                    + (2000 + i)
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"counterparty_id\":\""
                    + counterpartyId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"instrument_id\":\""
                    + instrumentId
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"symbol\":\""
                    + symbol
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"desk\":\""
                    + desk
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"trading_region\":\""
                    + tradingRegion
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"order_type\":\""
                    + orderType
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"side\":\""
                    + side
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"quantity\":"
                    + (10 + i)
                    + ",\"price\":"
                    + (100.25 + i)
                    + ",\"status\":\""
                    + status
                    + "\""
                    + ",\"created_at\":\"2026-03-01T10:00:00Z\""
                    + ",\"created_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + ",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-01T10:30:00Z\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }
      for (int i = 0; i < mapMessages; i++) {
        String counterpartyId = counterpartyId(i + jsonMessages);
        String instrumentId = instrumentId(i + jsonMessages);
        String symbol = symbol(i + jsonMessages);
        String desk = DESKS[(i + jsonMessages) % DESKS.length];
        String tradingRegion = TRADING_REGIONS[(i + jsonMessages) % TRADING_REGIONS.length];
        String orderType = ORDER_TYPES[i % ORDER_TYPES.length];
        String side = side(i + jsonMessages);
        String status = STATUSES[i % STATUSES.length];
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            INGEST_NAME,
            Map.ofEntries(
                Map.entry("order_id", "ORD-20260301-MAP-" + i),
                Map.entry("account_id", "ACCT-" + (6000 + i)),
                Map.entry("counterparty_id", counterpartyId),
                Map.entry("instrument_id", instrumentId),
                Map.entry("symbol", symbol),
                Map.entry("desk", desk),
                Map.entry("trading_region", tradingRegion),
                Map.entry("order_type", orderType),
                Map.entry("side", side),
                Map.entry("quantity", 50 + i),
                Map.entry("price", 250.75 + i),
                Map.entry("status", status),
                Map.entry("created_at", "2026-03-01T11:00:00Z"),
                Map.entry("created_date", "2026-03-01"),
                Map.entry("updated_at", "2026-03-01T11:30:00Z")));
      }
      System.out.println("waitingForIdleRollMs=2500");
      Thread.sleep(2500L);

      int rowCountAfter = (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      int rowCountDelta = rowCountAfter - rowCountBefore;
      RowResult preview = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);

      String matchedPrefix = null;
      List<S3ObjectSummary> parquetObjects = List.of();
      try (S3Connection s3 = session.connections().s3(S3_CONNECTION_NAME)) {
        for (String prefix : prefixesToCheck) {
          List<S3ObjectSummary> listed = s3.listObjects(prefix, true);
          List<S3ObjectSummary> parquetOnly =
              listed.stream()
                  .filter(object -> object.key() != null && object.key().endsWith(".parquet"))
                  .toList();
          if (!parquetOnly.isEmpty()) {
            matchedPrefix = prefix;
            parquetObjects = parquetOnly;
            break;
          }
        }
        if (parquetObjects.isEmpty()) {
          // Extra diagnostics: capture a small sample from both expected prefixes.
          List<S3ObjectSummary> sampled = new ArrayList<>();
          for (String prefix : prefixesToCheck) {
            List<S3ObjectSummary> listed = s3.listObjects(prefix, true);
            for (S3ObjectSummary object : listed) {
              sampled.add(object);
              if (sampled.size() >= 5) {
                break;
              }
            }
            if (sampled.size() >= 5) {
              break;
            }
          }
          String sampleKeys =
              sampled.isEmpty()
                  ? "<none>"
                  : sampled.stream().map(S3ObjectSummary::key).toList().toString();
          throw new IllegalStateException(
              "No parquet objects found in expected prefixes "
                  + prefixesToCheck
                  + " sampleKeys="
                  + sampleKeys);
        }
      }

      System.out.println("ingestName=" + INGEST_NAME);
      System.out.println("targetConnection=" + S3_CONNECTION_NAME);
      System.out.println("targetParquetPath=" + S3_PARQUET_PATH);
      System.out.println("matchedPrefix=" + matchedPrefix);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=" + appendedMessages);
      System.out.println("rowCountBefore=" + rowCountBefore);
      System.out.println("rowCountAfter=" + rowCountAfter);
      System.out.println("rowCountDelta=" + rowCountDelta);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      System.out.println("parquetObjectCount=" + parquetObjects.size());
      System.out.println("firstParquetObject=" + parquetObjects.get(0).key());
      pass = rowCountDelta == appendedMessages && !parquetObjects.isEmpty();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason =
            "expected rowCount delta == "
                + appendedMessages
                + " and parquet objects in S3"
                + " (rowCountBefore="
                + rowCountBefore
                + ", rowCountAfter="
                + rowCountAfter
                + ", rowCountDelta="
                + rowCountDelta
                + ", parquetObjectCount="
                + parquetObjects.size()
                + ")";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static String counterpartyId(int index) {
    int value = (index % COUNTERPARTY_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("CP-%04d", value);
  }

  private static String instrumentId(int index) {
    int value = (index % INSTRUMENT_UNIVERSE) + 1;
    return String.format("ISIN%010d", value);
  }

  private static String symbol(int index) {
    return SYMBOLS[index % SYMBOLS.length];
  }

  private static String side(int index) {
    return SIDES[(index / SYMBOLS.length) % SIDES.length];
  }

  private static int safeRowCount(Fabric.Session session, String datasetId) {
    try {
      return (int) session.data().direct().rows().rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
    } catch (IllegalStateException ex) {
      String message = ex.getMessage();
      if (message == null) {
        throw ex;
      }
      String normalized = message.toLowerCase(java.util.Locale.ROOT);
      if (normalized.contains("unknown table token")
          || normalized.contains("dataset not found")
          || normalized.contains("table with name")
          || normalized.contains("does not exist")) {
        return 0;
      }
      throw ex;
    }
  }
}



org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/odbc/LabMixedSourceJoin.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;

public final class LabMixedSourceJoin {
  private static final String DEFAULT_LOCAL_PARQUET_DATASET = "lab.default.local_positions_parquet";
  private static final String DEFAULT_S3_PARQUET_DATASET = "lab.default.s3_positions_parquet";
  private static final String DEFAULT_ODBC_DATASET = "lab.default.orders_postgres";
  private static final int DEFAULT_LIMIT = 50;

  private LabMixedSourceJoin() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    String localParquetDataset =
        args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : DEFAULT_LOCAL_PARQUET_DATASET;
    String s3ParquetDataset =
        args != null && args.length > 1 ? args[1] : DEFAULT_S3_PARQUET_DATASET;
    String odbcDataset = args != null && args.length > 2 ? args[2] : DEFAULT_ODBC_DATASET;
    int limit = args != null && args.length > 3 ? Integer.parseInt(args[3]) : DEFAULT_LIMIT;

    String sql =
        "select l.symbol, l.qty as local_qty, s.qty as s3_qty, p.qty as pg_qty "
            + "from "
            + localParquetDataset
            + " l "
            + "join "
            + s3ParquetDataset
            + " s on l.symbol = s.symbol "
            + "join "
            + odbcDataset
            + " p on l.symbol = p.symbol "
            + "order by l.symbol";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      RowResult rows = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(sql, Math.max(1, limit));
      List<Object> firstRow = rows.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : rows.rows().get(0);

      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("columns=" + rows.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rows.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String reason = t.getMessage();
      if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {
        reason = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      throw new IllegalStateException("LabMixedSourceJoin failed: " + reason, t);
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/odbc/LabOdbc.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc;

import java.sql.ResultSet;
import java.sql.ResultSetMetaData;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.sql.Statement;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.duckdb.DuckdbEngine;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.duckdb.DuckdbSession;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabOdbc {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabOdbc.class);
  private static final String DEFAULT_DSN = "DSN=postgres_fabric";
  private static final String DEFAULT_REMOTE_SQL = "SELECT * FROM orders";
  private static final int DEFAULT_LIMIT = 20;

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    String dsn = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : DEFAULT_DSN;
    String remoteSql = args != null && args.length > 1 ? args[1] : DEFAULT_REMOTE_SQL;
    int limit = args != null && args.length > 2 ? Integer.parseInt(args[2]) : DEFAULT_LIMIT;

    try (DuckdbEngine engine = new DuckdbEngine();
        DuckdbSession session = engine.openSession()) {
      ensureOdbcExtension(session);
      String querySql = "SELECT * FROM odbc_query(?, ?) LIMIT " + Math.max(1, limit);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabOdbc] query=SELECT * FROM odbc_query(?, ?) LIMIT {} dsn={} remoteSql={}",
          Math.max(1, limit),
          dsn,
          remoteSql);
      try (var prepared = session.prepareStatement(querySql)) {
        prepared.setString(1, dsn);
        prepared.setString(2, remoteSql);
        try (ResultSet resultSet = prepared.executeQuery()) {
          logRows(resultSet, Math.max(1, limit));
        }
      } catch (SQLException ex) {
        LOGGER.warn(
            "[LabOdbc] odbc_query(connection_string, sql) failed; trying odbc_scan fallback: {}",
            ex.getMessage());
        String fallbackSql =
            "SELECT * FROM odbc_scan('"
                + escapeSql(dsn)
                + "', '"
                + escapeSql(remoteSql)
                + "') LIMIT "
                + Math.max(1, limit);
        LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] fallbackQuery={}", fallbackSql);
        try (Statement statement = session.createStatement();
            ResultSet resultSet = statement.executeQuery(fallbackSql)) {
          logRows(resultSet, Math.max(1, limit));
        }
      }
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
    }
  }

  private static void ensureOdbcExtension(DuckdbSession session) {
    try {
      session.exec("INSTALL odbc");
      session.exec("LOAD odbc");
      LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] loaded extension=odbc");
      return;
    } catch (RuntimeException ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("[LabOdbc] extension=odbc unavailable, trying odbc_scanner: {}", ex.getMessage());
    }
    session.exec("INSTALL odbc_scanner");
    session.exec("LOAD odbc_scanner");
    LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] loaded extension=odbc_scanner");
  }

  private static void logRows(ResultSet resultSet, int limit) throws Exception {
    ResultSetMetaData metadata = resultSet.getMetaData();
    int columnCount = metadata.getColumnCount();
    List<String> columns = new ArrayList<>(columnCount);
    for (int index = 1; index <= columnCount; index++) {
      columns.add(metadata.getColumnLabel(index));
    }
    LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] columns={}", columns);
    int rows = 0;
    while (resultSet.next() && rows < limit) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>(columnCount);
      for (int index = 1; index <= columnCount; index++) {
        values.add(resultSet.getObject(index));
      }
      LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] row{}={}", rows + 1, values);
      rows++;
    }
    LOGGER.info("[LabOdbc] rowsRead={}", rows);
  }

  private static String escapeSql(String value) {
    return value == null ? "" : value.replace("'", "''");
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/odbc/LabOdbcConnectionTest.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.odbc.OdbcConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.duckdb.OdbcSessionSupport;

public final class LabOdbcConnectionTest {
  private static final String DEFAULT_CONNECTION_NAME = "postgres_fabric";
  private static final String DEFAULT_SCHEMA_SQL = "SELECT * FROM orders";

  private LabOdbcConnectionTest() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    String connectionName = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : DEFAULT_CONNECTION_NAME;
    String schemaSql = args != null && args.length > 1 ? args[1] : DEFAULT_SCHEMA_SQL;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      try (OdbcConnection odbc = session.connections().odbc(connectionName)) {
        OdbcSessionSupport.OdbcConnectionHealth health = odbc.test();
        OdbcSessionSupport.OdbcRuntimeStatus status =
            OdbcSessionSupport.runtimeStatus(true, health);
        OdbcSessionSupport.OdbcSchemaInspection schema = odbc.inspectSchema(schemaSql);

        System.out.println("connectionName=" + connectionName);
        System.out.println("ok=" + health.ok());
        System.out.println("message=" + health.message());
        System.out.println("extension=" + health.extensionNameUsed());
        System.out.println("fallbackInUse=" + health.fallbackInUse());
        System.out.println("roundTripMs=" + health.roundTripMillis());
        System.out.println("runtimeStatus=" + status.message());
        System.out.println("schemaOk=" + schema.ok());
        System.out.println("schemaColumns=" + schema.columns().size());
        System.out.println("schemaMessage=" + schema.message());
        if (!health.ok()) {
          throw new IllegalStateException("ODBC connection test failed: " + health.message());
        }
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String reason = t.getMessage();
      if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {
        reason = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      throw new IllegalStateException("LabOdbcConnectionTest failed: " + reason, t);
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/odbc/LabOdbcDatasetQuery.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

public final class LabOdbcDatasetQuery {
  private static final String DEFAULT_DATASET_ID = "dataset:lab/default/orders_odbc";
  private static final int DEFAULT_LIMIT = 20;

  private LabOdbcDatasetQuery() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    String datasetId = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : DEFAULT_DATASET_ID;
    int limit = args != null && args.length > 1 ? Integer.parseInt(args[1]) : DEFAULT_LIMIT;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String sql = LabSql.selectAllFromCanonicalDatasetId(datasetId);
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(sql, Math.max(1, limit));
      List<Object> firstRow = result.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : result.rows().get(0);

      System.out.println("datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("columns=" + result.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + result.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String reason = t.getMessage();
      if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {
        reason = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      throw new IllegalStateException("LabOdbcDatasetQuery failed: " + reason, t);
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/odbc/LabOdbcIngestSource.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.odbc;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class LabOdbcIngestSource {
  private static final String DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME = "orders_odbc_ingest";
  private static final int DEFAULT_LIMIT = 20;

  private LabOdbcIngestSource() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    String ingestName = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME;
    int limit = args != null && args.length > 1 ? Integer.parseInt(args[1]) : DEFAULT_LIMIT;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      IngestModel model =
          session
              .data()
              .direct()
              .ingest()
              .admin()
              .getModel(ingestName)
              .orElseThrow(
                  () ->
                      new IllegalStateException(
                          "Ingest model not found for "
                              + ingestName
                              + ". Create a definition with source.providerId=ODBC first."));

      String datasetId = Strings.requireNonBlank(model.datasetId(), "ingest.datasetId");
      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().start(ingestName);

      try {
        Thread.sleep(750L);
      } catch (InterruptedException interrupted) {
        Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      }

      RowResult result =
          session
              .data()
              .direct()
              .rows()
              .querySql(LabSql.selectAllFromCanonicalDatasetId(datasetId), Math.max(1, limit));
      List<Object> firstRow = result.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : result.rows().get(0);

      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("runtimeStatus=" + runtime.status());
      System.out.println("runtimeFailure=" + runtime.failure().map(Throwable::getMessage).orElse("<none>"));
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + result.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String reason = t.getMessage();
      if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {
        reason = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      throw new IllegalStateException("LabOdbcIngestSource failed: " + reason, t);
    }
  }
}

org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.query

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/query/LabQueryDirect.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.query;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabQueryDirect {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabQueryDirect.class);

  public static void main(String[] args) {

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                            .withGroup("lab")
                            .withName("client")
                            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
                            .build();

    try {
      session.start();

      RowManager rowManager = session.data().direct().rows();

      String ingestName = "orders";
      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);

      long rowCount = rowManager.rowCount(LabSql.table(datasetId));
      RowResult preview = rowManager.querySql(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5);
      List<Object> firstRow = preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      
      System.out.println("=========================================");

      String sqlOrdersInstruments =
          "select "
              + "o.order_id, o.created_at, o.instrument_id, i.symbol, i.asset_class, i.currency, o.quantity, o.price "
              + "from orders o "
              + "join instruments i on o.instrument_id = i.instrument_id "
              + "order by o.created_at desc "
              + "limit 20";
      RowResult resultOrdersInstruments = rowManager.querySql(sqlOrdersInstruments, 20);
      List<Object> firstOrdersInstruments =
          resultOrdersInstruments.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : resultOrdersInstruments.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sqlOrdersInstruments);
      System.out.println("columns=" + resultOrdersInstruments.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + resultOrdersInstruments.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstOrdersInstruments);

      System.out.println("=========================================");

      String sqlOrdersCounterparties =
          "select "
              + "o.order_id, o.counterparty_id, c.region, c.risk_rating, c.active, o.status, o.quantity, o.price "
              + "from orders o "
              + "join counterparties c on o.counterparty_id = c.counterparty_id "
              + "order by o.created_at desc "
              + "limit 20";
      RowResult resultOrdersCounterparties = rowManager.querySql(sqlOrdersCounterparties, 20);
      List<Object> firstOrdersCounterparties =
          resultOrdersCounterparties.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : resultOrdersCounterparties.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sqlOrdersCounterparties);
      System.out.println("columns=" + resultOrdersCounterparties.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + resultOrdersCounterparties.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstOrdersCounterparties);

      System.out.println("=========================================");

      String sqlOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties =
          "select "
              + "o.order_id, o.created_at, i.symbol, i.asset_class, c.region as cp_region, c.risk_rating, o.side, o.quantity, o.price "
              + "from orders o "
              + "join instruments i on o.instrument_id = i.instrument_id "
              + "join counterparties c on o.counterparty_id = c.counterparty_id "
              + "order by o.created_at desc "
              + "limit 20";
      RowResult resultOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties =
          rowManager.querySql(sqlOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties, 20);
      List<Object> firstOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties =
          resultOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties.rows().isEmpty()
              ? List.of()
              : resultOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sqlOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties);
      System.out.println("columns=" + resultOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + resultOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstOrdersInstrumentsCounterparties);

      System.out.println("=========================================");

      String sqlOrdersMarketData =
          "select "
              + "o.order_id, o.created_at, o.symbol, o.side, o.quantity, o.price as order_price, "
              + "m.bid, m.ask, m.last, m.size as market_size, m.venue, m.event_time "
              + "from orders o "
              + "join marketdata_amps_parquet m on o.symbol = m.symbol and o.side = m.side "
              + "order by o.created_at desc "
              + "limit 20";
      RowResult resultOrdersMarketData = rowManager.querySql(sqlOrdersMarketData, 20);
      List<Object> firstOrdersMarketData =
          resultOrdersMarketData.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : resultOrdersMarketData.rows().get(0);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sqlOrdersMarketData);
      System.out.println("columns=" + resultOrdersMarketData.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + resultOrdersMarketData.rows().size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstOrdersMarketData);

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/query/LabQueryDirectSimple.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.query;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabQueryDirectSimple {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabQueryDirectSimple.class);

  public static void main(String[] args) {

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                            .withGroup("lab")
                            .withName("client")
                            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
                            .build();

    try {
      session.start();

      RowManager rowManager = session.data().direct().rows();
      RowResult  result = rowManager.querySql("select * from orders limit 5");
      System.out.println(result);
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/query/LabQueryService.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.query;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;

public final class LabQueryService {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    ServiceHandle queryHandle = null;
    CountDownLatch shutdownSignal = new CountDownLatch(1);

    Runtime.getRuntime()
        .addShutdownHook(
            new Thread(
                () -> {
                  System.out.println("shutdownSignal=received");
                  shutdownSignal.countDown();
                }));

    try (Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                    .withGroup("lab")
                                    .withName("query")
                                    .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                    .withKerberosUsername("dlab")
                                    .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dlab.keytab"))
                                    
                                    .build()) {
      session.start();

      ServiceRunOptions serviceOptions =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withTlsCertChain(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem"))
              .withTlsPrivateKey(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key"))
              .build();

      queryHandle = session.services().start("query", serviceOptions, null);
      System.out.println("serviceEnabled=true");
      System.out.println("queryService=query");
      System.out.println("status=RUNNING");
      System.out.println("stopHint=press Ctrl+C");
      shutdownSignal.await();
      System.out.println("status=STOPPING");
    } catch (InterruptedException interrupted) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      throw new IllegalStateException("service interrupted while waiting for shutdown");
    } catch (Throwable error) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(normalizeMessage(error), error);
    } finally {
      if (queryHandle != null) {
        try {
          queryHandle.close();
        } catch (Exception ignored) {
        }
      }
    }

  }

  private static String normalizeMessage(Throwable error) {
    if (error == null) {
      return "unknown failure";
    }
    String message = error.getMessage();
    if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
      return error.getClass().getSimpleName();
    }
    return message;
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/data/query/LabQueryServiceClient.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.data.query;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabQueryServiceClient {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabQueryServiceClient.class);

  public static void main(String[] args) {

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                                .withGroup("lab")
                                .withName("client")
                                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                                .withDataOptions(
                                    DataOptions.builder()
                                        .withServiceEnabled(true)
                                        .withServiceQueryService("query")
                                        .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                                        .build())
                                .build();

    try {
      session.start();

      TabularManager tabular = session.data().service().tabular();

      String sql = "select * from orders";
      ByteBuffer remoteIpc = tabular.queryIpcBuffer(sql, 5);
      List<Map<String, Object>> rows = tabular.decodeIpcRows(remoteIpc);
      System.out.println("remoteIpcBytes=" + remoteIpc.remaining());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rows.size());
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + (rows.isEmpty() ? Map.of() : rows.get(0)));
      

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("Fatal error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }            

  }
}



org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.grpc

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/grpc/LabGrpcClient.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.grpc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import io.grpc.StatusRuntimeException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceClient;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabGrpcClient {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabGrpcClient.class);

  private LabGrpcClient() {}
  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = null;
    try {
      var builder =
          Fabric.newSession()
              .withGroup("lab")
              .withName("client")
              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
              .withGrpcRoutingLogging(true)
              .withTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
              .withKerberosUsername("lenny");
      session = builder.build();
      int callCount = 10;
      long callDelayMillis = 5000L;
      session.start();
      ServiceRunOptions options =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withCallCount(callCount)
              .withCallDelayMillis(callDelayMillis)
              //.withTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
              .build();
      try (ServiceClient client = session.services().client("echo-secure", options)) {
        AtomicLong counter = new AtomicLong(1);
        String baseMessage = "hello";
        demo.echo.EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub stub = client.as(demo.echo.EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub.class);
        while (!Thread.currentThread().isInterrupted()) {
          long ordinal = counter.getAndIncrement();
          String requestMessage = String.format(Locale.ROOT, "%s-%05d", baseMessage, ordinal);
          var request = demo.echo.EchoRequest.newBuilder().setMsg(requestMessage).build();
          LOGGER.info("[Client] Sending request #" + ordinal + " msg='" + requestMessage + "'");
          try {
            var reply = stub.say(request);
            LOGGER.info("[Client] Received reply: " + reply.getMsg() + " (instance=" + reply.getInstance() + ", group=" + reply.getGroup() + ")");
          } catch (StatusRuntimeException ex) {
            LOGGER.error("[Client] gRPC error: " + ex.getStatus());
            LabUtil.sleepRespectingInterrupt(Math.max(1000L, callDelayMillis));
            continue;
          }
          LabUtil.sleepRespectingInterrupt(Math.max(0L, callDelayMillis));
          if (callCount > 0 && ordinal >= callCount) {
            LOGGER.info("[Client] Reached configured callCount={}, exiting.", callCount);
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.error("[Client] Fatal error during gRPC test run", ex);
      throw ex;
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }
  }

}









===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/grpc/LabGrpcService.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.grpc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import demo.echo.EchoGrpc;
import demo.echo.EchoReply;
import demo.echo.EchoRequest;
import io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabGrpcService {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabGrpcService.class);

  private LabGrpcService() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("server")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dlab.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("dlab")
                              .withTlsCertChain(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem"))
                              .withTlsPrivateKey(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key"))
                              .build();
    try (session) {
      session.start();
      try (ServiceHandle service = session.services().start("echo-secure", new SimpleEchoService())) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service] echo started on port {}", service.port());
        service.blockUntilShutdown();
      }
    }
  }

  private static final class SimpleEchoService extends EchoGrpc.EchoImplBase {
    @Override
    public void say(EchoRequest req, StreamObserver<EchoReply> obs) {
      String inbound = req.getMsg();
      LOGGER.info("[Service] Received request msg='{}' group='{}' appName='{}' appInstance='{}'", inbound);
      EchoReply reply = EchoReply.newBuilder()
                          .setMsg("echo:" + inbound)
                          .setInstance("service-echo")
                          .setGroup("lab")
                          .build();
      LOGGER.info("[Service] Responding msg='{}' instance='{}' group='{}'", reply.getMsg(), reply.getInstance(), "lab");
      obs.onNext(reply);
      obs.onCompleted();
    }
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/grpc/LabGrpcServiceMulti.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.grpc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import demo.echo.EchoGrpc;
import demo.echo.EchoReply;
import demo.echo.EchoRequest;
import io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayDeque;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Deque;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import java.util.function.IntConsumer;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
/** Minimal echo gRPC service powered by the app helpers. */
public final class LabGrpcServiceMulti {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabGrpcServiceMulti.class);

  private LabGrpcServiceMulti() {}
  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("server")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dlab.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("dlab")
                              .build();
    try (session) {
      session.start();
      ServiceManager services = session.services();
      try (ServiceInstanceManager manager =
          new ServiceInstanceManager(services)) {
        manager.startInstances(5);
        manager.awaitShutdown();
      }
    }
  }

  private static final class ServiceInstanceManager implements AutoCloseable {
    private final ServiceManager services;
    private final List<ServiceInstance> instances = new ArrayList<>();
    private final AtomicBoolean closing = new AtomicBoolean(false);
    private final CountDownLatch shutdown = new CountDownLatch(1);
    private final Deque<Integer> availablePorts = new ArrayDeque<>();
    private final Set<Integer> allocatedPorts = new HashSet<>();
    private final int basePort;
    private final int maxRequestsPerInstance;
    private final long autoStopAfterMillis;
    private final int autoStopCount;
    private int nextInstanceOrdinal = 0;
    private int nextDynamicPort;
    ServiceInstanceManager(ServiceManager services) {
      this.services = services;
      this.basePort = determineBasePort();
      this.maxRequestsPerInstance = Integer.getInteger("fabric.lab.grpc.multi.maxRequestsPerInstance", 5);
      this.autoStopAfterMillis = Long.getLong("fabric.lab.grpc.multi.autoStopAfterMs", 0L);
      this.autoStopCount = Integer.getInteger("fabric.lab.grpc.multi.autoStopCount", 0);
      this.nextDynamicPort = basePort;
      LOGGER.info("[Service] Base port for service-echo instances: " + basePort);
    }
    void startInstances(int count) throws Exception {
      for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        if (startNewInstance() == null) {
          throw new IllegalStateException(
              "Failed to start required service instance #" + (i + 1));
        }
      }
      scheduleAutoStop();
    }
    void awaitShutdown() throws InterruptedException {
      shutdown.await();
    }
    private synchronized ServiceInstance startNewInstance() throws Exception {
      if (closing.get()) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service] Instance manager closing; ignoring start request.");
        return null;
      }
      if (instances.size() >= 5) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service] Requested start ignored; already at desired instance count (" + 5 + ").");
        return null;
      }
      int ordinal = ++nextInstanceOrdinal;
      String instanceName = "service-echo-instance-" + ordinal;
      int bindPort = allocatePort();
      Path certChain = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem");
      Path keyPem = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key");
      ServiceInstance[] holder = new ServiceInstance[1];
      ScalingEchoService echoSvc = new ScalingEchoService(instanceName, () -> handleRequestCompletion(holder[0]));
      ServiceHandle handle;
      try {
        ServiceRunOptions options = ServiceRunOptions.builder()
                                      .withInstanceName(instanceName)
                                    // .withBindHost("0.0.0.0")
                                      .withBindPort(bindPort)
                                    // .withAdvertiseHost("127.0.0.1")
                                      .withAdvertisePort(bindPort)
                                      .withTlsCertChain(certChain)
                                      .withTlsPrivateKey(keyPem)
                                      .build();
        handle = services.start("echo-secure", options, echoSvc);
      } catch (Exception ex) {
        abandonPort(bindPort);
        throw ex;
      }
      ServiceInstance instance = new ServiceInstance(instanceName, handle, bindPort, this::releasePort);
      holder[0] = instance;
      int port = handle.port();
      LOGGER.info("[Service] " + "echo-secure" + " started instance " + instanceName + " on port " + port);
      instances.add(instance);
      instance.startServing();
      return instance;
    }
    private void handleRequestCompletion(ServiceInstance instance) {
      boolean stopInstance = false;
      boolean stopAll = false;
      int servedCount = 0;
      synchronized (this) {
        if (closing.get() || !instances.contains(instance)) {
          return;
        }
        servedCount = instance.incrementRequestCount();
        LOGGER.info("[Service] Instance " + instance.instanceName() + " handled " + servedCount + " request(s).");
        if (maxRequestsPerInstance > 0
            && servedCount >= maxRequestsPerInstance
            && instance.markShutdownTriggered()) {
          stopInstance = true;
          instances.remove(instance);
          stopAll = instances.isEmpty();
          if (stopAll) {
            closing.set(true);
          }
        }
      }
      if (stopInstance) {
        LOGGER.info(
            "[Service] Instance {} reached {} requests; shutting down.",
            instance.instanceName(),
            maxRequestsPerInstance);
        instance.close();
        if (stopAll && shutdown.getCount() > 0) {
          LOGGER.info("[Service] All instances drained; shutting down.");
          shutdown.countDown();
        }
      }
    }
    @Override
    public void close() {
      List<ServiceInstance> snapshot;
      synchronized (this) {
        closing.set(true);
        snapshot = new ArrayList<>(instances);
        instances.clear();
      }
      for (ServiceInstance instance : snapshot) {
        try {
          instance.close();
        } catch (Exception ex) {
          LOGGER.error("[Service] Error closing instance " + instance.instanceName() + ": " + ex.getMessage());
        }
      }
      if (shutdown.getCount() > 0) {
        shutdown.countDown();
      }
    }
    private int determineBasePort() {
      Integer configured = Integer.getInteger("fabric.lab.grpc.basePort");
      if (configured != null && configured > 0) {
        return configured;
      }
      return 5502;
    }
    private void scheduleAutoStop() {
      if (autoStopAfterMillis <= 0L || autoStopCount <= 0) {
        return;
      }
      Thread stopper =
          new Thread(
              () -> {
                try {
                  Thread.sleep(autoStopAfterMillis);
                  stopInstances(autoStopCount);
                } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
                  Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                }
              },
              "grpc-multi-auto-stop");
      stopper.setDaemon(true);
      stopper.start();
    }
    private void stopInstances(int count) {
      List<ServiceInstance> toClose = new ArrayList<>();
      synchronized (this) {
        if (closing.get()) {
          return;
        }
        int limit = Math.min(count, instances.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < limit; i++) {
          ServiceInstance instance = instances.remove(0);
          if (instance != null && instance.markShutdownTriggered()) {
            toClose.add(instance);
          }
        }
        if (!instances.isEmpty()) {
          LOGGER.info(
              "[Service] Auto-stop selected {} instance(s); remaining={}",
              toClose.size(),
              instances.size());
        } else if (!toClose.isEmpty()) {
          closing.set(true);
        }
      }
      for (ServiceInstance instance : toClose) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service] Auto-stop closing instance {}", instance.instanceName());
        instance.close();
      }
      if (closing.get() && shutdown.getCount() > 0) {
        shutdown.countDown();
      }
    }
    private synchronized int allocatePort() {
      int port;
      if (!availablePorts.isEmpty()) {
        port = availablePorts.removeFirst();
      } else {
        port = nextDynamicPort++;
      }
      allocatedPorts.add(port);
      return port;
    }
    private synchronized void releasePort(int port) {
      if (port <= 0) {
        return;
      }
      if (allocatedPorts.remove(port)) {
        availablePorts.addLast(port);
      }
    }
    private synchronized void abandonPort(int port) {
      allocatedPorts.remove(port);
    }
    private static final class ServiceInstance implements AutoCloseable {
      private final String instanceName;
      private final ServiceHandle handle;
      private final int bindPort;
      private final IntConsumer releaseCallback;
      private final AtomicInteger requestCount = new AtomicInteger();
      private final AtomicBoolean shutdownTriggered = new AtomicBoolean(false);
      private final AtomicBoolean closed = new AtomicBoolean(false);
      private final Thread serverThread;
      ServiceInstance(String instanceName, ServiceHandle handle, int bindPort, IntConsumer releaseCallback) {
        this.instanceName = instanceName;
        this.handle = handle;
        this.bindPort = bindPort;
        this.releaseCallback = releaseCallback;
        this.serverThread =
            new Thread(
                () -> {
                  try {
                    handle.blockUntilShutdown();
                  } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
