                    Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                  }
                },
                "grpc-" + instanceName);
        this.serverThread.setDaemon(true);
      }
      void startServing() {
        serverThread.start();
      }
      String instanceName() {
        return instanceName;
      }
      int incrementRequestCount() {
        return requestCount.incrementAndGet();
      }
      boolean markShutdownTriggered() {
        return shutdownTriggered.compareAndSet(false, true);
      }
      @Override
      public void close() {
        if (closed.compareAndSet(false, true)) {
          try {
            handle.close();
          } finally {
            try {
              serverThread.join(1000);
            } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
              Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
            }
            if (releaseCallback != null) {
              try {
                releaseCallback.accept(bindPort);
              } catch (Exception ex) {
                LOGGER.error(
                    "[Service] Failed to release port "
                        + bindPort
                        + ": "
                        + ex.getMessage());
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  private static final class ScalingEchoService extends EchoGrpc.EchoImplBase {
    private final String instanceName;
    private final Runnable completionCallback;
    ScalingEchoService(String instanceName, Runnable completionCallback) {
      this.instanceName = instanceName;
      this.completionCallback = completionCallback;
    }
    @Override
    public void say(EchoRequest req, StreamObserver<EchoReply> obs) {
      String inbound = req.getMsg();
      LOGGER.info("[Service][{}] Received request msg='{}'", instanceName, inbound);
      try {
        Thread.sleep(2000);
      } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
        Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
      }
      EchoReply reply =
          EchoReply.newBuilder()
              .setMsg("echo:" + inbound)
              .setInstance(instanceName)
              .setGroup("lab")
              .build();
      LOGGER.info("[Service][" + instanceName + "] Responding msg='" + reply.getMsg() + "' instance=" + instanceName + " group='lab'");
      obs.onNext(reply);
      obs.onCompleted();
      try {
        completionCallback.run();
      } catch (RuntimeException ex) {
        LOGGER.error("[Service][" + instanceName + "] Failed to record request: " + ex.getMessage());
      }
    }
  }
}










org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/LabDemoSupport.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Objects;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;

public final class LabDemoSupport {
  public static final String GROUP = "lab";
  public static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  public static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  public static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private LabDemoSupport() {}

  public static Fabric.Session startSession(String appName) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(appName)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .withCheckpointPath(repoDataDir("checkpoints", "lab", "demo"))
            .build();
    session.start();
    return session;
  }

  public static void sleepSilently(long millis) {
    try {
      Thread.sleep(Math.max(0L, millis));
    } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
      Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
    }
  }

  public static Path repoDataDir(String... parts) {
    Path path = Path.of("data", "lite");
    if (parts == null) {
      return path;
    }
    for (String part : parts) {
      if (part == null || part.isBlank()) {
        continue;
      }
      path = path.resolve(part);
    }
    return path.normalize();
  }

  public static Path labDefaultDataDir(String leafName) {
    String normalized = Objects.requireNonNull(leafName, "leafName").trim();
    if (normalized.isBlank()) {
      throw new IllegalArgumentException("leafName is required");
    }
    return repoDataDir("lab", "default", normalized);
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.checkpoints

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/checkpoints/LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.checkpoints;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntimeStatus;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;

public final class LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint {
  private static final String INGEST = "lab_amps_with_checkpoint";
  private static final String CONNECTION = "amps-fabric-json";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json";

  private LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    long runMillis = args != null && args.length > 0 ? Long.parseLong(args[0]) : 3_000L;
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(LabDemoSupport.GROUP)
            .withName("lab-ingest-amps-checkpoint")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(LabDemoSupport.DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(LabDemoSupport.KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(LabDemoSupport.KRB_KEYTAB)
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "lab", "ingest-amps-checkpoint"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir(INGEST);
      System.out.println(
          "[LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint] ingest="
              + INGEST
              + " source=AMPS target="
              + targetPath
              + " mode=DIRECT");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, true)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withConnectionName(CONNECTION)
                          .withTopic(TOPIC)
                          .withSowSubscribe(Boolean.TRUE)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build());

      AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION);
      try (IngestRuntime first = session.data().direct().ingest().start(INGEST)) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          amps.publish(TOPIC, "{\"order_id\":" + (9000 + i) + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}\n");
        }
        LabDemoSupport.sleepSilently(runMillis);
        IngestRuntimeStatus status = first.status();
        System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint] firstRun checkpoint=" + status.lastCheckpoint());
      }

      try (IngestRuntime second = session.data().direct().ingest().start(INGEST)) {
        LabDemoSupport.sleepSilently(runMillis);
        IngestRuntimeStatus status = second.status();
        System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint] secondRun resumedCheckpoint=" + status.lastCheckpoint());
        System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsWithCheckpoint] rows=" + status.rows());
      }
    }
  }
}




org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.connections

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/connections/LabAmpsConfigTail.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.connections;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabAmpsConfigTail {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabAmpsConfigTail.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-discovery";
  private static final String DEFAULT_TOPIC = "/fabric/discovery";

  private LabAmpsConfigTail() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String topic = normalize(args, 0, DEFAULT_TOPIC);
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION_NAME);
      AmpsConnection.SubscriptionSpec spec =
          new AmpsConnection.SubscriptionSpec(true, topic, null, null);
      CountDownLatch done = new CountDownLatch(1);
      Runtime.getRuntime()
          .addShutdownHook(
              new Thread(() -> done.countDown(), "lab-amps-config-tail-shutdown"));
      try (AmpsConnection.Subscription ignored =
          amps.sowAndSubscribe(
              spec,
              (AmpsConnection.SubscriptionListener)
                  message ->
                      LOGGER.info(
                          "[LabAmpsConfigTail] topic={} bookmark={} data={}",
                          safe(message.topic()),
                          safe(message.bookmark()),
                          preview(message.data(), 200)))) {
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabAmpsConfigTail] tailing connection={} topic={} sow={}",
            CONNECTION_NAME,
            topic,
            spec.sow());
        while (done.getCount() > 0) {
          done.await(1L, TimeUnit.DAYS);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  private static String normalize(String[] args, int index, String defaultValue) {
    if (args == null || args.length <= index || args[index] == null) {
      return defaultValue;
    }
    String trimmed = Strings.trimToNull(args[index]);
    return trimmed == null ? defaultValue : trimmed;
  }

  private static String preview(String value, int maxChars) {
    if (value == null) {
      return "<null>";
    }
    String singleLine = value.replace('\r', ' ').replace('\n', ' ');
    if (singleLine.length() <= maxChars) {
      return singleLine;
    }
    return singleLine.substring(0, maxChars) + "...";
  }

  private static String safe(String value) {
    String trimmed = Strings.trimToNull(value);
    return trimmed == null ? "<null>" : trimmed;
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/connections/LabConnections.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.connections;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabConnections {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabConnections.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-discovery";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/fabric/discovery";

  private LabConnections() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String topic = Strings.trimToNull(args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : null);
    if (topic == null) {
      topic = TOPIC;
    }

    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build();

    try (session) {
      session.start();

      AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION_NAME);

      AtomicLong count = new AtomicLong();
      CountDownLatch shutdown = new CountDownLatch(1);

      AmpsConnection.Subscription sub =
          amps.sowAndSubscribe(
              topic,
              null, // options
              null, // filter
              msg -> {
                long n = count.incrementAndGet();
                String data = msg.data();
                int bytes = data == null ? 0 : data.length();
                String preview = preview(data, 240);
                LOGGER.info(
                    "[AMPS][{}] topic={} bookmark={} bytes={} preview={}",
                    n,
                    safe(msg.topic()),
                    safe(msg.bookmark()),
                    bytes,
                    preview);
              });

      Runtime.getRuntime()
          .addShutdownHook(
              new Thread(
                  () -> {
                    try {
                      LOGGER.info("[AMPS] shutdown requested; closing subscription");
                      sub.close();
                    } catch (Exception ignore) {
                    } finally {
                      shutdown.countDown();
                    }
                  },
                  "lab-amps-shutdown"));

      LOGGER.info(
          "[AMPS] SOW+SUBSCRIBE active connection={} topic={} (Ctrl+C to stop)",
          CONNECTION_NAME,
          topic);

      while (shutdown.getCount() > 0) {
        shutdown.await(1, TimeUnit.DAYS);
      }
    }
  }

  private static String preview(String s, int max) {
    if (s == null) {
      return "<null>";
    }
    String trimmed = s.trim();
    if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
      return "<empty>";
    }
    String singleLine = trimmed.replace("\r", " ").replace("\n", " ");
    if (singleLine.length() <= max) {
      return singleLine;
    }
    return singleLine.substring(0, max) + "...";
  }

  private static String safe(String s) {
    String v = Strings.trimToNull(s);
    return v == null ? "<null>" : v;
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabAmpsIngestFromConfig.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.source.IngestAmpsPump;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabAmpsIngestFromConfig {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabAmpsIngestFromConfig.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");
  private static final String DEFAULT_CONNECTION = "amps-fabric-discovery";

  private LabAmpsIngestFromConfig() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    if (args == null || args.length < 3) {
      printUsage();
      return;
    }
    String ingestName = Strings.trimToNull(args[0]);
    String topic = Strings.trimToNull(args[1]);
    String formatText = Strings.trimToNull(args[2]);
    String connectionName = argOrDefault(args, 3, DEFAULT_CONNECTION);
    boolean sow = Boolean.parseBoolean(argOrDefault(args, 4, "false"));
    if (ingestName == null || topic == null || formatText == null) {
      printUsage();
      return;
    }

    IngestAmpsPump.PayloadFormat format =
        IngestAmpsPump.PayloadFormat.valueOf(formatText.toUpperCase());
    CountDownLatch done = new CountDownLatch(1);
    Runtime.getRuntime()
        .addShutdownHook(new Thread(() -> done.countDown(), "lab-amps-ingest-shutdown"));

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      try (IngestAmpsPump pump =
          IngestAmpsPump.builder(session)
              .withIngestName(ingestName)
              .withIngestSourceName(ingestName)
              .withConnectionName(connectionName)
              .withTopic(topic)
              .withSowSubscribe(sow)
              .withMode(AmpsConnection.BatchMode.STREAM)
              .withPayloadFormat(format)
              .build()
              .start()) {
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabAmpsIngestFromConfig] running ingestName={} topic={} connection={} sow={} format={} mode={}",
            ingestName,
            topic,
            connectionName,
            sow,
            format,
            AmpsConnection.BatchMode.STREAM);
        while (done.getCount() > 0) {
          done.await(1L, TimeUnit.DAYS);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  private static void printUsage() {
    System.out.println("Usage:");
    System.out.println(
        "  LabAmpsIngestFromConfig <ingestName> <topic> <format:JSON|NVFIX> [connectionName] [sow]");
    System.out.println("Example:");
    System.out.println(
        "  LabAmpsIngestFromConfig orders_hist /lab/orders JSON amps-fabric-discovery false");
    System.out.println(
        "Note: this runner is args-driven; /fabric/discovery is not used by default because it is not dataset-ingest schema compatible.");
  }

  private static String argOrDefault(String[] args, int index, String defaultValue) {
    if (args == null || args.length <= index || args[index] == null) {
      return defaultValue;
    }
    String trimmed = Strings.trimToNull(args[index]);
    return trimmed == null ? defaultValue : trimmed;
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabDataClient.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularManager;

public final class LabDataClient {

  private LabDataClient() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {

    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withInstance("instance1")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();

    try (session) {
      session.start();

      RowManager data = session.data().direct().rows();
      System.out.println("ok = " + data.check());

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist");

      RowResult result = data.query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5));
      System.out.println("orders_hist columns = " + result.columns());
      System.out.println("orders_hist rows = " + result.rows().size());
      if (!result.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("orders_hist first row = " + result.rows().get(0));
      }

      TabularManager tabular = session.data().direct().tabular();
      ByteBuffer ipc = tabular.queryIpcBuffer(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5));
      System.out.println("orders_hist IPC byte size = " + ipc.remaining());
    }

    Fabric.Session remoteSession = Fabric.newSession()
                                    .withGroup("lab")
                                    .withName("client")
                                    .withInstance("instance2")
                                    .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                                    .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                                    .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                                    .withDataOptions(
                                        DataOptions.builder()
                                            .withServiceEnabled(true)
                                            .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                                            .withServiceQueryService("query")
                                            .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                                            .build())
                                    .build();

    try (remoteSession) {
      remoteSession.start();

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist");
      RowResult remoteResult = remoteSession.data().service().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5));
      System.out.println("remote orders_hist rows = " + remoteResult.rows().size());
      ByteBuffer remoteIpc =
          remoteSession
              .data()
              .service()
              .tabular()
              .queryIpcBuffer(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 5));
      System.out.println("remote orders_hist IPC byte size = " + remoteIpc.remaining());
    }

    System.out.println("done");
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabDataIngest.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabDataIngest {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabDataIngest.class);

  private LabDataIngest() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dlab.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("dlab")
            .build();

    try (session) {
      session.start();
      System.out.println("==================================================");

      Path certChain = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem");
      Path keyPem = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key");

      ServiceRunOptions options =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withTlsCertChain(certChain)
              .withTlsPrivateKey(keyPem)
              .build();

      // IMPORTANT: implementation must be null so ServiceManager uses the default FlightIngestProducer
      try (ServiceHandle service = session.services().start("ingest", options, null)) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service][Ingest] started on port {}", service.port());
        service.blockUntilShutdown();
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabDataQuery.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabDataQuery {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabDataQuery.class);

  private LabDataQuery() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("query")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/dlab.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("dlab")
            .build();

    try (session) {
      session.start();
      System.out.println("==================================================");

      Path certChain = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem");
      Path keyPem = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key");

      ServiceRunOptions options =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withTlsCertChain(certChain)
              .withTlsPrivateKey(keyPem)
              .build();

      // IMPORTANT: implementation must be null so ServiceManager uses the default FlightSqlServiceProducer
      try (ServiceHandle service = session.services().start("query", options, null)) {
        LOGGER.info("[Service][Query] started on port {}", service.port());
        service.blockUntilShutdown();
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestAmpsToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;

public final class LabIngestAmpsToParquet {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "ingest-amps-to-parquet";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String INGEST = "orders_amps_json";
  private static final String NAMESPACE = "default";
  private static final String CONNECTION = "amps-fabric-json";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json";

  private LabIngestAmpsToParquet() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir(INGEST);

      IngestModel model =
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST)
              .withNamespace(NAMESPACE)
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("quantity", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("status", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("created_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withConnectionName(CONNECTION)
                          .withTopic(TOPIC)
                          .withSowSubscribe(Boolean.TRUE)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build();

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(model);
      System.out.println(
          "[LabIngestAmpsToParquet] ingest="
              + INGEST
              + " source=AMPS target="
              + targetPath
              + " mode=DIRECT");

      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().start(INGEST)) {
        AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION);
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          amps.publish(TOPIC, orderPayload(i));
        }

        Thread.sleep(1_000L);
        System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsToParquet] runtime.queryCount=" + runtime.queryCount());
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(GROUP, NAMESPACE, INGEST);
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 20));
      System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsToParquet] datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsToParquet] rows=" + result.rows().size());
      if (!result.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("[LabIngestAmpsToParquet] firstRow=" + result.rows().get(0));
      }
    }
  }

  private static String orderPayload(int index) {
    Instant createdAt = Instant.parse("2026-03-01T12:10:00Z").plusSeconds(index);
    return "{"
        + "\"order_id\":"
        + (3000 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"account_id\":"
        + (4000 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"quantity\":"
        + (20 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"price\":"
        + (200.5 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"status\":\"NEW\","
        + "\"created_at\":\""
        + createdAt
        + "\","
        + "\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
        + "}\n";
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestApiToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;

public final class LabIngestApiToParquet {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "ingest-api-to-parquet";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String INGEST = "orders_api_parquet";
  private static final String NAMESPACE = "default";

  private LabIngestApiToParquet() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir(INGEST);

      IngestModel model =
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST)
              .withNamespace(NAMESPACE)
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("quantity", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("status", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("created_at", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(api -> api.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build();

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(model);
      System.out.println(
          "[LabIngestApiToParquet] ingest="
              + INGEST
              + " source=API target="
              + targetPath
              + " mode=DIRECT");

      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open(INGEST)) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(orderPayload(i)));
        }
        System.out.println("[LabIngestApiToParquet] runtime.queryCount=" + runtime.queryCount());
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(GROUP, NAMESPACE, INGEST);
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 20));
      System.out.println("[LabIngestApiToParquet] datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("[LabIngestApiToParquet] rows=" + result.rows().size());
      if (!result.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("[LabIngestApiToParquet] firstRow=" + result.rows().get(0));
      }
    }
  }

  private static String orderPayload(int index) {
    Instant createdAt = Instant.parse("2026-03-01T12:00:00Z").plusSeconds(index);
    return "{"
        + "\"order_id\":"
        + (1000 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"account_id\":"
        + (2000 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"quantity\":"
        + (10 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"price\":"
        + (100.5 + index)
        + ","
        + "\"status\":\"OPEN\","
        + "\"created_at\":\""
        + createdAt
        + "\","
        + "\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
        + "}\n";
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestJsonSmoke.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;

public final class LabIngestJsonSmoke {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");
  private static final String DEFAULT_INGEST = "orders_hist";
  private static final String QUERY_DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist");
  private static final int ROW_COUNT = 5;

  private LabIngestJsonSmoke() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String ingestName = normalizeArg(args);
    String payload = buildPayload();

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().direct().ingest().append(ingestName, new IngestPayloadJson(payload));
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(QUERY_DATASET_ID), 10));

      System.out.println("[LabIngestJsonSmoke] ingest=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("  datasetId=" + QUERY_DATASET_ID);
      System.out.println("  payloadRows=" + ROW_COUNT);
      System.out.println("  queryRowCount=" + result.rows().size());
      if (!result.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("  firstRow=" + result.rows().get(0));
      }
    }
  }

  private static String buildPayload() {
    StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder();
    for (int rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < ROW_COUNT; rowIndex++) {
      payload.append(buildJsonRow(rowIndex)).append('\n');
    }
    return payload.toString();
  }

  private static String buildJsonRow(int rowIndex) {
    Instant createdAt = Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z").plusSeconds(rowIndex);
    Instant updatedAt = createdAt.plusSeconds(30);
    long orderId = 1000L + rowIndex;
    long accountId = 2000L + (rowIndex % 2);
    long instrumentId = 3000L + rowIndex;
    int quantity = 10 + rowIndex;
    double price = 100.25d + rowIndex;
    String orderType = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "LIMIT" : "MARKET";
    String side = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "BUY" : "SELL";
    String status = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "OPEN" : "PARTIAL";

    return "{"
        + "\"order_id\":" + orderId + ","
        + "\"account_id\":" + accountId + ","
        + "\"instrument_id\":" + instrumentId + ","
        + "\"order_type\":\"" + orderType + "\","
        + "\"side\":\"" + side + "\","
        + "\"quantity\":" + quantity + ","
        + "\"price\":" + price + ","
        + "\"status\":\"" + status + "\","
        + "\"created_at\":\"" + createdAt + "\","
        + "\"created_date\":\"2026-02-13\","
        + "\"updated_at\":\"" + updatedAt + "\","
        + "\"date\":\"20260213\""
        + "}";
  }

  private static String normalizeArg(String[] args) {
    if (args == null || args.length == 0 || args[0] == null) {
      return DEFAULT_INGEST;
    }
    String value = args[0].trim();
    return value.isEmpty() ? DEFAULT_INGEST : value;
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestNvFixSmoke.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadNvFix;

public final class LabIngestNvFixSmoke {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");
  private static final String DEFAULT_INGEST = "orders_hist";
  private static final String QUERY_DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist");
  private static final int ROW_COUNT = 5;

  private LabIngestNvFixSmoke() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String ingestName = normalizeArg(args);
    String payload = buildPayload();

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().direct().ingest().append(ingestName, new IngestPayloadNvFix(payload));
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(QUERY_DATASET_ID), 10));

      System.out.println("[LabIngestNvFixSmoke] ingest=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("  datasetId=" + QUERY_DATASET_ID);
      System.out.println("  payloadRows=" + ROW_COUNT);
      System.out.println("  queryRowCount=" + result.rows().size());
      if (!result.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("  firstRow=" + result.rows().get(0));
      }
    }
  }

  private static String buildPayload() {
    StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder();
    for (int rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < ROW_COUNT; rowIndex++) {
      payload.append(buildNvFixRow(rowIndex)).append('\n');
    }
    return payload.toString();
  }

  private static String buildNvFixRow(int rowIndex) {
    Instant createdAt = Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z").plusSeconds(rowIndex);
    Instant updatedAt = createdAt.plusSeconds(30);
    long orderId = 1000L + rowIndex;
    long accountId = 2000L + (rowIndex % 2);
    long instrumentId = 3000L + rowIndex;
    int quantity = 10 + rowIndex;
    double price = 100.25d + rowIndex;
    String orderType = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "LIMIT" : "MARKET";
    String side = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "BUY" : "SELL";
    String status = rowIndex % 2 == 0 ? "OPEN" : "PARTIAL";

    return "order_id=" + orderId
        + "|account_id=" + accountId
        + "|instrument_id=" + instrumentId
        + "|order_type=" + orderType
        + "|side=" + side
        + "|quantity=" + quantity
        + "|price=" + price
        + "|status=" + status
        + "|created_at=" + createdAt
        + "|created_date=2026-02-13"
        + "|updated_at=" + updatedAt
        + "|date=20260213";
  }

  private static String normalizeArg(String[] args) {
    if (args == null || args.length == 0 || args[0] == null) {
      return DEFAULT_INGEST;
    }
    String value = args[0].trim();
    return value.isEmpty() ? DEFAULT_INGEST : value;
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestSmoke.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.memory.RootAllocator;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.BigIntVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.BitVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.DateDayVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.Float8Vector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.IntVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.TimeStampMicroVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VarCharVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VarBinaryVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VectorSchemaRoot;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.ipc.ArrowStreamWriter;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.DateUnit;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.FloatingPointPrecision;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.TimeUnit;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.ArrowType;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Field;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.FieldType;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class LabIngestSmoke {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final long MAX_ALLOCATOR_BYTES = 32L * 1024L * 1024L;
  private static final int ROW_COUNT = 5;

  // Fixed deterministic values
  private static final LocalDate FIXED_DATE = LocalDate.of(2026, 2, 13);
  private static final Instant FIXED_TS = Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z");
  private static final int FIXED_DATE_EPOCH_DAY = Math.toIntExact(FIXED_DATE.toEpochDay());
  private static final long FIXED_TS_EPOCH_MICROS =
      Math.addExact(
          Math.multiplyExact(FIXED_TS.getEpochSecond(), 1_000_000L), FIXED_TS.getNano() / 1_000L);

  // Hard-coded ingests to validate end-to-end
  private static final String[] INGESTS =
      new String[] {"orders_hist", "counterparties_hist", "instruments_hist", "positions_hist"};

  private LabIngestSmoke() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build();

    boolean allOk = true;

    try (session) {
      session.start();

      System.out.println("=== LabIngestSmoke ===");
      System.out.println("group=" + GROUP + " app=" + APP + " discovery=" + DISCOVERY + " user=" + KRB_USER);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + ROW_COUNT + " fixedDate=" + FIXED_DATE + " fixedTs=" + FIXED_TS);
      System.out.println();

      for (String ingestName : INGESTS) {
        boolean ok = runOne(session, ingestName);
        allOk = allOk && ok;
        System.out.println();
      }
    }

    if (!allOk) {
      System.err.println("FAILED: one or more ingests failed");
      System.exit(2);
    }
    System.out.println("SUCCESS: all ingests passed");
  }

  private static boolean runOne(Fabric.Session session, String ingestName) {
    long started = System.nanoTime();
    try {
      IngestModel ingest =
          session.data().direct().ingest().admin().getModel(ingestName)
              .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalStateException("Ingest not found: " + GROUP + "/" + ingestName));
      String outputSchemaId =
          Strings.trimToNull(ingest.schema() == null ? null : ingest.schema().getName());
      String resolvedSchemaId = requireNonBlank(outputSchemaId, "ingest.schemaId");
      String datasetCanonical = requireNonBlank(ingest.datasetId(), "ingest.datasetId");

      SchemaModel schemaModel =
          session
              .schemas()
              .get(resolvedSchemaId)
              .orElseThrow(
                  () ->
                      new IllegalStateException(
                          "Schema not found for outputSchemaId="
                              + resolvedSchemaId
                              + " in group="
                              + GROUP));
      Schema arrowSchema = toArrowSchema(schemaModel, ingestName, resolvedSchemaId);
      byte[] ipcBytes = buildDeterministicIpc(arrowSchema, ROW_COUNT);

      // Append
      session.data().direct().ingest().appendIpc(ingestName, ipcBytes);

      // Query back
      RowResult queryResult =
          session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetCanonical), 10));

      long elapsedMs = (System.nanoTime() - started) / 1_000_000L;

      System.out.println("[PASS] ingest=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("  datasetId=" + datasetCanonical);
      System.out.println("  outputSchemaId=" + resolvedSchemaId);
      System.out.println("  ipcByteLength=" + ipcBytes.length);
      System.out.println("  queryRowCount=" + queryResult.rows().size());
      if (!queryResult.rows().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("  firstRow=" + queryResult.rows().get(0));
      }
      System.out.println("  elapsedMs=" + elapsedMs);
      return true;
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      long elapsedMs = (System.nanoTime() - started) / 1_000_000L;
      System.err.println("[FAIL] ingest=" + ingestName + " elapsedMs=" + elapsedMs);
      System.err.println("  " + ex.getClass().getSimpleName() + ": " + Strings.trimToNull(ex.getMessage()));
      ex.printStackTrace(System.err);
      return false;
    }
  }

  private static Schema toArrowSchema(
      SchemaModel definitionSchema, String ingestName, String outputSchemaId) {
    if (definitionSchema.getFields().isEmpty()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Schema has no fields for ingest=" + ingestName + " outputSchemaId=" + outputSchemaId);
    }

    List<Field> arrowFields = new ArrayList<>();
    for (SchemaModel.Field fieldNode : definitionSchema.getFields()) {
      String fieldName = requireNonBlank(fieldNode.getName(), "field.name");
      boolean nullable = fieldNode.isNullable();
      ArrowType arrowType = toArrowType(fieldNode.getType(), fieldName, outputSchemaId);
      arrowFields.add(new Field(fieldName, new FieldType(nullable, arrowType, null, null), null));
    }
    return new Schema(arrowFields);
  }

  private static ArrowType toArrowType(
      SchemaModel.FieldType type, String fieldName, String outputSchemaId) {
    if (type == null) {
      throw unsupportedType(fieldName, outputSchemaId, null);
    }
    return switch (type) {
      case STRING -> new ArrowType.Utf8();
      case BOOL -> new ArrowType.Bool();
      case INT32 -> new ArrowType.Int(32, true);
      case INT64 -> new ArrowType.Int(64, true);
      case FLOAT64 -> new ArrowType.FloatingPoint(FloatingPointPrecision.DOUBLE);
      case DATE -> new ArrowType.Date(DateUnit.DAY);
      case TIMESTAMP -> new ArrowType.Timestamp(TimeUnit.MICROSECOND, null);
      case BINARY -> new ArrowType.Binary();
    };
  }

  private static byte[] buildDeterministicIpc(Schema schema, int rowCount) throws Exception {
    try (RootAllocator allocator = new RootAllocator(MAX_ALLOCATOR_BYTES);
        VectorSchemaRoot root = VectorSchemaRoot.create(schema, allocator);
        ByteArrayOutputStream out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        ArrowStreamWriter writer = new ArrowStreamWriter(root, null, out)) {
      root.allocateNew();
      for (FieldVector vector : root.getFieldVectors()) {
        writeVectorValues(vector, rowCount);
        vector.setValueCount(rowCount);
      }
      root.setRowCount(rowCount);
      writer.start();
      writer.writeBatch();
      writer.end();
      return out.toByteArray();
    }
  }

  private static void writeVectorValues(FieldVector vector, int rowCount) {
    String fieldName = vector.getField().getName();
    if (vector instanceof VarCharVector varchar) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        String value = "v_" + fieldName + "_" + row;
        varchar.setSafe(row, value.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof VarBinaryVector varBinary) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        String value = "b_" + fieldName + "_" + row;
        varBinary.setSafe(row, value.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof BitVector bitVector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        // Deterministic alternating pattern: true, false, true, false...
        bitVector.setSafe(row, (row % 2) == 0 ? 1 : 0);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof IntVector intVector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        intVector.setSafe(row, row);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof BigIntVector bigIntVector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        bigIntVector.setSafe(row, row);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof Float8Vector float8Vector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        float8Vector.setSafe(row, row + 0.5d);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof DateDayVector dateDayVector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        dateDayVector.setSafe(row, FIXED_DATE_EPOCH_DAY);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof TimeStampMicroVector timestampVector) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rowCount; row++) {
        timestampVector.setSafe(row, FIXED_TS_EPOCH_MICROS);
      }
      return;
    }
    throw new IllegalStateException(
        "Unsupported Arrow vector type for field "
            + fieldName
            + ": "
            + vector.getClass().getSimpleName());
  }

  private static IllegalStateException unsupportedType(
      String fieldName, String outputSchemaId, String typeToken) {
    return new IllegalStateException(
        "Unsupported schema type for field="
            + fieldName
            + " outputSchemaId="
            + outputSchemaId
            + " type="
            + typeToken);
  }

  private static String requireNonBlank(String value, String label) {
    String normalized = Strings.trimToNull(value);
    if (normalized == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(label + " is required");
    }
    return normalized;
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabIngestStress.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
import java.time.format.DateTimeParseException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Comparator;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import java.util.stream.Stream;
import org.apache.arrow.memory.RootAllocator;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.BigIntVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.BitVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.DateDayVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.Float4Vector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.Float8Vector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.IntVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.TimeStampMicroVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VarCharVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VarBinaryVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VectorSchemaRoot;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.ipc.ArrowStreamWriter;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.DateUnit;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.FloatingPointPrecision;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.TimeUnit;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.ArrowType;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Field;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.FieldType;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestTargetParquetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class LabIngestStress {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String DEFAULT_INGEST = "orders_hist";
  private static final int DEFAULT_PARTITIONS = 5;
  private static final int DEFAULT_APPENDS = 3;
  private static final int DEFAULT_ROWS_PER_APPEND = 5;
  private static final int QUERY_LIMIT = 1000;
  private static final int PRUNING_PARTITION = 20260215;
  private static final List<Integer> DEFAULT_PARTITION_VALUES =
      List.of(20260213, 20260214, 20260215, 20260216, 20260217);
  private static final LocalDate PARTITION_START = LocalDate.of(2026, 2, 13);
  private static final DateTimeFormatter BASIC_DATE = DateTimeFormatter.BASIC_ISO_DATE;
  private static final Pattern DATASET_FILE_NAME =
      Pattern.compile("^dataset_\\d{8}_\\d{6}_\\d{3}_(\\d+)\\.parquet$");
  private static final long MAX_ALLOCATOR_BYTES = 64L * 1024L * 1024L;
  private static final long BASE_TS_MICROS =
      Math.addExact(
          Math.multiplyExact(Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(), 1_000_000L),
          Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z").getNano() / 1_000L);

  private LabIngestStress() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Args config = Args.parse(args);
    int expectedRows = Math.multiplyExact(Math.multiplyExact(config.partitions(), config.appends()), config.rows());
    if (expectedRows > QUERY_LIMIT) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Expected rows exceed query limit "
              + QUERY_LIMIT
              + " (expected="
              + expectedRows
              + "). Reduce --partitions/--appends/--rows.");
    }
    List<Integer> partitions = partitionValues(config.partitions());

    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build();

    boolean success = false;
    try (session) {
      session.start();
      runScenario(session, config, partitions, expectedRows);
      success = true;
    } finally {
      if (!success) {
        System.err.println("FAILED: partition stress validation failed");
      }
    }

    if (!success) {
      System.exit(2);
    }
    System.out.println("SUCCESS: partition stress validation passed");
  }

  private static void runScenario(
      Fabric.Session session, Args config, List<Integer> partitions, int expectedRows) throws Exception {
    IngestModel ingest =
        session.data().direct().ingest().admin().getModel(config.ingest())
            .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalStateException("Ingest not found: " + GROUP + "/" + config.ingest()));
    String datasetCanonical = requireNonBlank(ingest.datasetId(), "ingest.datasetId");
    String outputSchemaId =
        requireNonBlank(
            Strings.trimToNull(ingest.schema() == null ? null : ingest.schema().getName()),
            "ingest.schemaId");

    SchemaModel schemaModel =
        session
            .schemas()
            .get(outputSchemaId)
            .orElseThrow(
                () ->
                    new IllegalStateException(
                        "Schema not found for outputSchemaId=" + outputSchemaId + " in group=" + GROUP));
    Schema arrowSchema = toArrowSchema(schemaModel, config.ingest(), outputSchemaId);

    IngestTargetParquetModel target = requireParquetTarget(ingest, datasetCanonical);
    Path datasetRoot = resolveDatasetRoot(target);
    validateDatasetPartitionConfig(target, datasetCanonical);

    System.out.println("=== LabIngestPartitionStress ===");
    System.out.println("group=" + GROUP + " app=" + APP + " discovery=" + DISCOVERY + " user=" + KRB_USER);
    System.out.println(
        "ingest="
            + config.ingest()
            + " datasetId="
            + datasetCanonical
            + " outputSchemaId="
            + outputSchemaId);
    System.out.println(
        "partitions="
            + partitions
            + " appendsPerPartition="
            + config.appends()
            + " rowsPerAppend="
            + config.rows()
            + " expectedRows="
            + expectedRows);
    System.out.println("datasetRoot=" + datasetRoot);

    clearTargetPartitions(datasetRoot, partitions);

    for (int partition : partitions) {
      LocalDate partitionDate = parsePartitionDate(partition);
      for (int appendIndex = 0; appendIndex < config.appends(); appendIndex++) {
        byte[] ipc =
            buildDeterministicIpc(
                arrowSchema, partition, partitionDate, appendIndex, config.rows());
        session.data().direct().ingest().appendIpc(config.ingest(), ipc);
        System.out.println(
            "appended partition=" + partition + " append=" + appendIndex + " rows=" + config.rows());
      }
    }

    RowResult queryResult =
        session
            .data()
            .direct()
            .rows()
            .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetCanonical), QUERY_LIMIT));
    summarizeQueryResult(queryResult, partitions, expectedRows);
    validatePartitionCounts(
        session, datasetCanonical, partitions, config.rows() * config.appends());
    validateDatasetFiles(datasetRoot, partitions, config.appends());
    runExplainPruningCheck(session, datasetCanonical);
  }

  private static void runExplainPruningCheck(Fabric.Session session, String datasetCanonical) {
    String sql =
        "EXPLAIN SELECT count(*) FROM "
            + LabSql.table(datasetCanonical)
            + " WHERE date = "
            + PRUNING_PARTITION;
    RowResult explainResult = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(sql);
    String explain = flattenResult(explainResult);
    String lower = explain.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT);

    System.out.println("--- EXPLAIN ---");
    System.out.println(explain);
    System.out.println("--- END EXPLAIN ---");

    if (!lower.contains(String.valueOf(PRUNING_PARTITION))
        && !lower.contains("date=" + PRUNING_PARTITION)) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "EXPLAIN output did not include pruning literal "
              + PRUNING_PARTITION
              + ". Output="
              + explain);
    }
    boolean parquetReferenced =
        lower.contains("read_parquet")
            || lower.contains("parquet_scan")
            || lower.contains("parquet scan");
    if (!parquetReferenced) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "EXPLAIN output did not reference parquet read/scan. Output=" + explain);
    }
  }

  private static void summarizeQueryResult(
      RowResult result, List<Integer> expectedPartitions, int expectedRows) {
    int returnedRows = result.rows().size();
    if (returnedRows != expectedRows) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Unexpected query row count. expected=" + expectedRows + " actual=" + returnedRows);
    }

    int dateColumn = indexOfColumn(result.columns(), "date");
    if (dateColumn < 0) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Query result does not contain required partition column 'date'. columns=" + result.columns());
    }

    LinkedHashSet<Integer> distinct = new LinkedHashSet<>();
    LinkedHashMap<Integer, List<Object>> sampleByPartition = new LinkedHashMap<>();
    for (List<Object> row : result.rows()) {
      int partition = toPartitionInt(row.get(dateColumn));
      distinct.add(partition);
      sampleByPartition.putIfAbsent(partition, row);
    }

    System.out.println("queryRows=" + returnedRows);
    System.out.println("distinctPartitions=" + distinct);
    for (Integer partition : expectedPartitions) {
      List<Object> sample = sampleByPartition.get(partition);
      if (sample == null) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("No sample row found for partition " + partition);
      }
      System.out.println("sample[" + partition + "]=" + sample);
    }

    Set<Integer> expected = new LinkedHashSet<>(expectedPartitions);
    if (!distinct.equals(expected)) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Unexpected partition set from query. expected=" + expected + " actual=" + distinct);
    }
  }

  private static void validatePartitionCounts(
      Fabric.Session session,
      String datasetCanonical,
      List<Integer> partitions,
      int expectedPerPartition) {
    RowResult counts =
        session.data().direct().rows()
            .querySql(
                "select date, count(*) as c from "
                    + LabSql.table(datasetCanonical)
                    + " group by date order by date");
    if (counts.rows().size() != partitions.size()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Unexpected partition count rows. expected="
              + partitions.size()
              + " actual="
              + counts.rows().size()
              + " rows="
              + counts.rows());
    }

    int dateIdx = indexOfColumn(counts.columns(), "date");
    int countIdx = indexOfColumn(counts.columns(), "c");
    if (dateIdx < 0 || countIdx < 0) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Expected columns 'date' and 'c' in partition count query. columns=" + counts.columns());
    }

    LinkedHashMap<Integer, Integer> actual = new LinkedHashMap<>();
    for (List<Object> row : counts.rows()) {
      int partition = toPartitionInt(row.get(dateIdx));
      Number countValue = requireNumber(row.get(countIdx), "count");
      actual.put(partition, countValue.intValue());
    }

    for (int partition : partitions) {
      Integer count = actual.get(partition);
      if (count == null || count.intValue() != expectedPerPartition) {
        throw new IllegalStateException(
            "Unexpected per-partition row count for "
                + partition
                + ". expected="
                + expectedPerPartition
                + " actual="
                + count
                + " map="
                + actual);
      }
    }
  }

  private static void validateDatasetFiles(
      Path datasetRoot, List<Integer> partitions, int expectedFilesPerPartition) throws IOException {
    LinkedHashSet<String> names = new LinkedHashSet<>();
    LinkedHashSet<Long> counters = new LinkedHashSet<>();
    int fileCount = 0;

    for (int partition : partitions) {
      Path partitionDir = datasetRoot.resolve("date=" + partition);
      if (!Files.isDirectory(partitionDir)) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("Missing partition directory: " + partitionDir);
      }
      List<Path> files;
      try (Stream<Path> stream = Files.list(partitionDir)) {
        files =
            stream
                .filter(Files::isRegularFile)
                .filter(path -> path.getFileName().toString().endsWith(".parquet"))
                .sorted()
                .toList();
      }
      if (files.size() != expectedFilesPerPartition) {
        throw new IllegalStateException(
            "Unexpected file count for partition "
                + partition
                + ". expected="
                + expectedFilesPerPartition
                + " actual="
                + files.size()
                + " files="
                + files);
      }

      System.out.println("files[" + partition + "]=" + files);

      for (Path file : files) {
        String name = file.getFileName().toString();
        Matcher matcher = DATASET_FILE_NAME.matcher(name);
        if (!matcher.matches()) {
          throw new IllegalStateException("Unexpected parquet file naming format: " + file);
        }
        String counterText = matcher.group(1);
        long counter = Long.parseLong(counterText);
        if (!names.add(name)) {
          throw new IllegalStateException("Duplicate parquet filename detected: " + name);
        }
        if (!counters.add(counter)) {
          throw new IllegalStateException("Duplicate parquet file counter detected: " + counter);
        }
        fileCount++;
      }
    }

    int expectedTotal = Math.multiplyExact(partitions.size(), expectedFilesPerPartition);
    if (fileCount != expectedTotal) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Unexpected total parquet file count. expected="
              + expectedTotal
              + " actual="
              + fileCount);
    }
  }

  private static void clearTargetPartitions(Path datasetRoot, List<Integer> partitions) throws IOException {
    for (int partition : partitions) {
      Path partitionDir = datasetRoot.resolve("date=" + partition);
      if (Files.notExists(partitionDir)) {
        continue;
      }
      try (Stream<Path> stream = Files.walk(partitionDir)) {
        List<Path> paths = stream.sorted(Comparator.reverseOrder()).toList();
        for (Path path : paths) {
          Files.deleteIfExists(path);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  private static byte[] buildDeterministicIpc(
      Schema schema, int partition, LocalDate partitionDate, int appendIndex, int rows) throws Exception {
    try (RootAllocator allocator = new RootAllocator(MAX_ALLOCATOR_BYTES);
        VectorSchemaRoot root = VectorSchemaRoot.create(schema, allocator);
        ByteArrayOutputStream out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        ArrowStreamWriter writer = new ArrowStreamWriter(root, null, out)) {
      root.allocateNew();
      for (FieldVector vector : root.getFieldVectors()) {
        writeVectorValues(vector, partition, partitionDate, appendIndex, rows);
        vector.setValueCount(rows);
      }
      root.setRowCount(rows);
      writer.start();
      writer.writeBatch();
      writer.end();
      return out.toByteArray();
    }
  }

  private static void writeVectorValues(
      FieldVector vector, int partition, LocalDate partitionDate, int appendIndex, int rows) {
    String fieldName = vector.getField().getName();
    int epochDay = Math.toIntExact(partitionDate.toEpochDay());

    if (vector instanceof VarCharVector varChar) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        String value;
        if ("date".equals(fieldName)) {
          value = String.valueOf(partition);
        } else {
          value = "v_" + fieldName + "_" + partition + "_" + appendIndex + "_" + row;
        }
        varChar.setSafe(row, value.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof VarBinaryVector varBinary) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        String value = "b_" + fieldName + "_" + partition + "_" + appendIndex + "_" + row;
        varBinary.setSafe(row, value.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof BitVector bit) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        bit.setSafe(row, (row % 2) == 0 ? 1 : 0);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof IntVector ints) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        int value;
        if ("date".equals(fieldName)) {
          value = partition;
        } else {
          value = deterministicInt(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row);
        }
        ints.setSafe(row, value);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof BigIntVector longs) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        long value;
        if ("date".equals(fieldName)) {
          value = partition;
        } else {
          value = deterministicLong(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row);
        }
        longs.setSafe(row, value);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof Float4Vector floats) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        floats.setSafe(row, (float) deterministicDouble(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof Float8Vector doubles) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        doubles.setSafe(row, deterministicDouble(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row));
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof DateDayVector dates) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        dates.setSafe(row, epochDay);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (vector instanceof TimeStampMicroVector timestamps) {
      for (int row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
        long value = BASE_TS_MICROS + (appendIndex * 1_000L) + row;
        timestamps.setSafe(row, value);
      }
      return;
    }

    throw new IllegalStateException(
        "Unsupported Arrow vector type for field "
            + fieldName
            + ": "
            + vector.getClass().getSimpleName());
  }

  private static int deterministicInt(String fieldName, int partition, int appendIndex, int row) {
    int seed = Math.abs(Objects.hash(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row));
    return 10_000 + (seed % 900_000);
  }

  private static long deterministicLong(String fieldName, int partition, int appendIndex, int row) {
    long seed = Integer.toUnsignedLong(Objects.hash(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row));
    return 1_000_000L + seed;
  }

  private static double deterministicDouble(String fieldName, int partition, int appendIndex, int row) {
    int seed = Math.abs(Objects.hash(fieldName, partition, appendIndex, row));
    return (seed % 10_000) / 100.0d;
  }

  private static IngestTargetParquetModel requireParquetTarget(
      IngestModel ingest, String datasetCanonical) {
    IngestTargetModel target = ingest.target();
    if (!(target instanceof IngestTargetParquetModel parquet)) {
      String targetType = target == null ? "null" : target.getClass().getSimpleName();
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Ingest target is not PARQUET: " + datasetCanonical + " targetType=" + targetType);
    }
    return parquet;
  }

  private static void validateDatasetPartitionConfig(
      IngestTargetParquetModel parquet, String datasetCanonical) {
    if (!Boolean.TRUE.equals(parquet.hivePartitioning())) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Dataset hivePartitioning must be true: " + datasetCanonical);
    }
    String partitionKey = Strings.trimToNull(parquet.partitionKey());
    if (!"date".equals(partitionKey)) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Dataset partitionKey must be 'date': "
              + datasetCanonical
              + " partitionKey="
              + parquet.partitionKey());
    }
  }

  private static Path resolveDatasetRoot(IngestTargetParquetModel target) {
    String uri = requireNonBlank(target.parquetPath(), "dataset.parquet.parquetPath");
    if (uri.regionMatches(true, 0, "s3://", 0, "s3://".length())) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("S3 parquet uri is not supported for local file validation: " + uri);
    }
    return Path.of(uri).toAbsolutePath().normalize();
  }

  private static Schema toArrowSchema(
      SchemaModel definitionSchema, String ingestName, String outputSchemaId) {
    if (definitionSchema.getFields().isEmpty()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Schema has no fields for ingest=" + ingestName + " outputSchemaId=" + outputSchemaId);
    }

    List<Field> arrowFields = new ArrayList<>();
    for (SchemaModel.Field fieldNode : definitionSchema.getFields()) {
      String fieldName = requireNonBlank(fieldNode.getName(), "field.name");
      boolean nullable = fieldNode.isNullable();
      ArrowType arrowType = toArrowType(fieldNode.getType(), fieldName, outputSchemaId);
      arrowFields.add(new Field(fieldName, new FieldType(nullable, arrowType, null, null), null));
    }
    return new Schema(arrowFields);
  }

  private static ArrowType toArrowType(
      SchemaModel.FieldType type, String fieldName, String outputSchemaId) {
    if (type == null) {
      throw unsupportedType(fieldName, outputSchemaId, null);
    }
    return switch (type) {
      case STRING -> new ArrowType.Utf8();
      case BOOL -> new ArrowType.Bool();
      case INT32 -> new ArrowType.Int(32, true);
      case INT64 -> new ArrowType.Int(64, true);
      case FLOAT64 -> new ArrowType.FloatingPoint(FloatingPointPrecision.DOUBLE);
      case DATE -> new ArrowType.Date(DateUnit.DAY);
      case TIMESTAMP -> new ArrowType.Timestamp(TimeUnit.MICROSECOND, null);
      case BINARY -> new ArrowType.Binary();
    };
  }

  private static IllegalStateException unsupportedType(
      String fieldName, String outputSchemaId, String typeToken) {
    return new IllegalStateException(
        "Unsupported schema type for field="
            + fieldName
            + " outputSchemaId="
            + outputSchemaId
