            + " type="
            + typeToken);
  }

  private static List<Integer> partitionValues(int partitionCount) {
    if (partitionCount <= 0) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("partitionCount must be > 0");
    }
    if (partitionCount <= DEFAULT_PARTITION_VALUES.size()) {
      return DEFAULT_PARTITION_VALUES.subList(0, partitionCount);
    }
    List<Integer> values = new ArrayList<>(partitionCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < partitionCount; i++) {
      LocalDate day = PARTITION_START.plusDays(i);
      values.add(Integer.parseInt(BASIC_DATE.format(day)));
    }
    return List.copyOf(values);
  }

  private static LocalDate parsePartitionDate(int partition) {
    String text = String.valueOf(partition);
    try {
      return LocalDate.parse(text, BASIC_DATE);
    } catch (DateTimeParseException ex) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Invalid partition date value: " + partition, ex);
    }
  }

  private static int indexOfColumn(List<String> columns, String name) {
    for (int i = 0; i < columns.size(); i++) {
      if (name.equalsIgnoreCase(columns.get(i))) {
        return i;
      }
    }
    return -1;
  }

  private static int toPartitionInt(Object value) {
    if (value == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Partition value is null");
    }
    if (value instanceof Number number) {
      return number.intValue();
    }
    String text = Strings.trimToNull(String.valueOf(value));
    if (text == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Partition value is blank");
    }
    if (text.length() == 10 && text.charAt(4) == '-' && text.charAt(7) == '-') {
      text = text.replace("-", "");
    }
    if (text.length() != 8 || !text.chars().allMatch(Character::isDigit)) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Unexpected partition value format: " + value);
    }
    return Integer.parseInt(text);
  }

  private static Number requireNumber(Object value, String label) {
    if (!(value instanceof Number number)) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(
          "Expected numeric value for " + label + " but found " + String.valueOf(value));
    }
    return number;
  }

  private static String flattenResult(RowResult result) {
    return result.rows().stream()
        .map(
            row ->
                row.stream()
                    .map(cell -> cell == null ? "null" : String.valueOf(cell))
                    .collect(Collectors.joining(" | ")))
        .collect(Collectors.joining(System.lineSeparator()));
  }

  private static String requireNonBlank(String value, String label) {
    String normalized = Strings.trimToNull(value);
    if (normalized == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException(label + " is required");
    }
    return normalized;
  }

  private record Args(String ingest, int partitions, int appends, int rows) {
    private static Args parse(String[] args) {
      String ingest = DEFAULT_INGEST;
      int partitions = DEFAULT_PARTITIONS;
      int appends = DEFAULT_APPENDS;
      int rows = DEFAULT_ROWS_PER_APPEND;

      int idx = 0;
      while (idx < args.length) {
        String arg = Strings.trimToNull(args[idx]);
        if (arg == null) {
          idx++;
          continue;
        }
        switch (arg) {
          case "--ingest" -> {
            ingest = requireArgValue(args, ++idx, "--ingest");
            idx++;
          }
          case "--partitions" -> {
            partitions = parsePositiveInt(requireArgValue(args, ++idx, "--partitions"), "--partitions");
            idx++;
          }
          case "--appends" -> {
            appends = parsePositiveInt(requireArgValue(args, ++idx, "--appends"), "--appends");
            idx++;
          }
          case "--rows" -> {
            rows = parsePositiveInt(requireArgValue(args, ++idx, "--rows"), "--rows");
            idx++;
          }
          default -> {
            if (arg.startsWith("--")) {
              throw new IllegalStateException("Unknown argument: " + arg);
            }
            ingest = arg;
            idx++;
          }
        }
      }

      return new Args(ingest, partitions, appends, rows);
    }

    private static String requireArgValue(String[] args, int index, String flag) {
      if (index >= args.length) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("Missing value for argument " + flag);
      }
      String value = Strings.trimToNull(args[index]);
      if (value == null) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("Blank value for argument " + flag);
      }
      return value;
    }

    private static int parsePositiveInt(String value, String flag) {
      try {
        int parsed = Integer.parseInt(value);
        if (parsed <= 0) {
          throw new IllegalStateException(flag + " must be > 0: " + value);
        }
        return parsed;
      } catch (NumberFormatException ex) {
        throw new IllegalStateException(flag + " must be an integer: " + value, ex);
      }
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/data/LabSchemaSample.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.data;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.InferredField;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleResult;

public final class LabSchemaSample {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "client";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");
  private static final String DEFAULT_INGEST = "orders_hist";

  private LabSchemaSample() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String ingestName = normalizeArg(args);

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      SchemaSampleResult result = session.schemas().sample(ingestName, SchemaSampleOptions.defaults());

      System.out.println("[LabSchemaSample] ingest=" + result.ingestName());
      System.out.println("  format=" + result.format());
      System.out.println("  sampledMessages=" + result.sampledMessages());
      System.out.println("  sampledBytes=" + result.sampledBytes());
      System.out.println("  fields:");
      for (InferredField field : result.inferredFields()) {
        System.out.println(
            "    - "
                + field.name()
                + " : "
                + field.arrowTypeToken()
                + " nullable="
                + field.nullable());
      }
      System.out.println("  recommendedSchemaJson=");
      System.out.println(result.recommendedSchemaJson());
    }
  }

  private static String normalizeArg(String[] args) {
    if (args == null || args.length == 0 || args[0] == null) {
      return DEFAULT_INGEST;
    }
    String value = args[0].trim();
    return value.isEmpty() ? DEFAULT_INGEST : value;
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/GoldenSuite.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Callable;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics.GoldenAmpsConfigTail;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics.GoldenDirectQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics.GoldenDirectTabularQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics.GoldenSessionBootstrap;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest.GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest.GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest.GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest.GoldenApiIngestToParquet;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.parquet.GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.schemas.GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.schemas.GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql.GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql.GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql.GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceIngestFlight;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceListTables;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceGetTableSchema;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceRoutingResilience;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamResume;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamFiltered;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services.GoldenServiceStreamCancel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.views.GoldenViewRefreshGraph;

public final class GoldenSuite {

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenSuite ===");

    List<Map.Entry<String, Callable<Void>>> demos =
        List.of(
            Map.entry(
                GoldenSessionBootstrap.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenSessionBootstrap.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenDirectQuery.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenDirectQuery.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenDirectTabularQuery.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenDirectTabularQuery.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenApiIngestToParquet.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenApiIngestToParquet.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceIngestFlight.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceIngestFlight.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceListTables.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceListTables.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceGetTableSchema.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceGetTableSchema.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamResume.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamResume.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamFiltered.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamFiltered.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceStreamCancel.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceStreamCancel.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenServiceRoutingResilience.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenServiceRoutingResilience.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenViewRefreshGraph.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenViewRefreshGraph.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }),
            Map.entry(
                GoldenAmpsConfigTail.class.getName(),
                () -> {
                  GoldenAmpsConfigTail.main(new String[0]);
                  return null;
                }));

    int total = demos.size();
    int passed = 0;
    List<String> failed = new ArrayList<>();
    for (Map.Entry<String, Callable<Void>> demo : demos) {
      String className = demo.getKey();
      try {
        demo.getValue().call();
        passed++;
      } catch (Throwable t) {
        failed.add(className);
        String message = t.getMessage();
        if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
          message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
        }
        System.out.println("suiteFailure=" + className + " reason=" + message);
      }
    }

    int failedCount = failed.size();
    System.out.println("TOTAL=" + total);
    System.out.println("PASSED=" + passed);
    System.out.println("FAILED=" + failedCount);
    System.out.println("FAILED_CLASSES=" + failed);
    if (failedCount == 0) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: golden suite has failing demos");
    throw new IllegalStateException("GoldenSuite failed demos: " + failed);
  }
}

org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/basics/GoldenAmpsConfigTail.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;

public final class GoldenAmpsConfigTail {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenAmpsConfigTail ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      AtomicInteger received = new AtomicInteger();
      AtomicInteger nonEmpty = new AtomicInteger();

      try (AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps("amps-fabric-discovery");
          AmpsConnection.Subscription ignored =
              amps.sowAndSubscribe(
                  AmpsConnection.SubscriptionSpec.builder()
                      .withSowSubscribe(true)
                      .withTopic("/fabric/discovery")
                      .build(),
                  message -> {
                    int index = received.incrementAndGet();
                    String payload = message.data() == null ? "" : message.data();
                    if (!payload.isBlank()) {
                      nonEmpty.incrementAndGet();
                    }
                    if (index <= 3) {
                      String singleLine = payload.replace('\r', ' ').replace('\n', ' ');
                      if (singleLine.length() > 200) {
                        singleLine = singleLine.substring(0, 200);
                      }
                      System.out.println("message" + index + "=" + singleLine);
                    }
                  })) {
        Thread.sleep(2_000L);
      }

      System.out.println("receivedCount=" + received.get());
      System.out.println("nonEmptyCount=" + nonEmpty.get());
      pass = nonEmpty.get() > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected at least one non-empty message";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/basics/GoldenDirectQuery.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;

public final class GoldenDirectQuery {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenDirectQuery ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      RowResult result =
          session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist")), 5));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "query returned zero rows";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/basics/GoldenDirectTabularQuery.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Bytes;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;

public final class GoldenDirectTabularQuery {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenDirectTabularQuery ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ByteBuffer ipc =
          session.data().direct().tabular()
              .queryIpcBuffer(
                  new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist")), 5));
      System.out.println("ipcBytes=" + ipc.remaining());
      System.out.println("schemaHash=" + hexPrefix(Bytes.toByteArray(ipc), 16));
      pass = ipc.hasRemaining();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected ipc bytes > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static String hexPrefix(byte[] value, int maxBytes) {
    if (value == null || value.length == 0 || maxBytes <= 0) {
      return "";
    }
    int length = Math.min(value.length, maxBytes);
    StringBuilder hex = new StringBuilder(length * 2);
    for (int i = 0; i < length; i++) {
      int current = value[i] & 0xFF;
      hex.append(Character.forDigit((current >>> 4) & 0xF, 16));
      hex.append(Character.forDigit(current & 0xF, 16));
    }
    return hex.toString();
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/basics/GoldenSessionBootstrap.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.basics;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;

public final class GoldenSessionBootstrap {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenSessionBootstrap ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      boolean ok = session.data().direct().rows().check();
      System.out.println("ok=" + ok);
      pass = ok;
      if (!ok) {
        failReason = "session.data().direct().rows().check() returned false";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}




org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/ingest/GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenAmpsIngestAgentJsonToParquet ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-amps-ingest-agent-json-to-parquet")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_amps_orders_json_parquet";
      String topic = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, true)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withFormat(IngestFormat.JSON)
                          .withConnectionName("amps-fabric-json")
                          .withTopic(topic)
                          .withSowSubscribe(true)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withOptions("oof"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target.withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString()))
              .build());

      IngestModel sampled = session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(ingestName, SchemaSampleOptions.defaults());

      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().start(ingestName);
          AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps("amps-fabric-json")) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          amps.publish(
              topic,
              "{"
                  + "\"order_id\":"
                  + (3000 + i)
                  + ",\"account_id\":"
                  + (4000 + i)
                  + ",\"qty\":"
                  + (30 + i)
                  + ",\"price\":"
                  + (50.5 + i)
                  + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                  + "}\n");
        }
        Thread.sleep(2_000L);
        session.data().direct().ingest().stop(ingestName);
        System.out.println("runtimeQueryCount=" + runtime.queryCount());
      }

      RowResult result =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName)), 5));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("sampledFields=" + sampled.schema().getFields().size());
      System.out.println("publishedMessages=5");
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/ingest/GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenAmpsIngestAgentNvFixToParquet ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-amps-ingest-agent-nvfix-to-parquet")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_amps_orders_nvfix_parquet";
      String topic = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/nvfix";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, true)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withFormat(IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                          .withConnectionName("amps-fabric-nvfix")
                          .withTopic(topic)
                          .withSowSubscribe(true)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withOptions("oof")
                          .withNvFixPairDelimiter("|")
                          .withNvFixKvDelimiter("=")
                          .withNvFixTrimKeys(true)
                          .withNvFixTrimValues(true))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target.withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString()))
              .build());

      IngestModel sampled = session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(ingestName, SchemaSampleOptions.defaults());

      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().start(ingestName);
          AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps("amps-fabric-nvfix")) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          amps.publish(
              topic,
              "order_id="
                  + (5000 + i)
                  + "|account_id="
                  + (6000 + i)
                  + "|qty="
                  + (40 + i)
                  + "|price="
                  + (70.75 + i)
                  + "|date=2026-03-01");
        }
        Thread.sleep(2_000L);
        session.data().direct().ingest().stop(ingestName);
        System.out.println("runtimeQueryCount=" + runtime.queryCount());
      }

      RowResult result =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName)), 5));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("sampledFields=" + sampled.schema().getFields().size());
      System.out.println("publishedMessages=5");
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/ingest/GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntimeStatus;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenAmpsSampleRegisterRunJsonToParquet ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-amps-sample-register-run-json-to-parquet")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_amps_sample_register_run_json_parquet";
      String topic = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, true)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withFormat(IngestFormat.JSON)
                          .withConnectionName("amps-fabric-json")
                          .withTopic(topic)
                          .withSowSubscribe(true)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withOptions("oof"))
              .withTargetParquet(target -> target.withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString()))
              .build());

      try (AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps("amps-fabric-json")) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          amps.publish(
              topic,
              "{"
                  + "\"order_id\":"
                  + (11_000 + i)
                  + ",\"account_id\":"
                  + (12_000 + i)
                  + ",\"qty\":"
                  + (70 + i)
                  + ",\"price\":"
                  + (151.5 + i)
                  + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                  + "}\n");
        }
      }

      IngestModel sampled = session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(ingestName, SchemaSampleOptions.defaults());

      IngestRuntimeStatus runtimeStatus;
      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().start(ingestName);
          AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps("amps-fabric-json")) {
        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          amps.publish(
              topic,
              "{"
                  + "\"order_id\":"
                  + (12_000 + i)
                  + ",\"account_id\":"
                  + (13_000 + i)
                  + ",\"qty\":"
                  + (80 + i)
                  + ",\"price\":"
                  + (171.5 + i)
                  + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                  + "}\n");
        }
        Thread.sleep(2_000L);
        runtimeStatus = runtime.status();
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      RowResult countResult =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .querySql("select count(*) as row_count from " + LabSql.table(datasetId), 1);
      long rowCount =
          countResult.rows().isEmpty() || countResult.rows().get(0).isEmpty()
              ? 0L
              : ((Number) countResult.rows().get(0).get(0)).longValue();
      RowResult firstRowResult = session.data().direct().rows().query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(datasetId), 1));
      List<Object> firstRow = firstRowResult.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : firstRowResult.rows().get(0);

      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("sampledFields=" + sampled.schema().getFields().size());
      System.out.println("runtimeRows=" + runtimeStatus.rows());
      System.out.println("runtimeLastError=" + runtimeStatus.lastError());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);

      pass = sampled.schema().getFields().size() >= 2 && rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected sampled fields >= 2 and rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/ingest/GoldenApiIngestToParquet.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.ingest;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenApiIngestToParquet {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenApiIngestToParquet ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_api_orders_parquet";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build());

      for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"order_id\":"
                    + (1000 + i)
                    + ",\"account_id\":"
                    + (2000 + i)
                    + ",\"qty\":"
                    + (10 + i)
                    + ",\"price\":"
                    + (100.25 + i)
                    + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }

      RowResult result =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName)), 5));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("ingestName=" + ingestName);
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=5");
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount >= 5;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount >= 5";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.parquet

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/parquet/GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.parquet;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.parquet.ParquetCompactionOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.parquet.ParquetMaintenanceResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenParquetMaintenanceCompact ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_parquet_compact_orders";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build());

      for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"order_id\":"
                    + (9000 + i)
                    + ",\"qty\":"
                    + (50 + i)
                    + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName);
      ParquetMaintenanceResult result =
          session.data()
              .direct()
              .parquet()
              .compactDataset(datasetId.toString(), new ParquetCompactionOptions(2, 4, 8, false));

      System.out.println("datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("filesRead=" + result.filesRead());
      System.out.println("filesWritten=" + result.filesWritten());
      System.out.println("durationMs=" + result.durationMs());
      pass = result.filesRead() > 0 && result.durationMs() > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected filesRead > 0 and durationMs > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}






org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.schemas

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/schemas/GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.schemas;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.Optional;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaType;

public final class GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenSchemaRegisterUpdateDelete ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String schemaName = "golden_schema_orders";
      if (session.schemas().exists(schemaName)) {
        session.schemas().delete(schemaName);
      }
      boolean cleanStart = !session.schemas().exists(schemaName);

      SchemaModel v1 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
              .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
              .build();
      SchemaModel registeredV1 = session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, v1);
      Optional<SchemaModel> fetchedV1 = session.schemas().get(schemaName);
      boolean v1Matches =
          fetchedV1.isPresent()
              && registeredV1.getFields().size() == 3
              && fetchedV1.get().getFields().size() == 3
              && registeredV1.getHash() != null
              && registeredV1.getHash().equals(fetchedV1.get().getHash());

      SchemaModel v2 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
              .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
              .withField("comment", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .build();
      session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, v2);
      Optional<SchemaModel> fetchedV2 = session.schemas().get(schemaName);
      boolean v2Accepted =
          fetchedV2.isPresent()
              && fetchedV2.get().getFields().size() == 4
              && fetchedV2.get().getFields().stream()
                  .anyMatch(field -> "comment".equals(field.getName()) && field.isNullable());

      boolean incompatibleRejected = false;
      String rejectionReason = "";
      SchemaModel v3 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
              .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
              .withField("comment", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .build();
      try {
        session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, v3);
      } catch (IllegalArgumentException expected) {
        incompatibleRejected = true;
        rejectionReason = expected.getMessage();
      }

      session.schemas().delete(schemaName);
      boolean deleted = !session.schemas().exists(schemaName);
      System.out.println("cleanStart=" + cleanStart);
      System.out.println("v1Matches=" + v1Matches);
      System.out.println("v2Accepted=" + v2Accepted);
      System.out.println("incompatibleRejected=" + incompatibleRejected);
      System.out.println("expectedFailureReason=" + rejectionReason);
      System.out.println("deleted=" + deleted);

      pass =
          cleanStart
              && v1Matches
              && v2Accepted
              && incompatibleRejected
              && deleted;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "unexpected schema workflow result";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/schemas/GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.schemas;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaType;

public final class GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenSchemaVersioningAndSelection ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String schemaName = "golden_schema_version_demo";
      deleteSchemaFamily(session, schemaName);

      SchemaModel v1 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("a", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("b", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .build();
      SchemaModel registeredV1 = session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, v1);

      SchemaModel v2 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("a", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("b", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .withField("c", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .build();
      SchemaModel registeredV2 = session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, v2);

      List<SchemaModel> versions = session.schemas().listVersions(schemaName);
      Optional<SchemaModel> selectedV1 = session.schemas().getVersion(schemaName, 1);
      Optional<SchemaModel> selectedV2 = session.schemas().getVersion(schemaName, 2);

      System.out.println(
          "v1VersionNum="
              + selectedV1.map(SchemaModel::getVersionNum).orElse(null)
              + " fieldCount="
              + selectedV1.map(s -> s.getFields().size()).orElse(0));
      System.out.println(
          "v2VersionNum="
              + selectedV2.map(SchemaModel::getVersionNum).orElse(null)
              + " fieldCount="
              + selectedV2.map(s -> s.getFields().size()).orElse(0));

      boolean rejected = false;
      String rejectionReason = "";
      SchemaModel breakingV3 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
              .withField("a", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
              .withField("b", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .withField("c", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
              .build();
      try {
        session.schemas().register(schemaName, SchemaType.TABULAR, breakingV3);
      } catch (IllegalArgumentException expected) {
        rejected = true;
        rejectionReason =
            expected.getMessage() == null || expected.getMessage().isBlank()
                ? expected.getClass().getSimpleName()
                : expected.getMessage();
      }

      Optional<SchemaModel> canonical = session.schemas().get(schemaName);
      boolean canonicalRemainsV2 =
          canonical.isPresent()
              && canonical.get().getVersionNum() != null
              && canonical.get().getVersionNum() == 2
              && canonical.get().getFields().size() == 3;

      System.out.println("versionsCount=" + versions.size());
      System.out.println("breakingRejected=" + rejected);
      System.out.println("breakingReason=" + rejectionReason);
      System.out.println("canonicalVersionNum=" + canonical.map(SchemaModel::getVersionNum).orElse(null));
      System.out.println("canonicalFieldCount=" + canonical.map(s -> s.getFields().size()).orElse(0));

      pass =
          registeredV1.getVersionNum() != null
              && registeredV1.getVersionNum() == 1
              && registeredV2.getVersionNum() != null
              && registeredV2.getVersionNum() == 2
              && versions.size() == 2
              && selectedV1.isPresent()
              && selectedV2.isPresent()
              && rejected
              && canonicalRemainsV2;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "unexpected schema versioning/selection result";
      }

      deleteSchemaFamily(session, schemaName);
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static void deleteSchemaFamily(Fabric.Session session, String schemaName) {
    LinkedHashSet<String> names = new LinkedHashSet<>();
    for (SchemaModel version : session.schemas().listVersions(schemaName)) {
      String name = version == null ? null : version.getName();
      if (name != null && !name.isBlank()) {
        names.add(name);
      }
    }
    names.add(schemaName);
    for (String name : names) {
      if (session.schemas().exists(name)) {
        session.schemas().delete(name);
      }
    }
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.memory.RootAllocator;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VectorSchemaRoot;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.ipc.ArrowStreamReader;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.DateUnit;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.FloatingPointPrecision;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.ArrowType;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Field;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Bytes;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenDualPlaneRemoteToLocalJoin ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    String materializedIngest = "golden_dual_remote_orders";
    String referenceIngest = "golden_dual_account_ref";
    String remoteSql =
        "select cast(order_id as bigint) as order_id, "
            + "cast(account_id as bigint) as account_id, "
            + "cast(qty as integer) as qty "
            + "from orders_hist limit 25";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-dual-plane-remote-to-local-join")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ByteBuffer remoteIpc = session.data().service().tabular().queryIpcBuffer(remoteSql);
      SchemaModel remoteSchema = schemaModelFromIpc(remoteIpc, "orders_hist_remote");

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(materializedIngest)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(remoteSchema)
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetDuckDbActive(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withTableName(materializedIngest)
                          .withPrimaryKey(List.of("order_id"))
                          .withMemory(true))
              .build());
      session
          .data()
          .direct()
          .ingest()
          .appendIpc(materializedIngest, Bytes.toByteArray(remoteIpc));

      List<Long> accountIds =
          distinctAccountIds(
              session.data().direct().rows().querySql(
                  "select distinct account_id from "
                      + datasetSqlToken(materializedIngest)
                      + " order by account_id limit 3"));
      if (accountIds.isEmpty()) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("Expected at least one account_id after materialization");
      }

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(referenceIngest)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetDuckDbActive(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withTableName(referenceIngest)
                          .withPrimaryKey(List.of("account_id"))
                          .withMemory(true))
              .build());

      for (int i = 0; i < accountIds.size(); i++) {
        long accountId = accountIds.get(i);
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(
            referenceIngest,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"account_id\":"
                    + accountId
                    + ",\"desk\":\"desk_"
                    + (i + 1)
                    + "\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }

      String joinSql =
          "from "
              + datasetSqlToken(materializedIngest)
              + " m join "
              + datasetSqlToken(referenceIngest)
              + " r on m.account_id = r.account_id";
      RowResult countResult = session.data().direct().rows().querySql("select count(*) as c " + joinSql);
      long joinRowCount = firstLong(countResult, "c");

      RowResult firstRowResult =
          session
              .data()
              .direct()
              .rows()
              .querySql(
                  "select m.order_id, m.account_id, r.desk "
                      + joinSql
                      + " order by m.order_id limit 1");
      List<Object> firstRow = firstRowResult.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : firstRowResult.rows().get(0);

      System.out.println("remoteSql=" + remoteSql);
      System.out.println("remoteIpcBytes=" + remoteIpc.remaining());
      System.out.println("materializedIngest=" + materializedIngest);
      System.out.println("referenceIngest=" + referenceIngest);
      System.out.println("joinRowCount=" + joinRowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);

      pass = joinRowCount > 0 && !firstRow.isEmpty();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected joinRowCount > 0 and non-empty firstRow";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static SchemaModel schemaModelFromIpc(ByteBuffer ipcBuffer, String schemaName) {
    if (ipcBuffer == null || !ipcBuffer.hasRemaining()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Arrow IPC bytes are required");
    }
    try (RootAllocator allocator = new RootAllocator(16L * 1024L * 1024L);
        ArrowStreamReader reader =
            new ArrowStreamReader(Bytes.asInputStream(ipcBuffer), allocator)) {
      VectorSchemaRoot root = reader.getVectorSchemaRoot();
      List<Field> fields = root.getSchema().getFields();
      if (fields.isEmpty()) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("Remote Arrow IPC schema is empty");
      }
      SchemaModel.Builder builder = SchemaModel.builder();
      for (Field field : fields) {
        String name = Strings.requireNonBlank(field.getName(), "Arrow field name");
        builder.withField(name, toSchemaFieldType(field.getType(), name), field.isNullable());
      }
      SchemaModel model = builder.build();
      if (indexOfField(model, "order_id") < 0 || indexOfField(model, "account_id") < 0) {
        throw new IllegalStateException(
            "Remote schema must include order_id and account_id fields for join demo");
      }
      return model.toBuilder().withName(schemaName).build();
    } catch (Exception ex) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Failed to parse remote Arrow IPC schema", ex);
    }
  }

  private static int indexOfField(SchemaModel model, String name) {
    for (int i = 0; i < model.getFields().size(); i++) {
      SchemaModel.Field field = model.getFields().get(i);
      if (name.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getName())) {
        return i;
      }
    }
    return -1;
  }

  private static SchemaModel.FieldType toSchemaFieldType(ArrowType type, String fieldName) {
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Int intType) {
      return intType.getBitWidth() <= 32 ? SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32 : SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64;
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.FloatingPoint floatingType) {
      if (floatingType.getPrecision() == FloatingPointPrecision.SINGLE
          || floatingType.getPrecision() == FloatingPointPrecision.DOUBLE) {
        return SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64;
      }
      throw unsupportedType(fieldName, type);
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Utf8
        || type instanceof ArrowType.LargeUtf8
        || type instanceof ArrowType.Utf8View) {
      return SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING;
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Bool) {
      return SchemaModel.FieldType.BOOL;
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Date dateType) {
      if (dateType.getUnit() == DateUnit.DAY) {
        return SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE;
      }
      throw unsupportedType(fieldName, type);
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Timestamp) {
      return SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP;
    }
    if (type instanceof ArrowType.Binary
        || type instanceof ArrowType.LargeBinary
        || type instanceof ArrowType.BinaryView
        || type instanceof ArrowType.FixedSizeBinary) {
      return SchemaModel.FieldType.BINARY;
    }
    throw unsupportedType(fieldName, type);
  }

  private static IllegalStateException unsupportedType(String fieldName, ArrowType type) {
    return new IllegalStateException(
        "Unsupported remote Arrow type for field " + fieldName + ": " + String.valueOf(type));
  }

  private static List<Long> distinctAccountIds(RowResult rows) {
    int index = indexOfColumn(rows.columns(), "account_id");
    if (index < 0) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected account_id column in materialized query result");
    }
    List<Long> ids = new ArrayList<>();
    for (List<Object> row : rows.rows()) {
      if (row == null || row.size() <= index) {
        continue;
      }
      Object value = row.get(index);
      if (value instanceof Number number) {
        ids.add(number.longValue());
      } else if (value != null) {
        ids.add(Long.parseLong(value.toString()));
      }
    }
    return ids;
  }

  private static int indexOfColumn(List<String> columns, String columnName) {
    for (int i = 0; i < columns.size(); i++) {
      if (columnName.equalsIgnoreCase(columns.get(i))) {
        return i;
      }
    }
    return -1;
  }

  private static long firstLong(RowResult rows, String column) {
    int index = indexOfColumn(rows.columns(), column);
    if (index < 0 || rows.rows().isEmpty()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected non-empty result with column " + column);
    }
    Object value = rows.rows().get(0).get(index);
    if (value instanceof Number number) {
      return number.longValue();
    }
    return Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(value));
  }

  private static String datasetSqlToken(String datasetName) {
    return quoteIdentifier("default") + "." + quoteIdentifier(datasetName);
  }

  private static String quoteIdentifier(String identifier) {
    return "\"" + identifier.replace("\"", "\"\"") + "\"";
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularTableMetadata;

public final class GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceDiscoverStreamDatasets ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-discover-stream-datasets")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      List<TabularTableMetadata> streamTables =
          session.data().service().tabular().listTables().stream()
              .filter(table -> "STREAM".equalsIgnoreCase(table.tableType()))
              .toList();
      System.out.println("streamDatasetCount=" + streamTables.size());
      for (TabularTableMetadata table : streamTables) {
        System.out.println(
            "streamDataset="
                + table.catalogName()
                + "."
                + table.schemaName()
                + "."
                + table.tableName());
      }
      pass = !streamTables.isEmpty();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected at least one STREAM dataset";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceGetTableSchema.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
