import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Field;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;

public final class GoldenServiceGetTableSchema {
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist");

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceGetTableSchema ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-get-table-schema")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      Schema schema = LabSql.getSchemaFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID);
      System.out.println("datasetId=" + DATASET_ID);
      System.out.println("fieldCount=" + schema.getFields().size());
      for (Field field : schema.getFields()) {
        System.out.println(
            "field="
                + field.getName()
                + " type="
                + field.getType()
                + " nullable="
                + field.isNullable());
      }
      pass = !schema.getFields().isEmpty();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected schema fields";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceIngestFlight.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceIngestFlight {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceIngestFlight ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-ingest-flight")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String ingestName = "golden_service_api_orders";
      Path parquetPath = Path.of("data", "lite", "golden", "parquet", ingestName);
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(ingestName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(parquetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build());

      for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        session.data().service().ingest().append(
            ingestName,
            new IngestPayloadJson(
                "{"
                    + "\"order_id\":"
                    + (7000 + i)
                    + ",\"account_id\":"
                    + (8000 + i)
                    + ",\"qty\":"
                    + (20 + i)
                    + ",\"price\":"
                    + (110.5 + i)
                    + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
                    + "}\n"));
      }

      RowResult result =
          session.data().service().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(ingestName)), 5));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("serviceEnabled=true");
      System.out.println("ingestService=ingest");
      System.out.println("queryService=query");
      System.out.println("appendedMessages=5");
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount >= 5;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount >= 5";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}






===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceListTables.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularTableMetadata;

public final class GoldenServiceListTables {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceListTables ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-list-tables")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      List<TabularTableMetadata> tables = session.data().service().tabular().listTables();
      System.out.println("tableCount=" + tables.size());
      for (TabularTableMetadata table : tables) {
        System.out.println(
            "table="
                + table.catalogName()
                + "."
                + table.schemaName()
                + "."
                + table.tableName()
                + " type="
                + table.tableType());
      }
      pass = !tables.isEmpty();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected at least one table";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;

public final class GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceQueryTabularFlightSql ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-query-tabular-flightsql")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ByteBuffer remoteIpc =
          session.data().service().tabular()
              .queryIpcBuffer(
                  new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist")), 5));
      System.out.println("serviceEnabled=true");
      System.out.println("queryService=query");
      System.out.println("remoteIpcBytes=" + remoteIpc.remaining());
      pass = remoteIpc.hasRemaining();
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected remoteIpcBytes > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceRoutingResilience.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceHandle;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;

public final class GoldenServiceRoutingResilience {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceRoutingResilience ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;
    ServiceHandle queryHandle = null;

    try (Fabric.Session serviceSession =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-routing-resilience-server")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      serviceSession.start();

      ServiceRunOptions serviceOptions =
          ServiceRunOptions.builder()
              .withTlsCertChain(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.pem"))
              .withTlsPrivateKey(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-service.key"))
              .build();

      queryHandle = serviceSession.services().start("query", serviceOptions, null);
      Thread.sleep(400L);
      int firstIpcBytes = queryIpcBytes("golden-service-routing-resilience-client-1");

      queryHandle.close();
      queryHandle = null;
      Thread.sleep(400L);

      boolean failedAfterStop = false;
      String failAfterStopReason = "";
      try {
        queryIpcBytes("golden-service-routing-resilience-client-2");
      } catch (Throwable expected) {
        failedAfterStop = true;
        failAfterStopReason = normalizeMessage(expected);
      }

      queryHandle = serviceSession.services().start("query", serviceOptions, null);
      Thread.sleep(400L);
      int restartedIpcBytes = queryIpcBytes("golden-service-routing-resilience-client-3");

      System.out.println("initialIpcBytes=" + firstIpcBytes);
      System.out.println("afterStopFailure=" + failedAfterStop);
      System.out.println("afterStopReason=" + failAfterStopReason);
      System.out.println("restartIpcBytes=" + restartedIpcBytes);

      pass = firstIpcBytes > 0 && failedAfterStop && restartedIpcBytes > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected success -> failure -> success sequence";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      failReason = normalizeMessage(t);
    } finally {
      if (queryHandle != null) {
        try {
          queryHandle.close();
        } catch (Exception ignored) {
        }
      }
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static int queryIpcBytes(String clientName) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session clientSession =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName(clientName)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      clientSession.start();
      ByteBuffer ipc =
          clientSession.data().service().tabular()
              .queryIpcBuffer(
                  new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("orders_hist")), 5));
      return ipc.remaining();
    }
  }

  private static String normalizeMessage(Throwable error) {
    if (error == null) {
      return "unknown failure";
    }
    String message = error.getMessage();
    if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
      return error.getClass().getSimpleName();
    }
    return message;
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_backpressure_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_backpressure_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamBackpressure ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-backpressure")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
          int orderId = 76000 + i;
          session.data()
              .service()
              .ingest()
              .append(
                  INGEST_NAME,
                  new IngestPayloadJson(
                      "{\"order_id\":"
                          + orderId
                          + ",\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"BOOK"
                          + i
                          + "\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        }

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .build();
        int leftRows;
        int rightRows;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription left =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options);
            TabularStreamSubscription right =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options)) {
          leftRows = readSlowBatches(left.stream(), 3, 200L);
          rightRows = readSlowBatches(right.stream(), 3, 200L);
        }

        System.out.println("slowConsumer.leftRows=" + leftRows);
        System.out.println("slowConsumer.rightRows=" + rightRows);
        pass = leftRows >= 3 && rightRows >= 3;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected both slow consumers to read at least three batches";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + (failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason));
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason);
  }

  private static int readSlowBatches(FlightStream stream, int maxBatches, long delayMillis)
      throws InterruptedException {
    int rows = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < maxBatches; i++) {
      BatchSummary summary = readBatch(stream);
      rows += summary.rowCount();
      Thread.sleep(delayMillis);
    }
    return rows;
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamCancel.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamCancel {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_cancel_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_cancel_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamCancel ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-cancel")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":79001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        int firstRowCount;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription subscription =
            LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(
                session.data().service().tabular(),
                    DATASET_ID,
                    TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                        .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                        .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                        .withFlushMillis(100)
                        .build())) {
          FlightStream stream = subscription.stream();
          if (!stream.next()) {
            throw new IllegalStateException("Expected first stream batch before cancel");
          }
          firstRowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
        }

        System.out.println("firstBatch.rows=" + firstRowCount);
        pass = firstRowCount > 0;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected first batch rowCount > 0";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + (failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason));
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_orders_active";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_orders_active";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamDatasetIpc ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-dataset-ipc")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":71001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":71002,\"desk\":\"EQ_EU\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .build();
        BatchSummary first;
        BatchSummary second;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription subscription =
            LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options)) {
          FlightStream stream = subscription.stream();
          first = readBatch(stream);
          second = readBatch(stream);
        }

        System.out.println("datasetId=" + DATASET_ID);
        System.out.println("batch1.rows=" + first.rowCount());
        System.out.println("batch1.firstRow=" + first.firstRow());
        System.out.println("batch2.rows=" + second.rowCount());
        System.out.println("batch2.firstRow=" + second.firstRow());
        pass = first.rowCount() > 0 && second.rowCount() > 0;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected two non-empty streaming batches";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Flight stream is required");
    }
    if (!stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamFiltered.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamFiltered {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_filtered_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_filtered_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamFiltered ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-filtered")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":75001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":75002,\"desk\":\"EQ_EU\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        BatchSummary filtered;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription sub =
            LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(
                session.data().service().tabular(),
                    DATASET_ID,
                    TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                        .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                        .withBatchMaxRows(8)
                        .withFlushMillis(100)
                        .withFilter("desk = 'EQ_US'")
                        .build())) {
          filtered = readBatch(sub.stream());
        }

        String firstDesk =
            filtered.rowCount() > 0 && filtered.firstRow().size() > 1
                ? String.valueOf(filtered.firstRow().get(1))
                : "<none>";
        System.out.println("filtered.rows=" + filtered.rowCount());
        System.out.println("filtered.firstRow=" + filtered.firstRow());
        pass = filtered.rowCount() > 0 && "EQ_US".equalsIgnoreCase(firstDesk);
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected filtered stream row with desk=EQ_US";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + (failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason));
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.security.UserContext;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.security.UserPrincipal;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_multi_client_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_multi_client_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamMultiClient ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("golden-service-stream-multi-client")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
                .withDataOptions(
                    DataOptions.builder()
                        .withServiceEnabled(true)
                        .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                        .withServiceQueryService("query")
                        .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                        .build())
                .build()) {
      session.start();

      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":72001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":72002,\"desk\":\"EQ_EU\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(2)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .build();

        BatchSummary u1;
        BatchSummary u2;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription s1 = subscribeAsUser(session, "user:u1", options);
            TabularStreamSubscription s2 = subscribeAsUser(session, "user:u2", options)) {
          u1 = readBatch(s1.stream());
          u2 = readBatch(s2.stream());
        }

        boolean different = !Objects.equals(u1.firstRow(), u2.firstRow());
        System.out.println("datasetId=" + DATASET_ID);
        System.out.println("delegatedUser=user:u1 firstRow=" + u1.firstRow() + " rows=" + u1.rowCount());
        System.out.println("delegatedUser=user:u2 firstRow=" + u2.firstRow() + " rows=" + u2.rowCount());
        System.out.println("rowsDifferByUser=" + different);

        pass = u1.rowCount() > 0 && u2.rowCount() > 0 && different;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason =
              "expected different first-row results for delegated users user:u1 and user:u2";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    } finally {
      UserContext.clear();
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static TabularStreamSubscription subscribeAsUser(
      Fabric.Session session, String delegatedUser, TabularStreamOptions options) {
    UserPrincipal previous = UserContext.get().orElse(null);
    UserContext.set(new UserPrincipal(delegatedUser, Map.of()));
    try {
      return LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options);
    } finally {
      restoreUserContext(previous);
    }
  }

  private static void restoreUserContext(UserPrincipal previous) {
    if (previous == null) {
      UserContext.clear();
      return;
    }
    UserContext.set(previous);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Flight stream is required");
    }
    if (!stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset {
  private static final String INGEST_A = "golden_service_stream_md_orders_a";
  private static final String DATASET_A = "golden_service_stream_md_orders_a";
  private static final String DATASET_ID_A = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_A);
  private static final String INGEST_B = "golden_service_stream_md_orders_b";
  private static final String DATASET_B = "golden_service_stream_md_orders_b";
  private static final String DATASET_ID_B = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_B);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamMultiDataset ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-multi-dataset")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel(INGEST_A, DATASET_A));
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel(INGEST_B, DATASET_B));
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_A);
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_B);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_A,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":73001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_B,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":83001,\"desk\":\"FX_EU\",\"book\":\"OMEGA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .build();
        BatchSummary a;
        BatchSummary b;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription subA =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID_A, options);
            TabularStreamSubscription subB =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID_B, options)) {
          a = readBatch(subA.stream());
          b = readBatch(subB.stream());
        }

        System.out.println("datasetA=" + DATASET_ID_A + " rows=" + a.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + a.firstRow());
        System.out.println("datasetB=" + DATASET_ID_B + " rows=" + b.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + b.firstRow());
        pass = a.rowCount() > 0 && b.rowCount() > 0;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected non-empty stream batches for both datasets";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_A);
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_B);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel(String ingestName, String datasetName) {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(ingestName)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(datasetName)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Flight stream is required");
    }
    if (!stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.security.UserContext;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.security.UserPrincipal;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_private_entitled_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_private_entitled_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamPrivateEntitled ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("golden-service-stream-private-entitled")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
                .withDataOptions(
                    DataOptions.builder()
                        .withServiceEnabled(true)
                        .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                        .withServiceQueryService("query")
                        .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                        .build())
                .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90201,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90202,\"desk\":\"EQ_EU\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(2)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .withSubscriptionId("golden-private-entitled")
                .build();
        BatchSummary userOne;
        BatchSummary userTwo;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription s1 = subscribeAsUser(session, "user:u1", options);
            TabularStreamSubscription s2 = subscribeAsUser(session, "user:u2", options)) {
          userOne = readBatch(s1.stream());
          userTwo = readBatch(s2.stream());
        }

        boolean different = !Objects.equals(userOne.firstRow(), userTwo.firstRow());
        System.out.println("datasetId=" + DATASET_ID);
        System.out.println("user:u1 firstRow=" + userOne.firstRow() + " rows=" + userOne.rowCount());
        System.out.println("user:u2 firstRow=" + userTwo.firstRow() + " rows=" + userTwo.rowCount());
        System.out.println("private.entitlementDiff=" + different);
        pass = userOne.rowCount() > 0 && userTwo.rowCount() > 0 && different;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected entitlement-specific row differences for PRIVATE stream";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      failReason = t.getMessage() == null || t.getMessage().isBlank() ? t.getClass().getSimpleName() : t.getMessage();
    } finally {
      UserContext.clear();
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static TabularStreamSubscription subscribeAsUser(
      Fabric.Session session, String delegatedUser, TabularStreamOptions options) {
    UserPrincipal previous = UserContext.get().orElse(null);
    UserContext.set(new UserPrincipal(delegatedUser, Map.of()));
    try {
      return LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options);
    } finally {
      if (previous == null) {
        UserContext.clear();
      } else {
        UserContext.set(previous);
      }
    }
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_public_fanout_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_public_fanout_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamPublicFanout ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-public-fanout")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90101,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90102,\"desk\":\"EQ_EU\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(2)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .withPublic(true)
                .withSubscriptionId("golden-public-fanout")
                .build();
        BatchSummary left;
        BatchSummary right;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription leftSub =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options);
            TabularStreamSubscription rightSub =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID, options)) {
          left = readBatch(leftSub.stream());
          right = readBatch(rightSub.stream());
        }

        boolean sameRows = left.rowCount() == right.rowCount() && left.firstRow().equals(right.firstRow());
        System.out.println("datasetId=" + DATASET_ID);
        System.out.println("left.rows=" + left.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + left.firstRow());
        System.out.println("right.rows=" + right.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + right.firstRow());
        System.out.println("fanout.equalRows=" + sameRows);
        pass = left.rowCount() > 0 && right.rowCount() > 0 && sameRows;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected same first batch rows across public fan-out subscribers";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      failReason = t.getMessage() == null || t.getMessage().isBlank() ? t.getClass().getSimpleName() : t.getMessage();
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset {
  private static final String INGEST_A = "golden_service_stream_public_md_orders_a";
  private static final String DATASET_A = "golden_service_stream_public_md_orders_a";
  private static final String DATASET_ID_A = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_A);
  private static final String INGEST_B = "golden_service_stream_public_md_orders_b";
  private static final String DATASET_B = "golden_service_stream_public_md_orders_b";
  private static final String DATASET_ID_B = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_B);

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamPublicMultiDataset ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-public-multi-dataset")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel(INGEST_A, DATASET_A));
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel(INGEST_B, DATASET_B));
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_A);
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_B);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_A,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90301,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_B,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":90401,\"desk\":\"FX_EU\",\"book\":\"OMEGA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        TabularStreamOptions options =
            TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                .withFlushMillis(100)
                .withPublic(true)
                .build();
        BatchSummary a;
        BatchSummary b;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription aSub =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID_A, options);
            TabularStreamSubscription bSub =
                LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(session.data().service().tabular(), DATASET_ID_B, options)) {
          a = readBatch(aSub.stream());
          b = readBatch(bSub.stream());
        }

        System.out.println("datasetA=" + DATASET_ID_A + " rows=" + a.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + a.firstRow());
        System.out.println("datasetB=" + DATASET_ID_B + " rows=" + b.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + b.firstRow());
        pass = a.rowCount() > 0 && b.rowCount() > 0;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected non-empty public stream batches for both datasets";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_A);
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_B);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      failReason = t.getMessage() == null || t.getMessage().isBlank() ? t.getClass().getSimpleName() : t.getMessage();
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel(String ingestName, String tableName) {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(ingestName)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(tableName)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/services/GoldenServiceStreamResume.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.services;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.flight.FlightStream;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.TabularStreamSubscription;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenServiceStreamResume {
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "golden_service_stream_resume_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "golden_service_stream_resume_orders";
  private static final String DATASET_ID = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME);
  private static final String SUBSCRIPTION_ID = "resume-demo";

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceStreamResume ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-service-stream-resume")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withCheckpointPath(Path.of("data", "checkpoints", "golden", "service-stream-resume"))
            .withDataOptions(
                DataOptions.builder()
                    .withServiceEnabled(true)
                    .withServiceIngestService("ingest")
                    .withServiceQueryService("query")
                    .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                    .build())
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      session.data().service().ingest().admin().register(streamIngestModel());
      session.data().service().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":74001,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"ALPHA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        BatchSummary first;
        try (TabularStreamSubscription sub =
            LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(
                session.data().service().tabular(),
                    DATASET_ID,
                    TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                        .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.BEGINNING)
                        .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                        .withFlushMillis(100)
                        .withSubscriptionId(SUBSCRIPTION_ID)
                        .build())) {
          first = readBatch(sub.stream());
        }

        session.data()
            .service()
            .ingest()
            .append(
                INGEST_NAME,
                new IngestPayloadJson(
                    "{\"order_id\":74002,\"desk\":\"EQ_US\",\"book\":\"BETA\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}"));

        BatchSummary resumed;
