        try (TabularStreamSubscription sub =
            LabSql.subscribeDatasetFromCanonicalDatasetId(
                session.data().service().tabular(),
                    DATASET_ID,
                    TabularStreamOptions.builder()
                        .withStart(TabularStreamOptions.Start.RESUME)
                        .withBatchMaxRows(1)
                        .withFlushMillis(100)
                        .withSubscriptionId(SUBSCRIPTION_ID)
                        .build())) {
          resumed = readBatch(sub.stream());
        }

        System.out.println("firstBatch.rows=" + first.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + first.firstRow());
        System.out.println(
            "resumeBatch.rows=" + resumed.rowCount() + " firstRow=" + resumed.firstRow());
        pass = first.rowCount() > 0 && resumed.rowCount() > 0;
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "expected first and resumed batches to be non-empty";
        }
      } finally {
        session.data().service().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + (failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason));
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason == null ? "unknown failure" : failReason);
  }

  private static IngestModel streamIngestModel() {
    return IngestModel.builder()
        .withName(INGEST_NAME)
        .withNamespace("default")
        .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
        .withSchema(
            SchemaModel.builder()
                .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                .withField("desk", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("book", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, true)
                .build())
        .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
        .withTargetDuckDbActive(
            target ->
                target
                    .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                    .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                    .withMemory(true)
                    .withCreateIfMissing(true))
        .build();
  }

  private static BatchSummary readBatch(FlightStream stream) {
    if (stream == null || !stream.next()) {
      throw new IllegalStateException("Expected stream batch but stream ended");
    }
    int rowCount = stream.getRoot().getRowCount();
    List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
    if (rowCount > 0) {
      List<Object> values = new ArrayList<>();
      for (FieldVector vector : stream.getRoot().getFieldVectors()) {
        Object value = vector.getObject(0);
        values.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
      }
      firstRow = List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return new BatchSummary(rowCount, firstRow);
  }

  private record BatchSummary(int rowCount, List<Object> firstRow) {}
}




org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/sql/GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;

public final class GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenDirectQuerySqlRows ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;
    String sql = "select * from golden_api_orders_parquet limit 5";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(sql, 5);
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();
      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("columns=" + result.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/sql/GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.memory.RootAllocator;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VectorSchemaRoot;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.ipc.ArrowStreamReader;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Bytes;

public final class GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenDirectQuerySqlTabularIpc ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;
    String sql = "select * from golden_api_orders_parquet limit 5";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("client")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
                .build();
        RootAllocator allocator = new RootAllocator(32L * 1024L * 1024L)) {
      session.start();
      ByteBuffer ipc = session.data().direct().tabular().queryIpcBuffer(sql);
      long rowCount = 0L;
      List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
      List<String> columns = List.of();
      try (ArrowStreamReader reader =
          new ArrowStreamReader(Bytes.asInputStream(ipc), allocator)) {
        VectorSchemaRoot root = reader.getVectorSchemaRoot();
        if (root.getSchema() != null && root.getSchema().getFields() != null) {
          List<String> names = new ArrayList<>();
          root.getSchema().getFields().forEach(field -> names.add(field.getName()));
          columns = List.copyOf(names);
        }
        while (reader.loadNextBatch()) {
          int batchRows = root.getRowCount();
          if (firstRow.isEmpty() && batchRows > 0) {
            List<Object> row = new ArrayList<>();
            for (FieldVector vector : root.getFieldVectors()) {
              Object value = vector.getObject(0);
              row.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
            }
            firstRow = List.copyOf(row);
          }
          rowCount += batchRows;
        }
      }
      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("ipcBytes=" + ipc.remaining());
      System.out.println("columns=" + columns);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = ipc.hasRemaining() && rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected ipc bytes and rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/sql/GoldenOdbcConnectionTest.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.odbc.OdbcConnection;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.duckdb.OdbcSessionSupport;

public final class GoldenOdbcConnectionTest {

  private GoldenOdbcConnectionTest() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenOdbcConnectionTest ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;
    String connectionName = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : "postgres_fabric";
    String schemaSql = args != null && args.length > 1 ? args[1] : "SELECT * FROM orders";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      try (OdbcConnection odbc = session.connections().odbc(connectionName)) {
        OdbcSessionSupport.OdbcConnectionHealth health = odbc.test();
        OdbcSessionSupport.OdbcSchemaInspection schema = odbc.inspectSchema(schemaSql);
        pass = health.ok() && schema.ok();
        if (!pass) {
          failReason = "health=" + health.message() + " schema=" + schema.message();
        }
        System.out.println("connectionName=" + connectionName);
        System.out.println("healthOk=" + health.ok());
        System.out.println("schemaOk=" + schema.ok());
        System.out.println("extension=" + health.extensionNameUsed());
        System.out.println("fallbackInUse=" + health.fallbackInUse());
        System.out.println("schemaColumns=" + schema.columns().size());
        System.out.println("healthMessage=" + health.message());
        System.out.println("schemaMessage=" + schema.message());
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      failReason = t.getMessage();
      if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
        failReason = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/sql/GoldenOdbcDatasetQuery.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

public final class GoldenOdbcDatasetQuery {

  private GoldenOdbcDatasetQuery() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenOdbcDatasetQuery ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    String datasetId = args != null && args.length > 0 ? args[0] : "dataset:lab/default/orders_odbc";
    int limit = args != null && args.length > 1 ? Integer.parseInt(args[1]) : 10;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      String sql = LabSql.selectAllFromCanonicalDatasetId(datasetId);
      RowResult result = session.data().direct().rows().querySql(sql, Math.max(1, limit));
      int rowCount = result.rows().size();
      List<Object> firstRow = rowCount > 0 ? result.rows().get(0) : List.of();

      System.out.println("datasetId=" + datasetId);
      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("columns=" + result.columns());
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);

      pass = rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/sql/GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.sql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import org.apache.arrow.memory.RootAllocator;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.FieldVector;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.VectorSchemaRoot;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.ipc.ArrowStreamReader;
import org.apache.arrow.vector.util.Text;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Bytes;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataOptions;

public final class GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenServiceQuerySqlTabularIpc ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;
    String sql = "select * from golden_api_orders_parquet limit 5";

    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("client")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault", "kerberos", "lenny.keytab"))
                .withDataOptions(
                    DataOptions.builder()
                        .withServiceEnabled(true)
                        .withServiceQueryService("query")
                        .withServiceTlsTrustCert(Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem"))
                        .build())
                .build();
        RootAllocator allocator = new RootAllocator(32L * 1024L * 1024L)) {
      session.start();
      ByteBuffer ipc = session.data().service().tabular().queryIpcBuffer(sql);
      long rowCount = 0L;
      List<String> columns = List.of();
      List<Object> firstRow = List.of();
      try (ArrowStreamReader reader =
          new ArrowStreamReader(Bytes.asInputStream(ipc), allocator)) {
        VectorSchemaRoot root = reader.getVectorSchemaRoot();
        if (root.getSchema() != null && root.getSchema().getFields() != null) {
          List<String> names = new ArrayList<>();
          root.getSchema().getFields().forEach(field -> names.add(field.getName()));
          columns = List.copyOf(names);
        }
        while (reader.loadNextBatch()) {
          int batchRows = root.getRowCount();
          if (firstRow.isEmpty() && batchRows > 0) {
            List<Object> row = new ArrayList<>();
            for (FieldVector vector : root.getFieldVectors()) {
              Object value = vector.getObject(0);
              row.add(value instanceof Text text ? text.toString() : value);
            }
            firstRow = List.copyOf(row);
          }
          rowCount += batchRows;
        }
      }
      System.out.println("sql=" + sql);
      System.out.println("serviceEnabled=true");
      System.out.println("queryService=query");
      System.out.println("ipcBytes=" + ipc.remaining());
      System.out.println("columns=" + columns);
      System.out.println("rowCount=" + rowCount);
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + firstRow);
      pass = ipc.hasRemaining() && rowCount > 0;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected ipc bytes and rowCount > 0";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }
    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}





org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.views

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/golden/views/GoldenViewRefreshGraph.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.golden.views;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewRefreshResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewStatus;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewQueryModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class GoldenViewRefreshGraph {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    System.out.println("=== GoldenViewRefreshGraph ===");
    boolean pass = false;
    String failReason = null;

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("golden-view-refresh-graph")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      String viewAName = "golden_view_refresh_graph_a";
      String viewBName = "golden_view_refresh_graph_b";
      String viewATable = "golden_view_refresh_graph_a_table";
      String viewBTable = "golden_view_refresh_graph_b_table";

      session.data().direct().views().register(
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewAName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(ViewQueryModel.builder().withSql("select 1::BIGINT as cnt").build())
              .withDependencies(List.of())
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder().withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false).build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName(viewATable)
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().build())
              .build());

      session.data().direct().views().register(
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewBName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder().withSql("select cnt + 1 as cnt from " + viewATable).build())
              .withDependencies(List.of(viewAName))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder().withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false).build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName(viewBTable)
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().build())
              .build());

      ViewRefreshResult refreshResult = session.data().direct().views().refreshGraph(viewBName);
      ViewStatus statusA = session.data().direct().views().status(viewAName);
      ViewStatus statusB = session.data().direct().views().status(viewBName);
      boolean aSuccess = statusA != null && "SUCCESS".equalsIgnoreCase(statusA.lastStatus());
      boolean bSuccess = statusB != null && "SUCCESS".equalsIgnoreCase(statusB.lastStatus());

      System.out.println("refreshGraphRoot=" + viewBName);
      System.out.println("refreshSuccess=" + refreshResult.success());
      System.out.println("viewAStatus=" + (statusA == null ? null : statusA.lastStatus()));
      System.out.println("viewBStatus=" + (statusB == null ? null : statusB.lastStatus()));

      pass = aSuccess && bSuccess;
      if (!pass) {
        failReason = "expected both view statuses to be SUCCESS";
      }
    } catch (Throwable t) {
      String message = t.getMessage();
      if (message == null || message.isBlank()) {
        message = t.getClass().getSimpleName();
      }
      failReason = message;
    }

    if (pass) {
      System.out.println("PASS");
      return;
    }

    if (failReason == null || failReason.isBlank()) {
      failReason = "unknown failure";
    }
    System.out.println("FAIL: " + failReason);
    throw new IllegalStateException(failReason);
  }
}




org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabDuckDbActiveAmpsDemo.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabDuckDbActiveAmpsDemo {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabDuckDbActiveAmpsDemo.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "lab-duckdb-active-orders";
  private static final String DATASET_NAME = "lab-duckdb-active-orders";
  private static final String CONNECTION = "amps-fabric-json";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/ingest/orders_active/json";
  private static final String HISTORY_PATH =
      Path.of("data", "lite", "lab", "active-orders").toString();

  private LabDuckDbActiveAmpsDemo() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName("lab-duckdb-active-amps-demo")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      IngestModel model =
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST_NAME)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                      .withFields(
                          List.of(
                              SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("order_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                              SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("qty").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32).withNullable(false).build(),
                              SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("status").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                              SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(true).build()))
                      .build())
              .withSourceAmps(
                  source ->
                      source
                          .withNamespace("default")
                          .withFormat(IngestFormat.JSON)
                          .withConnectionName(CONNECTION)
                          .withTopic(TOPIC)
                          .withSowSubscribe(true)
                          .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                          .withOofHandling(IngestSourceAmpsModel.OofHandling.DELETE_EVENT))
              .withTargetDuckDbActive(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withTableName(DATASET_NAME)
                          .addPrimaryKey("order_id")
                          .withMemory(true)
                          .withParquetHistoryPath(HISTORY_PATH)
                          .withPersistOnStop(false)
                          .withCreateIfMissing(true))
              .build();

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(model);
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(
              INGEST_NAME,
              new SchemaSampleOptions(
                  20,
                  SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES,
                  8_000L,
                  true,
                  null),
              "ingest:default/" + INGEST_NAME,
              SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open(INGEST_NAME);
      session.data().direct().ingest().start(INGEST_NAME);
      try {
        var amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION);
        amps.publish(TOPIC, "{\"order_id\":\"O-1\",\"qty\":10,\"status\":\"NEW\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}");
        amps.publish(TOPIC, "{\"order_id\":\"O-2\",\"qty\":20,\"status\":\"NEW\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}");
        amps.publish(TOPIC, "{\"order_id\":\"O-1\",\"qty\":999,\"status\":\"UPDATED\",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\"}");

        Thread.sleep(5_000L);
        RowResult count =
            session.data().direct().rows()
                .querySql(
                    "select count(*) as row_count from "
                        + LabSql.table(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(DATASET_NAME)),
                    1);
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabDuckDbActiveAmpsDemo] dataset={} runtimeCount={} queryCount={}",
            DATASET_NAME,
            runtime.queryCount(),
            count.rows().isEmpty() ? 0L : count.rows().get(0).get(0));
      } finally {
        session.data().direct().ingest().stop(INGEST_NAME);
      }
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsAgent.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.agent.IngestAgent;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.util.Strings;

public final class LabIngestAmpsAgent {
  private LabIngestAmpsAgent() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    List<String> ingests = new ArrayList<>();
    boolean dryRun = false;
    boolean once = false;
    if (args != null) {
      for (String arg : args) {
        String trimmed = Strings.trimToNull(arg);
        if (trimmed == null) {
          continue;
        }
        if ("--dryRun".equals(trimmed)) {
          dryRun = true;
          continue;
        }
        if ("--once".equals(trimmed)) {
          once = true;
          continue;
        }
        if (trimmed.startsWith("--ingest=")) {
          String value = Strings.trimToNull(trimmed.substring("--ingest=".length()));
          if (value == null) {
            continue;
          }
          for (String token : value.split(",")) {
            String ingest = Strings.trimToNull(token);
            if (ingest != null) {
              ingests.add(ingest);
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    CountDownLatch done = new CountDownLatch(1);
    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup("lab")
                .withName("ingest-agent")
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                .build()) {
      session.start();
      IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();
      try (IngestAgent agent =
          ingest.agent(
              IngestAgent.builder()
                  .withIngestAllowlist(List.copyOf(ingests))
                  .withDryRun(dryRun)
                  .withOnce(once))) {
        agent.start();
        Runtime.getRuntime()
            .addShutdownHook(new Thread(done::countDown, "lab-amps-ingest-agent-shutdown"));
        while (done.getCount() > 0) {
          done.await(1L, TimeUnit.DAYS);
        }
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsAgentRun.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.IngestManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.agent.IngestAgent;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestAmpsAgentRun {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestAmpsAgentRun.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "ingest-agent-run";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private LabIngestAmpsAgentRun() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    CountDownLatch done = new CountDownLatch(1);
    Runtime.getRuntime()
        .addShutdownHook(new Thread(done::countDown, "lab-amps-ingest-agent-run-shutdown"));

    try (Fabric.Session session =
            Fabric.newSession()
                .withGroup(GROUP)
                .withName(APP)
                .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
                .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
                .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
                .build()) {
      session.start();
      IngestManager ingest = session.data().direct().ingest();
      try (IngestAgent agent = ingest.agent()) {
        agent.start();
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabAmpsIngestAgentRun] ingest agent started group={} app={} (topics are config-driven)",
            GROUP,
            APP);
        while (done.getCount() > 0) {
          done.await(1L, TimeUnit.DAYS);
        }
      }
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsOrdersJson.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestAmpsOrdersJson {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestAmpsOrdersJson.class);

  private LabIngestAmpsOrdersJson() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    int sampleMessages = 20;
    if (args != null && args.length > 0) {
      try {
        sampleMessages = Integer.parseInt(args[0].trim());
      } catch (RuntimeException ignored) {
        sampleMessages = 20;
      }
    }

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-amps-orders-json-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lite-orders-json");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lite-orders-json")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("order_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64).withNullable(true).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(true).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceAmps(
                      source ->
                          source
                              .withNamespace("default")
                              .withFormat(IngestFormat.JSON)
                              .withConnectionName("amps-fabric-json")
                              .withTopic("/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json")
                              .withSowSubscribe(true)
                              .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                              .withOptions("oof"))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lite-orders-json mode=DIRECT source=AMPS target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=ADD_COLUMNS",
          targetPath);

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(
              "lite-orders-json",
              new SchemaSampleOptions(
                  sampleMessages,
                  SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES,
                  8_000L,
                  true,
                  null),
              "ingest:default/lite-orders-json",
              SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lite-orders-json");
      session.data().direct().ingest().start("lite-orders-json");
      try {
        Thread.sleep(3_000L);
      } finally {
        session.data().direct().ingest().stop("lite-orders-json");
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lite-orders-json")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lite-orders-json rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsOrdersJsonPublish.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestAmpsOrdersJsonPublish {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestAmpsOrdersJsonPublish.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "amps-publish-json-orders";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-json";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/json";
  private static final Instant BASE_CREATED_AT = Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z");
  private static final int MESSAGE_COUNT = 5;

  private LabIngestAmpsOrdersJsonPublish() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION_NAME);
      for (int i = 0; i < MESSAGE_COUNT; i++) {
        String payload =
            "{"
                + "\"order_id\":"
                + (1000L + i)
                + ","
                + "\"account_id\":"
                + (2000L + (i % 2))
                + ","
                + "\"instrument_id\":"
                + (3000L + i)
                + ","
                + "\"order_type\":\""
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "LIMIT" : "MARKET")
                + "\","
                + "\"side\":\""
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "BUY" : "SELL")
                + "\","
                + "\"quantity\":"
                + (10 + i)
                + ","
                + "\"price\":"
                + (100.25d + i)
                + ","
                + "\"status\":\""
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "OPEN" : "PARTIAL")
                + "\","
                + "\"created_at\":\""
                + BASE_CREATED_AT.plusSeconds(i)
                + "\","
                + "\"created_date\":\"2026-02-13\","
                + "\"updated_at\":\""
                + BASE_CREATED_AT.plusSeconds(i).plusSeconds(30L)
                + "\","
                + "\"date\":\"20260213\""
                + "}";
        amps.publish(TOPIC, payload);
        LOGGER.info("[LabAmpsOrdersJsonPublish] publish topic={} index={} payload={}", TOPIC, i, payload);
      }
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabAmpsOrdersJsonPublish] published={} connection={} topic={}",
          MESSAGE_COUNT,
          CONNECTION_NAME,
          TOPIC);
    }
  }
}


===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFix.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestFormat;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSourceAmpsModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.schema.client.SchemaSampleOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFix {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFix.class);

  private LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFix() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    int sampleMessages = 20;
    if (args != null && args.length > 0) {
      try {
        sampleMessages = Integer.parseInt(args[0].trim());
      } catch (RuntimeException ignored) {
        sampleMessages = 20;
      }
    }

    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-amps-orders-nvfix-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lite-orders-nvfix");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lite-orders-nvfix")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.ADD_COLUMNS)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("order_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64).withNullable(true).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(true).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceAmps(
                      source ->
                          source
                              .withNamespace("default")
                              .withFormat(IngestFormat.NVFIX)
                              .withConnectionName("amps-fabric-nvfix")
                              .withTopic("/lab/ingest/orders_hist/nvfix")
                              .withSowSubscribe(true)
                              .withMode(IngestSourceAmpsModel.Mode.STREAM)
                              .withOptions("oof")
                              .withNvFixPairDelimiter("|")
                              .withNvFixKvDelimiter("=")
                              .withNvFixTrimKeys(true)
                              .withNvFixTrimValues(true))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lite-orders-nvfix mode=DIRECT source=AMPS target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=ADD_COLUMNS",
          targetPath);

      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().sampleAndUpdateSchema(
              "lite-orders-nvfix",
              new SchemaSampleOptions(
                  sampleMessages,
                  SchemaSampleOptions.DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES,
                  8_000L,
                  true,
                  null),
              "ingest:default/lite-orders-nvfix",
              SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lite-orders-nvfix");
      session.data().direct().ingest().start("lite-orders-nvfix");
      try {
        Thread.sleep(3_000L);
      } finally {
        session.data().direct().ingest().stop("lite-orders-nvfix");
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lite-orders-nvfix")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lite-orders-nvfix rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/amps/LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.amps;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.connectors.amps.AmpsConnection;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "amps-publish-nvfix-orders";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private static final String CONNECTION_NAME = "amps-fabric-nvfix";
  private static final String TOPIC = "/lab/ingest/orders_hist/nvfix";
  private static final Instant BASE_CREATED_AT = Instant.parse("2026-02-13T12:00:00Z");
  private static final int MESSAGE_COUNT = 5;

  private LabIngestAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      AmpsConnection amps = session.connections().amps(CONNECTION_NAME);
      for (int i = 0; i < MESSAGE_COUNT; i++) {
        String payload =
            "order_id="
                + (1000L + i)
                + "|account_id="
                + (2000L + (i % 2))
                + "|instrument_id="
                + (3000L + i)
                + "|order_type="
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "LIMIT" : "MARKET")
                + "|side="
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "BUY" : "SELL")
                + "|quantity="
                + (10 + i)
                + "|price="
                + (100.25d + i)
                + "|status="
                + (i % 2 == 0 ? "OPEN" : "PARTIAL")
                + "|created_at="
                + BASE_CREATED_AT.plusSeconds(i)
                + "|created_date=2026-02-13"
                + "|updated_at="
                + BASE_CREATED_AT.plusSeconds(i).plusSeconds(30L)
                + "|date=20260213";
        amps.publish(TOPIC, payload);
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish] publish topic={} index={} payload={}", TOPIC, i, payload);
      }
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabAmpsOrdersNvFixPublish] published={} connection={} topic={}",
          MESSAGE_COUNT,
          CONNECTION_NAME,
          TOPIC);
    }
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.api

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/api/LabIngestApiCounterpartiesHist.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestApiCounterpartiesHist {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestApiCounterpartiesHist.class);

  private LabIngestApiCounterpartiesHist() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-api-counterparties-hist-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lab-api-counterparties-hist");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lab-api-counterparties-hist")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("counterparty_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("region").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("risk_rating").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("active").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.BOOL).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("classification").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("desk").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("last_reviewed").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("updated_at").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("updated_date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("contact_name").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("contact_email").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("notes").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(true).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("primary_limit_group").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceApi(api -> api.withFormat("JSON"))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true)
                              .withPartitionKey("updated_date")
                              .withPartitionValueField("updated_date"))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-counterparties-hist mode=DIRECT source=API target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=STRICT",
          targetPath);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lab-api-counterparties-hist");
      LocalDate partitionDate = LocalDate.now();
      DateTimeFormatter timestampFormatter =
          DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss", Locale.ROOT);
      String[] regions = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC", "LATAM"};
      String[] classifications = {"HEDGE_FUND", "BANK", "BROKER", "ASSET_MANAGER", "INSURANCE", "GOVERNMENT"};
      String[] limitGroups = {"LG-NA-01", "LG-NA-02", "LG-EU-01", "LG-AP-01", "LG-GLOBAL-99"};
      String[] firstNames = {"Ada", "Bruno", "Clara", "Dinesh", "Evelyn", "Fiona", "Gareth", "Hiro", "Isla", "Jamal"};
      String[] lastNames = {"Lopez", "Singh", "Patel", "Wang", "Garcia", "Smith", "Dubois", "Ivanov", "Schmidt", "Khan"};
      String[] notes = {"Periodic review complete", "Awaiting documents", "Auto-approved", "Pending credit review", "Enhanced monitoring"};
      String[] deskNames = {"DESK1", "DESK2", "GLOBAL_MACRO"};
      String[] deskDomains = {"desk1.example.com", "desk2.example.com", "macro.example.com"};
      double[] deskWeights = {0.45d, 0.45d, 0.10d};

      for (int partition = 0; partition < 5; partition++) {
        StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder(2_000 * 430);
        for (int row = 0; row < 2_000; row++) {
          ThreadLocalRandom random = ThreadLocalRandom.current();
          LocalDate reviewed = partitionDate.minusDays(random.nextInt(1, 90)).plusDays(random.nextInt(0, 3));
          LocalDateTime updated =
              partitionDate
                  .atStartOfDay()
                  .plusHours(random.nextInt(0, 24))
                  .plusMinutes(random.nextInt(0, 60))
                  .plusSeconds(random.nextInt(0, 60));
          double draw = random.nextDouble();
          int deskIndex = draw <= deskWeights[0] ? 0 : (draw <= deskWeights[0] + deskWeights[1] ? 1 : 2);
          String contactName =
              firstNames[random.nextInt(firstNames.length)] + " " + lastNames[random.nextInt(lastNames.length)];
          String contactLocal =
              contactName
                  .toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT)
                  .replaceAll("[^a-z0-9]+", ".")
                  .replaceAll("^\\.+|\\.+$", "");
          if (contactLocal.isBlank()) {
            contactLocal = "contact";
          }
          payload
              .append('{')
              .append("\"counterparty_id\":\"CP-")
              .append(partitionDate)
              .append('-')
              .append(row)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"region\":\"")
              .append(regions[random.nextInt(regions.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"risk_rating\":")
              .append(random.nextInt(1, 11))
              .append(',')
              .append("\"active\":")
              .append(random.nextBoolean())
              .append(',')
              .append("\"classification\":\"")
              .append(classifications[random.nextInt(classifications.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"desk\":\"")
              .append(deskNames[deskIndex])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"last_reviewed\":\"")
              .append(reviewed)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"updated_at\":\"")
              .append(timestampFormatter.format(updated))
              .append("Z\",")
              .append("\"updated_date\":\"")
              .append(updated.toLocalDate())
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"contact_name\":\"")
              .append(contactName)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"contact_email\":\"")
              .append(contactLocal)
              .append('@')
              .append(deskDomains[deskIndex])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"notes\":\"")
              .append(notes[random.nextInt(notes.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"primary_limit_group\":\"")
              .append(limitGroups[random.nextInt(limitGroups.length)])
              .append("\"")
              .append('}')
              .append('\n');
        }
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(payload.toString()));
        partitionDate = partitionDate.minusDays(1);
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lab-api-counterparties-hist")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-counterparties-hist ingestedRecords=10000 partitions=5 rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/api/LabIngestApiInstrumentsHist.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestApiInstrumentsHist {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestApiInstrumentsHist.class);

  private LabIngestApiInstrumentsHist() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-api-instruments-hist-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lab-api-instruments-hist");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lab-api-instruments-hist")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("instrument_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("symbol").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("asset_class").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("currency").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("price").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("issue_date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("maturity_date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("issuer").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("status").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("country").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceApi(api -> api.withFormat("JSON"))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true)
                              .withPartitionKey("issue_date")
                              .withPartitionValueField("issue_date"))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-instruments-hist mode=DIRECT source=API target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=STRICT",
          targetPath);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lab-api-instruments-hist");
      LocalDate partitionDate = LocalDate.now();
      String[] assetClasses = {"EQUITY", "BOND", "FX", "COMMODITY", "DERIVATIVE", "ETF"};
      String[] currencies = {"USD", "EUR", "GBP", "JPY", "CHF", "CAD"};
      String[] issuers = {"Apex Capital", "Summit Bank", "Nimbus Holdings", "Helios Energy", "Vertex Industries", "Atlas Finance"};
      String[] statuses = {"ACTIVE", "SUSPENDED", "MATURING", "INACTIVE"};
      String[] countries = {"AMER", "EMEA", "APAC", "LATAM"};

      for (int partition = 0; partition < 5; partition++) {
        StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder(2_000 * 340);
        for (int row = 0; row < 2_000; row++) {
          ThreadLocalRandom random = ThreadLocalRandom.current();
          int symbolLength = random.nextInt(3, 5);
          StringBuilder symbolBuilder = new StringBuilder(symbolLength);
          for (int i = 0; i < symbolLength; i++) {
            symbolBuilder.append((char) ('A' + random.nextInt(0, 26)));
          }
          LocalDate maturity = partitionDate.plusDays(random.nextInt(365, 365 * 5));
          payload
              .append('{')
              .append("\"instrument_id\":\"ISIN")
              .append(random.nextInt(1_000_000_000))
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"symbol\":\"")
              .append(symbolBuilder)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"asset_class\":\"")
              .append(assetClasses[random.nextInt(assetClasses.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"currency\":\"")
              .append(currencies[random.nextInt(currencies.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"price\":")
              .append(Math.round(random.nextDouble(5.0, 500.0) * 100.0) / 100.0)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"issue_date\":\"")
              .append(partitionDate)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"maturity_date\":\"")
              .append(maturity)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"issuer\":\"")
              .append(issuers[random.nextInt(issuers.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"status\":\"")
              .append(statuses[random.nextInt(statuses.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"country\":\"")
              .append(countries[random.nextInt(countries.length)])
              .append("\"")
              .append('}')
              .append('\n');
        }
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(payload.toString()));
        partitionDate = partitionDate.minusDays(1);
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lab-api-instruments-hist")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-instruments-hist ingestedRecords=10000 partitions=5 rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/api/LabIngestApiOrdersHist.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestApiOrdersHist {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestApiOrdersHist.class);

  private LabIngestApiOrdersHist() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-api-orders-hist-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lab-api-orders-hist");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lab-api-orders-hist")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("order_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("account_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("instrument_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("order_type").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("side").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("quantity").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("price").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("status").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("created_at").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("created_date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("updated_at").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP).withNullable(false).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceApi(api -> api.withFormat("JSON"))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true)
                              .withPartitionKey("created_date")
                              .withPartitionValueField("created_date"))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-orders-hist mode=DIRECT source=API target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=STRICT",
          targetPath);

      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lab-api-orders-hist");
      LocalDate partitionDate = LocalDate.now();
      DateTimeFormatter timestampFormatter =
          DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss", Locale.ROOT);
      String[] orderTypes = {"MARKET", "LIMIT", "STOP", "IOC"};
      String[] sides = {"BUY", "SELL"};
      String[] statuses = {"OPEN", "PARTIAL", "FILLED", "CANCELLED", "REJECTED"};

      for (int partition = 0; partition < 5; partition++) {
        StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder(2_000 * 320);
        for (int row = 0; row < 2_000; row++) {
          ThreadLocalRandom random = ThreadLocalRandom.current();
          LocalDateTime created =
              partitionDate
                  .atStartOfDay()
                  .plusHours(random.nextInt(0, 24))
                  .plusMinutes(random.nextInt(0, 60))
                  .plusSeconds(random.nextInt(0, 60));
          LocalDateTime updated = created.plusMinutes(random.nextInt(0, 180));
          payload
              .append('{')
              .append("\"order_id\":\"ORD-")
              .append(partitionDate.toString().replace("-", ""))
              .append('-')
              .append(row)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"account_id\":\"ACCT-")
              .append(1000 + random.nextInt(9000))
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"instrument_id\":\"ISIN")
              .append(random.nextInt(1_000_000_000))
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"order_type\":\"")
              .append(orderTypes[random.nextInt(orderTypes.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"side\":\"")
              .append(sides[random.nextInt(sides.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"quantity\":")
              .append(random.nextInt(100, 50_000))
              .append(',')
              .append("\"price\":")
              .append(Math.round(random.nextDouble(5.0, 500.0) * 100.0) / 100.0)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"status\":\"")
              .append(statuses[random.nextInt(statuses.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"created_at\":\"")
              .append(timestampFormatter.format(created))
              .append("Z\",")
              .append("\"created_date\":\"")
              .append(partitionDate)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"updated_at\":\"")
              .append(timestampFormatter.format(updated))
              .append("Z\"")
              .append('}')
              .append('\n');
        }
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(payload.toString()));
        partitionDate = partitionDate.minusDays(1);
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lab-api-orders-hist")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-orders-hist ingestedRecords=10000 partitions=5 rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/api/LabIngestApiPositionsHist.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.api;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.DataQuery;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaCompatibility;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestApiPositionsHist {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestApiPositionsHist.class);

  private LabIngestApiPositionsHist() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("lab-api-positions-hist-ingest")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .build()) {
      session.start();
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir("lab-api-positions-hist");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
              IngestModel.builder()
                  .withName("lab-api-positions-hist")
                  .withNamespace("default")
                  .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
                  .withSchema(
                      SchemaModel.builder()
                          .withCompatibility(SchemaCompatibility.BACKWARDS)
                          .withFields(
                              List.of(
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("position_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("account_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("desk").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("book").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("instrument_id").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("quantity").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("average_price").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("market_value").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("pnl").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(false).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("sensitivity").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64).withNullable(true).build(),
                                  SchemaModel.Field.builder().withName("as_of_date").withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE).withNullable(false).build()))
                          .build())
                  .withSourceApi(api -> api.withFormat("JSON"))
                  .withTargetParquet(
                      target ->
                          target
                              .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                              .withGlob("*.parquet")
                              .withHivePartitioning(true)
                              .withPartitionKey("as_of_date")
                              .withPartitionValueField("as_of_date"))
                  .build());

      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-positions-hist mode=DIRECT source=API target={} compatibility=BACKWARDS schemaMode=STRICT",
          targetPath);
