      IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open("lab-api-positions-hist");
      LocalDate partitionDate = LocalDate.now();
      String[] accounts = {"ACCT-1001", "ACCT-2002", "ACCT-3003", "ACCT-4004", "ACCT-5005"};
      String[] desks = {"DESK1", "DESK2"};
      String[] bookSuffixes = {"LDN", "NY", "SGP", "AMS", "TKO"};

      for (int partition = 0; partition < 5; partition++) {
        StringBuilder payload = new StringBuilder(2_000 * 360);
        for (int row = 0; row < 2_000; row++) {
          ThreadLocalRandom random = ThreadLocalRandom.current();
          String desk = desks[random.nextInt(desks.length)];
          double quantity = Math.round(random.nextDouble(-50_000, 50_000) * 100.0) / 100.0;
          double averagePrice = Math.round(random.nextDouble(5.0, 500.0) * 100.0) / 100.0;
          payload
              .append('{')
              .append("\"position_id\":\"POS-")
              .append(partitionDate.toString().replace("-", ""))
              .append('-')
              .append(row)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"account_id\":\"")
              .append(accounts[random.nextInt(accounts.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"desk\":\"")
              .append(desk)
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"book\":\"")
              .append(desk)
              .append('-')
              .append(bookSuffixes[random.nextInt(bookSuffixes.length)])
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"instrument_id\":\"ISIN")
              .append(random.nextInt(1_000_000_000))
              .append("\",")
              .append("\"quantity\":")
              .append(quantity)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"average_price\":")
              .append(averagePrice)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"market_value\":")
              .append(Math.round(quantity * averagePrice * 100.0) / 100.0)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"pnl\":")
              .append(Math.round(random.nextDouble(-250_000, 250_000) * 100.0) / 100.0)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"sensitivity\":")
              .append(Math.round(random.nextDouble(0.1, 1.5) * quantity * 100.0) / 100.0)
              .append(',')
              .append("\"as_of_date\":\"")
              .append(partitionDate)
              .append("\"")
              .append('}')
              .append('\n');
        }
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(payload.toString()));
        partitionDate = partitionDate.minusDays(1);
      }

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .query(new DataQuery(LabSql.selectAll(LabSql.canonicalDatasetId("lab-api-positions-hist")), 1));
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestDemo] ingestName=lab-api-positions-hist ingestedRecords=10000 partitions=5 rowCount={} firstRow={}",
          runtime.queryCount(),
          preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0));
    }
  }
}





org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.s3

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/ingest/s3/LabIngestS3.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.ingest.s3;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabIngestS3 {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabIngestS3.class);

  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "lab-s3-ingest-demo";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");
  private static final Path CLIENT_KEK_FILE = Path.of("vault/keks/lab/lab.kek");

  private static final String INGEST_NAME = "lab_s3_orders_demo";
  private static final String NAMESPACE = "default";
  private static final String S3_CONNECTION_NAME = "s3-data-lake-client1";
  private static final String PARQUET_PATH = "default/lab_s3_orders_demo";

  private LabIngestS3() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .withKekFile(CLIENT_KEK_FILE)
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      IngestModel model =
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST_NAME)
              .withNamespace(NAMESPACE)
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("account_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
                      .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
                      .withField("trade_ts", SchemaModel.FieldType.TIMESTAMP, false)
                      .withField("trade_date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(PARQUET_PATH)
                          .withConnectionName(S3_CONNECTION_NAME)
                          .withPartitionKey("trade_date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("trade_date"))
              .build();
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(model);

      try (IngestRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().ingest().open(INGEST_NAME)) {
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(orderPayload(1001, "ACCT-001", 125.25)));
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(orderPayload(1002, "ACCT-002", 126.75)));
        runtime.append(new IngestPayloadJson(orderPayload(1003, "ACCT-003", 127.10)));
        LOGGER.info("[LabIngestS3] ingestName={} runtime.queryCount={}", INGEST_NAME, runtime.queryCount());
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(GROUP, NAMESPACE, INGEST_NAME);
      RowResult result =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .querySql(
                  "select order_id, account_id, price, trade_date from "
                      + LabSql.table(datasetId)
                      + " order by order_id",
                  20);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabIngestS3] dataset={} rows={} firstRow={}",
          datasetId,
          result.rows().size(),
          result.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : result.rows().get(0));
    }
  }

  private static String orderPayload(long orderId, String accountId, double price) {
    Instant tradeTs = Instant.parse("2026-03-01T13:00:00Z").plusSeconds(orderId % 10);
    return "{"
        + "\"order_id\":"
        + orderId
        + ","
        + "\"account_id\":\""
        + accountId
        + "\","
        + "\"price\":"
        + price
        + ","
        + "\"trade_ts\":\""
        + tradeTs
        + "\","
        + "\"trade_date\":\"2026-03-01\""
        + "}\n";
  }

}





org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.parquet

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/parquet/LabParquetCompactOrders.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.parquet;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.IngestPayloadJson;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.ingest.model.IngestSchemaMode;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.parquet.ParquetCompactionOptions;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.parquet.ParquetMaintenanceResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;

public final class LabParquetCompactOrders {
  private static final String INGEST = "lab_parquet_compact_orders";

  private LabParquetCompactOrders() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    try (Fabric.Session session = LabDemoSupport.startSession("lab-parquet-compact-orders")) {
      Path targetPath = LabDemoSupport.labDefaultDataDir(INGEST);
      System.out.println(
          "[LabParquetCompactOrders] ingest="
              + INGEST
              + " source=API target="
              + targetPath
              + " mode=DIRECT");
      session.data().direct().ingest().admin().register(
          IngestModel.builder()
              .withName(INGEST)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withSchemaMode(IngestSchemaMode.STRICT)
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT32, false)
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.DATE, false)
                      .build())
              .withSourceApi(source -> source.withFormat("JSON"))
              .withTargetParquet(
                  target ->
                      target
                          .withParquetPath(targetPath.toString())
                          .withPartitionKey("date")
                          .withPartitionValueField("date"))
              .build());

      for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        session.data().direct().ingest().append(INGEST, new IngestPayloadJson(orderPayload(i)));
      }

      var datasetId = LabSql.canonicalDatasetId(INGEST);
      ParquetMaintenanceResult result =
          session.data()
              .direct()
              .parquet()
              .compactDataset(
                  datasetId.toString(),
                  new ParquetCompactionOptions(2, 8, 16, false));
      System.out.println(
          "[LabParquetCompactOrders] dataset="
              + datasetId
              + " filesRead="
              + result.filesRead()
              + " filesWritten="
              + result.filesWritten()
              + " filesDeleted="
              + result.filesDeleted()
              + " durationMs="
              + result.durationMs());
      if (!result.warnings().isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("[LabParquetCompactOrders] warnings=" + result.warnings());
      }
    }
  }

  private static String orderPayload(int index) {
    return "{"
        + "\"order_id\":"
        + (1000 + index)
        + ",\"qty\":"
        + (10 + index)
        + ",\"date\":\"2026-03-01\""
        + "}\n";
  }
}





org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.schemas

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/schemas/LabSchemas.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.schemas;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaType;

public final class LabSchemas {
  private static final String SCHEMA_NAME = "demo_schema_orders";

  private LabSchemas() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withInstance("instance1")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();

    try (session) {
      session.start();
      SchemaManager schemas = session.schemas();

      if (schemas.exists(SCHEMA_NAME)) {
        schemas.delete(SCHEMA_NAME);
      }
      printResult("clean-start", !schemas.exists(SCHEMA_NAME));

      SchemaModel v1 =
          SchemaModel.builder()
              .withField("order_id", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, false)
              .withField("qty", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
              .withField("price", SchemaModel.FieldType.FLOAT64, false)
              .build();
      schemas.register(SCHEMA_NAME, SchemaType.TABULAR, v1);
      Optional<SchemaModel> lookupV1 = schemas.get(SCHEMA_NAME);
      printResult("register-v1", lookupV1.isPresent());
      if (lookupV1.isPresent()) {
        System.out.println("PASS get-v1 fields=" + renderFields(lookupV1.get()));
      } else {
        System.out.println("FAIL get-v1 missing");
      }

      SchemaModel v2 =
          v1.toBuilder().withField("venue", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true).build();
      schemas.register(SCHEMA_NAME, SchemaType.TABULAR, v2);
      Optional<SchemaModel> lookupV2 = schemas.get(SCHEMA_NAME);
      boolean updated =
          lookupV2.isPresent()
              && lookupV1.isPresent()
              && lookupV2.get().getFields().size() > lookupV1.get().getFields().size()
              && lookupV2.get().getFields().stream().anyMatch(field -> "venue".equals(field.getName()));
      printResult("register-v2-add-column", updated);

      SchemaModel v3 = incompatibleQtyType(v2);
      try {
        schemas.register(SCHEMA_NAME, SchemaType.TABULAR, v3);
        System.out.println("FAIL register-v3-type-change expected rejection");
      } catch (IllegalArgumentException ex) {
        System.out.println("PASS register-v3-type-change " + ex.getMessage());
      }

      schemas.delete(SCHEMA_NAME);
      printResult("delete", !schemas.exists(SCHEMA_NAME));

    }

    System.out.println("done");
  }

  private static SchemaModel incompatibleQtyType(SchemaModel base) {
    List<SchemaModel.Field> fields = new ArrayList<>();
    for (SchemaModel.Field field : base.getFields()) {
      if ("qty".equals(field.getName())) {
        fields.add(field.toBuilder().withType(SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING).build());
      } else {
        fields.add(field);
      }
    }
    return base.toBuilder().withFields(fields).build();
  }

  private static String renderFields(SchemaModel schema) {
    List<String> parts = new ArrayList<>();
    for (SchemaModel.Field field : schema.getFields()) {
      parts.add(field.getName() + ":" + field.getType().token() + ":" + (field.isNullable() ? "NULL" : "NOT_NULL"));
    }
    return String.join(",", parts);
  }

  private static void printResult(String step, boolean ok) {
    System.out.println((ok ? "PASS " : "FAIL ") + step);
  }
}


org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.services.grpc

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/services/grpc/LabGrpcClientDenyTest.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.services.grpc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import demo.echo.EchoGrpc;
import demo.echo.EchoReply;
import demo.echo.EchoRequest;
import io.grpc.Status;
import io.grpc.StatusRuntimeException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceClient;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabGrpcClientDenyTest {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabGrpcClientDenyTest.class);

  private LabGrpcClientDenyTest() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String allowedSubject = "user:lenny";
    String deniedSubject = "user:denied";
    String discovery = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
    Path trustCert = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem");

    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(discovery)
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .build();
    try (session) {
      session.start();

      EchoReply allowedReply = invoke(session, trustCert, allowedSubject, "allow-check");
      LOGGER.info(
          "[DenyTest] allowed subject={} reply='{}' instance={}",
          allowedSubject,
          allowedReply.getMsg(),
          allowedReply.getInstance());

      try {
        invoke(session, trustCert, deniedSubject, "deny-check");
        throw new IllegalStateException(
            "Expected PERMISSION_DENIED for subject " + deniedSubject + " but call succeeded");
      } catch (StatusRuntimeException ex) {
        if (ex.getStatus().getCode() != Status.Code.PERMISSION_DENIED) {
          throw new IllegalStateException(
              "Expected PERMISSION_DENIED but got " + ex.getStatus(), ex);
        }
        LOGGER.info("[DenyTest] denied subject={} status={}", deniedSubject, ex.getStatus());
      }
    }
  }

  private static EchoReply invoke(
      Fabric.Session session, Path trustCert, String subject, String message) throws Exception {
    ServiceRunOptions options =
        ServiceRunOptions.builder()
            .withTlsTrustCert(trustCert)
            .build();
    try (ServiceClient client = session.services().client("echo-secure", options)) {
      EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub stub = client.as(EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub.class);
      return stub.say(EchoRequest.newBuilder().setMsg(message).build());
    }
  }

}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/services/grpc/LabGrpcRoutingEntitlementsTest.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.services.grpc;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import demo.echo.EchoGrpc;
import demo.echo.EchoReply;
import demo.echo.EchoRequest;
import io.grpc.Status;
import io.grpc.StatusRuntimeException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.Set;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceClient;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.services.ServiceRunOptions;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabGrpcRoutingEntitlementsTest {
  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabGrpcRoutingEntitlementsTest.class);

  private LabGrpcRoutingEntitlementsTest() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String discovery = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
    String allowedSubject = "user:lenny";
    String deniedSubject = "user:denied";
    int allowedCallsBefore = 15;
    int deniedCalls = 10;
    int allowedCallsAfter = 10;
    int minDistinctBefore = 2;
    long ttlWaitMs = 20_000L;
    Set<String> expectedStopped = Set.of();

    Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup("lab")
            .withName("client")
            .withDiscoveryUrls(discovery)
            .withGrpcRoutingLogging(true)
            .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
            .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
            .build();

    Path trustCert = Path.of("vault", "tls", "demo-ca.pem");
    try (session) {
      session.start();

      Set<String> beforeInstances =
          runAllowedPhase(session, trustCert, allowedSubject, allowedCallsBefore, "before-ttl");
      if (beforeInstances.size() < Math.max(1, minDistinctBefore)) {
        throw new IllegalStateException(
            "Expected at least "
                + minDistinctBefore
                + " distinct instances, observed "
                + beforeInstances.size()
                + " -> "
                + beforeInstances);
      }

      runDeniedPhase(session, trustCert, deniedSubject, deniedCalls);

      if (ttlWaitMs > 0L) {
        LOGGER.info("[RoutingTest] waiting {} ms for heartbeat TTL expiry window", ttlWaitMs);
        Thread.sleep(ttlWaitMs);
      }

      Set<String> afterInstances =
          runAllowedPhase(session, trustCert, allowedSubject, allowedCallsAfter, "after-ttl");
      if (!expectedStopped.isEmpty()) {
        Set<String> intersection = new LinkedHashSet<>(afterInstances);
        intersection.retainAll(expectedStopped);
        if (!intersection.isEmpty()) {
          throw new IllegalStateException(
              "Expected stopped instances to be excluded after TTL, but still routed: "
                  + intersection);
        }
      }

      LOGGER.info(
          "[RoutingTest] complete beforeInstances={} afterInstances={} expectedStopped={}",
          beforeInstances,
          afterInstances,
          expectedStopped);
    }
  }

  private static Set<String> runAllowedPhase(
      Fabric.Session session, Path trustCert, String subject, int calls, String phase) throws Exception {
    Set<String> instances = new LinkedHashSet<>();
    ServiceRunOptions options =
        ServiceRunOptions.builder()
            .withTlsTrustCert(trustCert)
            .build();
    try (ServiceClient client = session.services().client("echo-secure", options)) {
      EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub stub = client.as(EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub.class);
      for (int i = 1; i <= calls; i++) {
        EchoReply reply =
            stub.say(EchoRequest.newBuilder().setMsg(phase + "-" + i).build());
        instances.add(reply.getInstance());
        LOGGER.info(
            "[RoutingTest][{}] allowed call={} instance={} msg={}",
            phase,
            i,
            reply.getInstance(),
            reply.getMsg());
      }
    }
    return instances;
  }

  private static void runDeniedPhase(
      Fabric.Session session, Path trustCert, String deniedSubject, int deniedCalls) throws Exception {
    ServiceRunOptions options =
        ServiceRunOptions.builder()
            .withTlsTrustCert(trustCert)
            .build();
    try (ServiceClient client = session.services().client("echo-secure", options)) {
      EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub stub = client.as(EchoGrpc.EchoBlockingStub.class);
      for (int i = 1; i <= deniedCalls; i++) {
        try {
          stub.say(EchoRequest.newBuilder().setMsg("deny-" + i).build());
          throw new IllegalStateException(
              "Expected PERMISSION_DENIED for denied subject on call " + i);
        } catch (StatusRuntimeException ex) {
          if (ex.getStatus().getCode() != Status.Code.PERMISSION_DENIED) {
            throw new IllegalStateException(
                "Expected PERMISSION_DENIED but got " + ex.getStatus() + " at denied call " + i,
                ex);
          }
          LOGGER.info("[RoutingTest] denied call={} status={}", i, ex.getStatus());
        }
      }
    }
  }
}



org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.session

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/session/LabSession.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.session;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.cache.DiscoveryTopics;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.session.SessionContext;

public final class LabSession {

  private LabSession() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {
      session.start();
      SessionContext context = session.context();
      System.out.printf(
          "Session started group=%s app=%s instance=%s env=%s region=%s site=%s sessionId=%s duplicateDetectionDefaultEnabled=true%n",
          context.getGroup(),
          context.getAppName(),
          context.getInstance(),
          context.getEnv(),
          context.getRegion(),
          context.getSite(),
          context.getSessionId());
      System.out.printf(
          "Discovery URIs=%s%n",
          context.getDiscoveryUris());
      System.out.printf(
          "Config scope group=%s recovered=%s%n",
          context.getGroup(),
          context.isConfigRecovered());
      System.out.printf(
          "Status topic=%s publisherStarted=%s intervalSeconds=%d intervalSource=%s%n",
          DiscoveryTopics.STATUS,
          context.isStatusPublisherStarted(),
          context.getStatusPublishIntervalSeconds(),
          context.getStatusPublishIntervalSource());

        Thread.sleep(20000);//lLong.MAX_VALUE);
    
    } finally {
      session.close();
    }
    System.out.printf("done");
  }
}




org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.views

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/views/LabViewChain.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.views;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewRefreshResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewQueryModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabViewChain {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "lab-view-chain";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private LabViewChain() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String viewA = "orders_daily_counts_chain_a";
    String viewB = "orders_total_chain_b";
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ViewModel modelA =
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewA)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder()
                      .withSql("SELECT date, count(*) AS cnt FROM orders_hist GROUP BY date")
                      .build())
              .withDependencies(List.of("dataset:lab/default/orders_hist"))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
                      .withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName("lite_orders_daily_counts_chain_a")
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().withType(ViewRefreshType.MANUAL).build())
              .build();

      ViewModel modelB =
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewB)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder()
                      .withSql("SELECT sum(cnt) AS total FROM lite_orders_daily_counts_chain_a")
                      .build())
              .withDependencies(List.of("dataset:lab/default/orders_daily_counts_chain_a"))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder().withField("total", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, true).build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName("lite_orders_total_chain_b")
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().withType(ViewRefreshType.MANUAL).build())
              .build();

      session.data().direct().views().register(modelA);
      session.data().direct().views().register(modelB);

      String datasetA = session.data().direct().views().getModel(viewA).orElseThrow().outputDatasetId();
      String datasetB = session.data().direct().views().getModel(viewB).orElseThrow().outputDatasetId();

      System.out.println("viewName=" + viewA + " outputDatasetId=" + datasetA + " target=DUCKDB_TABLE refresh=MANUAL");
      ViewRefreshResult refreshA = session.data().direct().views().refresh(viewA);
      System.out.println("refreshA rows=" + refreshA.rowCount() + " durationMs=" + refreshA.durationMillis());

      System.out.println("viewName=" + viewB + " outputDatasetId=" + datasetB + " target=DUCKDB_TABLE refresh=MANUAL");
      ViewRefreshResult refreshB = session.data().direct().views().refreshGraph(viewB);
      System.out.println("refreshB rows=" + refreshB.rowCount() + " durationMs=" + refreshB.durationMillis());

      RowResult total =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .querySql(
                  "select * from " + LabSql.tableFromCanonicalDatasetId(datasetB) + " limit 1");
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + (total.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : total.rows().get(0)));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/views/LabViewManual.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.views;

import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabSql;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.RowResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewRefreshResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewQueryModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabViewManual {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "lab-view-manual";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private LabViewManual() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String viewName = "orders_daily_counts";
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ViewModel model =
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder()
                      .withSql("SELECT date, count(*) AS cnt FROM orders_hist GROUP BY date")
                      .build())
              .withDependencies(List.of("dataset:lab/default/orders_hist"))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
                      .withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName("lite_orders_daily_counts")
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(
                  ViewRefreshModel.builder().withType(ViewRefreshType.MANUAL).build())
              .build();

      session.data().direct().views().register(model);
      ViewRefreshResult refresh = session.data().direct().views().refresh(viewName);
      String outputDatasetId =
          session.data().direct().views().getModel(viewName).orElseThrow().outputDatasetId();

      RowResult preview =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .querySql(
                  "select * from "
                      + LabSql.tableFromCanonicalDatasetId(outputDatasetId)
                      + " order by date limit 1");
      RowResult count =
          session.data().direct().rows()
              .querySql(
                  "select count(*) as row_count from "
                      + LabSql.tableFromCanonicalDatasetId(outputDatasetId),
                  1);

      System.out.println("viewName=" + viewName + " outputDatasetId=" + outputDatasetId + " target=DUCKDB_TABLE refresh=MANUAL");
      System.out.println("refreshRows=" + refresh.rowCount() + " refreshDurationMs=" + refresh.durationMillis());
      System.out.println("queryRowCount=" + (count.rows().isEmpty() ? 0 : count.rows().get(0).get(0)));
      System.out.println("firstRow=" + (preview.rows().isEmpty() ? List.of() : preview.rows().get(0)));
    }
  }
}





===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/views/LabViewPeriodic.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.views;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewRuntime;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewStatus;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewQueryModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;

public final class LabViewPeriodic {
  private static final String GROUP = "lab";
  private static final String APP = "lab-view-periodic";
  private static final String DISCOVERY = DiscoveryUrl.URL;
  private static final String KRB_USER = "lenny";
  private static final Path KRB_KEYTAB = Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab");

  private LabViewPeriodic() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String viewName = "orders_daily_counts_periodic";
    try (Fabric.Session session =
        Fabric.newSession()
            .withGroup(GROUP)
            .withName(APP)
            .withDiscoveryUrls(DISCOVERY)
            .withKerberosUsername(KRB_USER)
            .withKerberosKeytab(KRB_KEYTAB)
            .build()) {
      session.start();

      ViewModel model =
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewName)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder()
                      .withSql("SELECT date, count(*) AS cnt FROM orders_hist GROUP BY date")
                      .build())
              .withDependencies(List.of("dataset:lab/default/orders_hist"))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder()
                      .withField("date", SchemaModel.FieldType.STRING, true)
                      .withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false)
                      .build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName("lite_orders_daily_counts_periodic")
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(
                  ViewRefreshModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewRefreshType.PERIODIC)
                      .withIntervalMillis(3000L)
                      .withRunOnStart(true)
                      .build())
              .build();

      session.data().direct().views().register(model);
      String outputDatasetId =
          session.data().direct().views().getModel(viewName).orElseThrow().outputDatasetId();
      System.out.println("viewName=" + viewName + " outputDatasetId=" + outputDatasetId + " target=DUCKDB_TABLE refresh=PERIODIC");

      try (ViewRuntime runtime = session.data().direct().views().start(viewName)) {
        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis() + 10_000L;
        while (System.currentTimeMillis() < endTime) {
          ViewStatus status = runtime.status();
          System.out.println(
              Instant.now()
                  + " state="
                  + status.runtimeState()
                  + " lastRefresh="
                  + status.lastRefreshStartUtc()
                  + " lastStatus="
                  + status.lastStatus()
                  + " lastError="
                  + status.lastError());
          Thread.sleep(1500L);
        }
        runtime.stop();
      }
    }
  }
}




===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/misc/views/LabViewRefreshGraph.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.views;

import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewRefreshResult;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.ViewStatus;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewQueryModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewRefreshModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.data.views.model.ViewTargetType;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.schemas.SchemaModel;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.misc.LabDemoSupport;

public final class LabViewRefreshGraph {
  private LabViewRefreshGraph() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    String viewA = "lab_refresh_graph_a";
    String viewB = "lab_refresh_graph_b";
    String viewATable = "lite_" + viewA;
    String viewBTable = "lite_" + viewB;
    try (Fabric.Session session = LabDemoSupport.startSession("lab-view-refresh-graph")) {
      System.out.println(
          "[LabViewRefreshGraph] view=" + viewA + " source=SQL targetTable=" + viewATable + " mode=DIRECT");
      System.out.println(
          "[LabViewRefreshGraph] view="
              + viewB
              + " source=VIEW_DEPENDENCY targetTable="
              + viewBTable
              + " mode=DIRECT");
      session.data().direct().views().register(
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewA)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(ViewQueryModel.builder().withSql("select 1::BIGINT as cnt").build())
              .withDependencies(List.of())
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder().withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false).build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName(viewATable)
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().build())
              .build());

      session.data().direct().views().register(
          ViewModel.builder()
              .withName(viewB)
              .withNamespace("default")
              .withQuery(
                  ViewQueryModel.builder().withSql("select cnt + 1 as cnt from " + viewATable).build())
              .withDependencies(List.of("lab_refresh_graph_a"))
              .withSchema(
                  SchemaModel.builder().withField("cnt", SchemaModel.FieldType.INT64, false).build())
              .withTarget(
                  ViewTargetModel.builder()
                      .withType(ViewTargetType.DUCKDB_TABLE)
                      .withDuckdbTableName(viewBTable)
                      .build())
              .withRefresh(ViewRefreshModel.builder().build())
              .build());

      ViewRefreshResult result = session.data().direct().views().refreshGraph(viewB);
      ViewStatus statusA = session.data().direct().views().status(viewA);
      ViewStatus statusB = session.data().direct().views().status(viewB);
      System.out.println("[LabViewRefreshGraph] refreshGraphRoot=" + viewB + " success=" + result.success());
      System.out.println(
          "[LabViewRefreshGraph] "
              + viewA
              + " status="
              + statusA.lastStatus()
              + " start="
              + statusA.lastRefreshStartUtc()
              + " end="
              + statusA.lastRefreshEndUtc());
      System.out.println(
          "[LabViewRefreshGraph] "
              + viewB
              + " status="
              + statusB.lastStatus()
              + " start="
              + statusB.lastRefreshStartUtc()
              + " end="
              + statusB.lastRefreshEndUtc());
    }
  }
}



org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.session

===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/session/LabSession.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.session;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.time.Duration;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabSession {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabSession.class);
  private static final Path RECOVERY_SNAPSHOT_PATH =
      Path.of("var", "lab", "discovery-cache-last-good");
  private static final Duration RECOVERY_TTL = Duration.ofHours(24);

  private LabSession() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .withRecoveryEnabled(true)
                              .withRecoveryPath(RECOVERY_SNAPSHOT_PATH)
                              .withRecoveryTtl(RECOVERY_TTL)
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSession][Recovery] mode={} enabled={} reason={}",
          session.recovery().status().mode(),
          session.recovery().status().recoveryEnabled(),
          session.recovery().status().reason());
      if (session.recovery().isRecoveryMode()) {
        LOGGER.warn(
            "[LabSession][Recovery] session started from last-good snapshot path={}",
            session.recovery().status().snapshotPath());
      }

      // Demo: persist a fresh last-good DiscoveryCache snapshot for next startup recovery.
      session.recovery().dump();
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSession][Recovery] snapshot dumped to {}",
          RECOVERY_SNAPSHOT_PATH.toAbsolutePath().normalize());

      LabUtil.waitForSeconds(10);

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

}



===== FILE: fabric-lite-lab/src/main/java/org/pronzato/fabric/client/lab/session/LabSessionAccess.java =====
package org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.session;

import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.discovery.DiscoveryUrl;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.List;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.access.AccessManager;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.Fabric;
import org.pronzato.fabric.api.control.entitlements.core.services.ServiceEntitlements;
import org.pronzato.fabric.client.lab.LabUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

public final class LabSessionAccess {

  private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LabSessionAccess.class);

  private LabSessionAccess() {}

  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    
    Fabric.Session session = Fabric.newSession()
                              .withGroup("lab")
                              .withName("client")
                              .withDiscoveryUrls(DiscoveryUrl.URL)
                              .withKerberosKeytab(Path.of("vault/kerberos/lenny.keytab"))
                              .withKerberosUsername("lenny")
                              .build();
    try {

      session.start();
      AccessManager access = session.access();
      String subject = access.defaultSubject();
      LOGGER.info("[LabSessionAccess] defaultSubject={}", subject);

      List<String> queryableDatasets = access.queryableDatasets(subject);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSessionAccess] queryableDatasets count={} sample={}",
          queryableDatasets.size(),
          sample(queryableDatasets, 8));

      List<AccessManager.DatasetAccess> datasetAccess = access.datasets(subject);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSessionAccess] datasetsWithAccess count={} sample={}",
          datasetAccess.size(),
          sample(datasetAccess, 6));

      if (!queryableDatasets.isEmpty()) {
        String datasetId = queryableDatasets.get(0);
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabSessionAccess] canQueryDataset datasetId={} allowed={}",
            datasetId,
            access.canQueryDataset(subject, datasetId));
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabSessionAccess] datasetQueryRoute datasetId={} route={}",
            datasetId,
            access.datasetQueryRoute(subject, datasetId).orElse(null));
      }

      List<String> callableServices = access.callableServices(subject);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSessionAccess] callableServices count={} sample={}",
          callableServices.size(),
          sample(callableServices, 8));

      List<AccessManager.ServiceAccess> serviceAccess = access.services(subject);
      LOGGER.info(
          "[LabSessionAccess] servicesWithAccess count={} sample={}",
          serviceAccess.size(),
          sample(serviceAccess, 6));

      if (!callableServices.isEmpty()) {
        String serviceId = callableServices.get(0);
        LOGGER.info(
            "[LabSessionAccess] serviceChecks serviceId={} online={} canInvokeFlightSql={} canInvokeGrpc={}",
            serviceId,
            access.isServiceOnline(serviceId),
            access.canCallService(
                subject,
                serviceId,
                ServiceEntitlements.Transport.ARROW_FLIGHT_SQL,
                AccessManager.ServiceAction.INVOKE),
            access.canCallService(
                subject,
                serviceId,
                ServiceEntitlements.Transport.GRPC,
                AccessManager.ServiceAction.INVOKE));
      }

      LabUtil.waitForSeconds(10);

    } catch (Exception ex) {
      LOGGER.warn("error during test run", ex);
    } finally {
      LabUtil.closeSessionGracefully(session);
    }

  }

  private static <T> List<T> sample(List<T> values, int max) {
    if (values == null || values.isEmpty()) {
      return List.of();
    }
    int limit = Math.max(1, max);
    if (values.size() <= limit) {
      return List.copyOf(values);
    }
    return List.copyOf(values.subList(0, limit));
  }

}
